| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61986732/401901340/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230418-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQxN2M5OTktNDlkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=30H2g5pjvoUsxQQku58eNs9SbWPMZStEcEpx7mVf8Cs=)

| Peter,

A week after another mass shooting, MAGA Republicans are unrelenting in pushing their “guns everywhere” agenda.

There is a clear solution to end our gun violence epidemic, but instead of banning assault weapons, Republicans are choosing to ban:

✔️ Books
✔️ Drag shows
✔️ And attacking the LGBTQ+ community
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:

Michelle Steel has spent her time in Congress cozying up to the far-right and pushing for their extreme agenda. And now she’s being rewarded for her loyalty. Marjorie Taylor Greene knows that keeping Steel in Congress is essential to maintaining the GOP’s House majority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61987107/401918017/762321513?contactdata=g86SC95IkzShOOK1I1phmCGeRn8z0yWGZ+JI73H/lI6vzx19F8pVwy+z6khPV8VB3fea5X8sqQbyb67MoNoEoAffFqDSJFIorT7vlMCyJzw=&amount=15&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230418_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllMzE0OTgtNGZkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C8E8-ntPmcgMd7seTxQumkRfjEmm1YRy8-ulby8KzA4=) **Kim is running for Congress to defeat Michelle Steel and flip CA-45 blue. Now, Republicans are doing everything in their power to take it back – in fact, they’re already running attack ads against me! | = | Folks: I know the 2024 election feels far away, so I’d like to explain why we have to prepare now – but in case you’re short on time, = | = In 2022, with your support, we flipped a 50-year Republican stronghold BLUE. Now, Republicans are doing everything in their power to take it back – in fact, they’re already running attack ads against me! And if they’re already preparing for next year’s election, we have to be ready, too. = | = | = Your contribution will make a real difference in my ability to defend myself against the Republican attacks that are already coming my way. = | = | = Gratefully, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Peter,
I just wanted to take a moment to say _**THANK YOU**_ for your support during my first 100 days in office. We've had an amazing journey so far, and I'm proud to report that we have accomplished a lot together.

__I am thrilled to report that we raised an incredible $635,559.33 in the first quarter of 2023!
__
We passed 59 bills, with five of them already on President Biden's desk, and three signed into law. We conducted more than 235 hearings, where we tackled issues ranging from public safety to economic growth.

Some of the significant legislative victories include repealing 87,000 IRS Agents, enacting the Parents Bill of Rights through H.R. 5, ending Proxy Voting, and lowering energy costs through H.R. 1. We also reopened the People's House, eliminated the Military Vaccine Mandate, stopped the selling of SPR to China, nullified DC's soft-on-crime Bill, terminated the COVID National Emergency, and established the Bipartisan China Select Committee.

These achievements wouldn't be possible without your generous contributions, and I'm humbled to have your support. As the first Republican woman and one of the first Latinas elected to Congress from Oregon, I'm committed to being a strong voice for our communities.

Once again, thank you for entrusting me with this responsibility, and I look forward to continuing to serve you and work towards building a better future for Oregon and our nation.

Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to say THANK YOU for your support during my first 100 days in office. We've had an amazing journey so far, and I'm proud to report that we have accomplished a lot together. I am thrilled to report that we raised an incredible $635,559.33 in the first quarter of 2023! We passed 59 bills, with five of them already on President Biden's desk, and three signed into law. We conducted more than 235 hearings, where we tackled issues ranging from public safety to economic growth. Some of the significant legislative victories include repealing 87,000 IRS Agents, enacting the Parents Bill of Rights through H.R. 5, ending Proxy Voting, and lowering energy costs through H.R. 1. We also reopened the People's House, eliminated the Military Vaccine Mandate, stopped the selling of SPR to China, nullified DC's soft-on-crime Bill, terminated the COVID National Emergency, and established the Bipartisan China Select Committee. These achievements wouldn't be possible without your generous contributions, and I'm humbled to have your support. As the first Republican woman and one of the first Latinas elected to Congress from Oregon, I'm committed to being a strong voice for our communities. Once again, thank you for entrusting me with this responsibility, and I look forward to continuing to serve you and work towards building a better future for Oregon and our nation. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 =

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: What Hemingway said
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhlntm59thgs1575huj6sc012ihc4n9kt3v96umo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z70dcjjfjpt7coq1eimqtu12acnjsatqcgov6cdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztmehkuf0k5gnkuetrd58vbeqtr2sbv8db618ujg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs).
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh9n29kka48frr16gtlgv1bfqdnbdajo2f3asun8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zus79qc0mr8emnejnvgmvm2cbke447p98smendcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4iou7a31elbmd9poo32pjkq84212ff7587a35jg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob4chh2bs)
---

Deroy Murdock

On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering **186 more banks are on the brink of collapse.** **“Could your bank be next?”** The Fed's reckless recent printing of **$300,000,000** **to bail out more struggling banks** has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. The **FDIC can’t even cover SVB** and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? And if that's not enough to terrify you, consider this - experts predict that the latest interest rate hikes will inevitably trigger a recession, causing your investments and retirement accounts to plummet even more in value. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1o7hs45kdrfl86he9l2sd7or8cikfa9ash1bujo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z25q5jhvsho5tfgr934k1i72t7u0g711edn0cc1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq8g63626rhsp67iiohvt11t8v2jce6k8tu6hj3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7t5bc23063pkm1ghtgm2iv3dtr3lfatld8had50_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkg10rfeko3ndgvrtiadfgnnn3tvp94o2v558i0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0bd13s3gsqi6gcfdsul34su7fvph9fn54oie5o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvq7e5ikc4sr7qb8ejjv70hpt2siqs0en79lvcd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0bp29j34q8nlrgeaoarbdc5ncltn6tqglra9v4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0cbsmiqg1i8kg4qb454lp6u05cqvu3mgqaiieig_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znvnk4q4t69a7o88414i13gt95q0upianuuqtvs0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I want you to know where I stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z63b2n0kh3d4r2m0hdbhdbe6m9kvteqfhg4d4nbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2clh2bs)
---

Friend, **_I want you to know where I stand._**

When Washington elites treat police officers like criminals and criminals like victims, **_crime rates rise._**

I’ve consistently supported law enforcement and opposed radical demands to defund and disrespect the police. **I voted against legislation that would release violent offenders from jail early.**

I’ve supported **common sense reforms** to **reduce violent crime** by getting dangerous predators **off our streets** and **away** from innocent victims. As we’ve seen, one of the best ways to combat crime is ensuring that law-abiding citizens can defend themselves.

That’s why I’ve **supported the Second Amendment** at every turn and protected the right of my fellow Louisianians to bear arms.

The **open border** has also **allowed criminal gangs** and **deadly drugs** to flood into our country. I’ve visited the U.S.-Mexico border myself, **_and it’s clear that we must secure that border if we’re going to make our communities safe again._**

I won’t stop battling to make that happen.

If you agree that we need to treat criminals like criminals and protect the hard working people of America, **[click here](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc06i0tar0tprki0dtmintqb33cae7i5akst7ijo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2clh2bs)**.

Thank you,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7r1j68vstfd04golgmen6otqj74bb2agmtgj0n8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2clh2bs)

JNK

* * *
_[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp87jk84j96io9c1acjegn90l6kc8vibfv5cvtk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2clh2bs)
Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. **[Chip in $35 today to ensure that we give our future generations a fighting chance.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z43ue2pa6hiaabhsdv0337uv1e6ct7a03kc86f5g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2clh2bs)**_

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6f7ne88pmek2a067s5lkl41bn28t8pnvgcklda0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9gueshq6lo0vv9dkit9i6caaigbvvm6ckh37bsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)
---

* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds

Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk210prvr9q7pim8nj4ggbounvku0j38dbq7vt48_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob6cdh2bs)**

clean_body: The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | | | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021... to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country. The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?Here is the pledge... | | “I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.” | | | | Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – and kids deserve better – | | | | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include... | | Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds AFC Fellow Corey DeAngelis Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr. | | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, and we need your voice. name: American Action News
subject: How to fight critical race theory
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zetb8ul6hpuk0f9a17k0sg9bqi34qciphkl4tqeg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how “progressives” are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, “what can I do?”**
That may be a question you’re asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same—EDUCATION!**
That’s because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you’re reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we’ve recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,**“Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,”** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That’s because there’s a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it’s happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we’ve wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we’ll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor’s office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of** _**Imprimis**_**, “Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,” to hand out, visit the secure link below:**
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3crml8i69ma0dfkf2m43f6lgnvg30ij154ql6u0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c3ie1ob2c1h2bs)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You’re countering the far-Left’s aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you’re doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9bb6FlWKbLhgAn8TeTq9FA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9bb6FlWKbLhgAn8TeTq9FA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665823%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cPJjbGP3%2bW7pcoKnUx747g&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665834%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dAYS6OXArITyYNxko2nBNA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665845%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U56h9zUat1gFo5QjKuLZig&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. name: Secure & Prosper
subject: What? “The Twitter Files?"
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-jZQ) Dear Fellow American, In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s free digest of liberty, you'll read about how the “Twitter Files” show that Big Tech and shadowy figures in the government worked together to control the information you and I see online. These revelations link many of the significant political controversies during the Trump-Biden era. They also show how at least one medical professional associated with Hillsdale College was placed on a **“Trends Blacklist”** for presenting **relevant facts** about COVID-19 and recommending a policy shift to save lives and preserve our way of life. But worse, it shows how Big Tech, big government, and state-funded non-profits worked together to **trample on the First Amendment rights** of their opponents and **deny the American people access** to alternative opinions and important news stories. **Have you, or someone you know, been “blacklisted” or warned by Big Tech for sharing their political views online? ** **We want to know.** Please help us understand the views of mainstream Americans on this issue by completing the **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey/](http://trk.secureandprosper.)** Your answers will help strengthen our educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about our nation’s great heritage of liberty—and about the duty of each generation to defend liberty and pass it on to their children and grandchildren. We can succeed with the support of citizens like you who understand the importance of education to liberty. So, thank you again for your partnership and support, and I look forward to receiving your answers to our **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH**. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College

## How concerned are you about Big Tech's ability to censor content, "deplatform" users, and push a false and dishonest narrative about what's happening in America today?
[Not concerned at all](http://trk.secureandprosper.-TclwA0gPd6GPw)[Somewhat concerned](http://trk.secureandprosper._9I0hkoXRRS2edyEnJo9A)[Very concerned](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
|
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshJxmiDN8

I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom
are very similar.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshJxmiDN8

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

I'd like
to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very
similar.

Both were
born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing,
raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went
to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college
and now have a four-year degree.

In most
respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background,
grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music
and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that
difference is vital to preserving liberty in America.

The first
young lady learned false narratives about American history in her
K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and
professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and
frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political
correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race,
gender, and class.

Her
teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative
about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as
essentially and irredeemably unjust.

Absent
any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these
misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what
she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses
this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid,
hateful, and even racist.

Maybe you
know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too.

What
about the other young lady?

Well, she
received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At
her schools, especially her college, she received an education
that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history
fairly and comprehensively.

She
understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution
because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson,
Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources.

Her
studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of
"oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth
defending.

This
young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go
along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to
consider policies and political debates from a constitutional
perspective.

I ask
you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of
leadership?

You can
tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's
National Survey on the State of American Education using this
secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61717281:shJxmiDN8:m:3:2532013465:0024A63A422479A0803D1F2E6420CB02:r

This
survey lets you share your views about the state of our country
and how to change course before it's too late.

By
participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of
knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local
level.

The
survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

The goal
of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of
knowledgeable Americans who understand:

WHAT the
Constitution says;
HOW it
relates to current issues and events; and
WHY we
must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people
whom our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who
just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in
school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited
government.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my
email, and I hope you have a wonderful day.

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

clean_body: I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid, hateful, and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's National Survey on the State of American Education using this secure link: This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72015057856-echo3-F5131B425F6E354F24EA7D694623A1B2@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The definition of insanity?
body:
There’s a saying that the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665959%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HGoQYGp52IlO6aJwISWGcw&sysid=1)
---
|
Friend,

There’s a saying that the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results.

Let’s be honest with ourselves, Friend - if we truly want to beat the radical Left, it’s time to stop making the same mistakes.

We are heading into the most critical election of our lives and as we get closer and closer to November 2024, **we need to start focusing on _who_ can go all the way through to a general election _AND WIN!_**

The status quo isn’t cutting it and it’s _definitely_ not winning elections.

_**[I’m running to be your next President because I have a vision for how we can do things better. I also have a history of winning, even when no one else expects me to.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665950%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=25JK1SPxQckBlaWfxi1%2b7g&sysid=1 "I’m running to be your
next President because I have a vision for how we can do things better. I also
have a history of winning, even when no one else expects me to.")**_

I’m not here to make a loud splash or to get distracted by the noise - I keep my head down, outwork everyone, and meet with as many voters as possible on the ground in key early voting states.

It’s a strategy I like to call _Playing the Long Game_ because that’s how races are won. It’s how I’ve run all the winning campaigns in my career - from the state legislature to the governor’s mansion. It’s how I will run this fight all the way to the White House.

_**I’ve never lost a race and I’m not starting now.**_

If you’re ready to go all the way in 2024, then it’s time to take a chance on a fighter who can WIN. _**[Can I count on you to step up with a donation to join me in this fight today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665951%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0txHUGU9msJuiIV5O0icEA&sysid=1 "Can I count on you to step
up with a donation to join me in this fight today?")**_

Having you by my side as we make history means the world to me, but if you want to take it a step further please consider _**[chipping in just $5 or $10](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665952%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DIDB3NstGa5FNuWn52TonA&sysid=1 "chipping in just $5 or
$10")**_ to my campaign as we build an unprecedented grassroots infrastructure.

---
My very best,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665959%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HGoQYGp52IlO6aJwISWGcw&sysid=1)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Claim your free subscription to Imprimis
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoctrltn1uvnilhrtb0hhr43ibq9cojf53ljkeu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjg6co76c3h2bs)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how “progressives” are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, “what can I do?”**
That may be a question you’re asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same—EDUCATION!**
That’s because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you’re reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we’ve recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,**“Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,”** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That’s because there’s a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it’s happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we’ve wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we’ll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor’s office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of** _**Imprimis**_**, “Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,” to hand out, visit the secure link below:**
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdn2lfed1afsplad1ruh6nnljmb69trcv2sd3hf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjg6co76c3h2bs)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You’re countering the far-Left’s aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you’re doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---

subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|

Friend,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Jon Tester represents a red state, but he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family and fits Montana perfectly. Unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating.
body:
Heads they win, tails we lose
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4f0fe0c-967a-4e45-ad92-32fbf0340658/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Among the things that are exhausting about Republican lawmakers is they'll cheat any chance they get. Often, they don't even try to hide it. ** **Take Democratic Senator Jon Tester. _Though he represents a red state, he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family, fits Montana perfectly. So, unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating._** _>From a Montana Public Radio story on a state-senate bill:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta435bc0a-58b0-4f39-ad26-6fd90915db6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Smaller parties often win some of the anti-incumbent vote, splitting it up._ **_**So the state senate passed a bill creating a top-two primary regardless of party.** _**_Yet, they only applied this change to one person--Jon Tester. They specifically targeted the only Democrat elected statewide. _****_In other words: Cheating._** [**_We can't let them get away with this or we'll lose a great Senator and control of the U.S. Senate. Will you join us in donating to Jon Tester right now to ensure he runs and wins no matter how much Republicans try to cheat their way to victory?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T941e66bc-bcb5-4251-86a5-25b9c5bc06f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for not letting them cheat their way to victory._ Cliff

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta642e227-878c-4ddd-980a-f6d229057f93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jay Jones
subject: ICYMI: My op-ed in support of voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/0y02H_54qo1IhnhmDwchBngiUFWFWPWv5_EjIIsccQY=)
---
Friend -- I hope you will take a moment to read my op-ed in _The Richmond Times-Dispatch _on voting rights. Virginia should proudly lead in every facet of voting, from election administration to access to the ballot. That's why I'm demanding answers from Glenn Youngkin on why he's effectively ending voting rights restoration and that Jason Miyares protect Buckingham County voters from Big Lie conspiracy theorists.
# [**_The Richmond Times-Dispatch: _Jones: VA must resist efforts to roll back voting rights**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/5Q5Pvav_ut2R3PDEVKFrJ7x_vXA20QPuZAuiS1fsAnE=)
As Virginians, we have much to be proud of. We tout the fact that our country can trace its origins here to Jamestown, that we have produced more presidents than any other state, and that our legislature and governor typically operate in a less partisan manner than other bodies across the country. Despite many ups and downs on our shared Virginia journey, the last several months have been a particular embarrassment. After making significant strides in bringing our Commonwealth's voting scheme into the 21st century with the Voting Rights Act of Virginia and other companion legislation, Republicans in the General Assembly filed, voted on, and passed numerous bills to walk back the work that skyrocketed Virginia from [49th to 12th in ballot access](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/P1-Tw5g5Q29c54n91zJVQ-jgFRzk50Jqt3So_b6ZRaU=). Thankfully, a Democratic majority in the senate preserved the positive work accomplished under Governor Ralph Northam. But the story doesn't end here. Just a few weeks ago, Governor Glenn Youngkin's administration altered the policy and considerations under which felons could have their voting rights restored and slowed restorations to a crawl. Disappointingly, Virginia is the [only state](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/ayX_h7-aoOFqKgTzdoHkag8fmfQdYgrdKCCKBl9fEkw=) in which a felony fully disenfranchises a person and the sole authority to restore their rights lies with the Governor. Until Governor Youngkin's reversal under the cover of darkness, previous Republican and Democratic governors had dramatically expanded the restoration process and done so in an open, transparent manner. Then, a [recent report](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/LV1IGP3E1YQY_5gUYAMxAw14mXUFmzL-1s6drSzxpvc=) from Buckingham County recounted that the entire registrar office staff quit amid harassment from the local electoral board and residents who promote President Trump's Big Lie: that the 2020 election was improperly stolen (a claim which is without any merit). The departures left the rural jurisdiction with no way to register to vote or certify candidate paperwork just before the filing deadline. This is not only a shock to the system, but completely undermines our democratic processes. All of these instances leave a stain on Virginia's reputation as a place that embraces democracy and encourages participation in our electoral process. I have family members that can tell stories of being denied the right to vote only a few decades ago. I was proud to vote for electoral reforms in 2020 and 2021 in the legislature because I knew my ancestors had given blood, sweat, and tears during their lifetimes to achieve these small measures of progress. Still, if Governor Youngkin intends to take us backward, he needs to publicly state his standards for restoration, explain the changes, and share what drove the policy change. I pray there is nothing nefarious behind his decision, but we all remain in the dark until he tells Virginians why he changed the policy. Transparency remains critical in every aspect of government and voters across Virginia are owed an explanation for his covert action. Moreover, our Attorney General must step in to rectify the situation in Buckingham County immediately. When I sought my party's nomination for Attorney General in 2021, I [proposed](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/DmsAmfjX3Zl2Mbt7aCgYbKd60Yb4xXKv3gJq8PQuhl4=) a Voter Protection and Election Integrity Unit for this very purpose. Virginians need to know that not only are our elections secure, but that our election officials can operate without fear of harassment or intimidation. We should all be troubled that the Attorney General has not reassured us that our electoral processes remain safe. What happened in Buckingham County can happen elsewhere without intervention and proper leadership. Unfortunately, we are also saddled with a House of Delegates that holds a regressive view of voting. Legislators of the Governor's party purportedly [profess support for second chances](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/S0_va1mw3bVQC2tY1QBL7rA2pqSyejaKUOi2sTNhiAk=), but remain silent as the Governor punishes citizens well after they've paid their debt to society. Moreover, many Republicans tell advocates and constituents that they support an easier process to restore voting rights but stand idly by as their colleagues [kill bills](https://act.myngp.com/el/mNlGNW5eLi7pQEA4e-n68YWb3bv3mOkg58d_zNhjIeA=/865q9EARrc27jcpP398Ncc8Ifa1df4_LHSi62urLESk=) to remove the Governor's authority to determine who gets to vote. Virginians deserve courageous legislators who aren't afraid to buck their party when the going gets tough. The right to vote makes our country special - it is sacred and not to be taken for granted. Although we all make mistakes along the way, faith, compassion, and a commitment to an inclusive process should carry the day. Virginia should proudly lead in every facet of voting, from election administration to access to the ballot. Absent action from our current set of elected leaders, we can only regain our place at the front of the pack by voting for individuals who will stand up amidst the noise and put our voices - Virginia's voices - first. \- Jay

clean_body: | | | = Friend -- I hope you will take a moment to read my op-ed in The Richmond Times-Dispatch on voting rights. Virginia should proudly lead in every facet of voting, from election administration to access to the ballot. That's why I'm demanding answers from Glenn Youngkin on why he's effectively ending voting rights restoration and that Jason Miyares protect Buckingham County voters from Big Lie conspiracy theorists. = As Virginians, we have much to be proud of. We tout the fact that our country can trace its origins here to Jamestown, that we have produced more presidents than any other state, and that our legislature and governor typically operate in a less partisan manner than other bodies across the country. Despite many ups and downs on our shared Virginia journey, the last several months have been a particular embarrassment. After making significant strides in bringing our Commonwealth's voting scheme into the 21st century with the Voting Rights Act of Virginia and other companion legislation, Republicans in the General Assembly filed, voted on, and passed numerous bills to walk back the work that skyrocketed Virginia from =. Thankfully, a Democratic majority in the senate preserved the positive work accomplished under Governor Ralph Northam. But the story doesn't end here. Just a few weeks ago, Governor Glenn Youngkin's administration altered the policy and considerations under which felons could have their voting rights restored and slowed restorations to a crawl. Disappointingly, Virginia is the = in which a felony fully disenfranchises a person and the sole authority to restore their rights lies with the Governor. Until Governor Youngkin's reversal under the cover of darkness, previous Republican and Democratic governors had dramatically expanded the restoration process and done so in an open, transparent manner. Then, a = from Buckingham County recounted that the entire registrar office staff quit amid harassment from the local electoral board and residents who promote President Trump's Big Lie: that the 2020 election was improperly stolen (a claim which is without any merit). The departures left the rural jurisdiction with no way to register to vote or certify candidate paperwork just before the filing deadline. This is not only a shock to the system, but completely undermines our democratic processes. All of these instances leave a stain on Virginia's reputation as a place that embraces democracy and encourages participation in our electoral process. I have family members that can tell stories of being denied the right to vote only a few decades ago. I was proud to vote for electoral reforms in 2020 and 2021 in the legislature because I knew my ancestors had given blood, sweat, and tears during their lifetimes to achieve these small measures of progress. Still, if Governor Youngkin intends to take us backward, he needs to publicly state his standards for restoration, explain the changes, and share what drove the policy change. I pray there is nothing nefarious behind his decision, but we all remain in the dark until he tells Virginians why he changed the policy. Transparency remains critical in every aspect of government and voters across Virginia are owed an explanation for his covert action. Moreover, our Attorney General must step in to rectify the situation in Buckingham County immediately. When I sought my party's nomination for Attorney General in 2021, I = a Voter Protection and Election Integrity Unit for this very purpose. Virginians need to know that not only are our elections secure, but that our election officials can operate without fear of harassment or intimidation. We should all be troubled that the Attorney General has not reassured us that our electoral processes remain safe. What happened in Buckingham County can happen elsewhere without intervention and proper leadership. Unfortunately, we are also saddled with a House of Delegates that holds a regressive view of voting. Legislators of the Governor's party purportedly =, but remain silent as the Governor punishes citizens well after they've paid their debt to society. Moreover, many Republicans tell advocates and constituents that they support an easier process to restore voting rights but stand idly by as their colleagues = to remove the Governor's authority to determine who gets to vote. Virginians deserve courageous legislators who aren't afraid to buck their party when the going gets tough. The right to vote makes our country special - it is sacred and not to be taken for granted. Although we all make mistakes along the way, faith, compassion, and a commitment to an inclusive process should carry the day. Virginia should proudly lead in every facet of voting, from election administration to access to the ballot. Absent action from our current set of elected leaders, we can only regain our place at the front of the pack by voting for individuals who will stand up amidst the noise and put our voices - Virginia's voices - first. \- Jay | = = | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones Friends of Jay Jones PO Box 2892 Norfolk, VA 23501 United States =

subject: Sean Hannity: Biden fires warning shot for retirement accounts...
body:
He's warned you that he plans to raise:

| | | **Biden Fires Warning Shot...**
---
**Biden Fires Warning Shot...**
---
Biden's not holding back... He's warned you that he plans to raise:
* Income taxes
* Death taxes
* Capital gains taxes
* Corporate taxes

Friend, **_I want you to know where I stand._**

When Washington elites treat police officers like criminals and criminals like victims, **_crime rates rise._**

I've consistently supported law enforcement and opposed radical demands to defund and disrespect the police. **I voted against legislation that would release violent offenders from jail early.**

I've supported **common sense reforms** to **reduce violent crime** by getting dangerous predators **off our streets** and **away** from innocent victims. As we've seen, one of the best ways to combat crime is ensuring that law-abiding citizens can defend themselves.

That's why I've **supported the Second Amendment** at every turn and protected the right of my fellow Louisianians to bear arms.

The **open border** has also **allowed criminal gangs** and **deadly drugs** to flood into our country. I've visited the U.S.-Mexico border myself, **_and it 's clear that we must secure that border if we're going to make our communities safe again._**

I won't stop battling to make that happen.

If you agree that we need to treat criminals like criminals and protect the hard working people of America, **[click here](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9d26bc35cbd4614b41c6f243aa562d3&_e=yzzHw-g5HOLHKc0kVQbo1BlBAx37JIDOxlH1HkXfi_-ywmG4aA5GoLfPzn3Du34Pe6R9jk07jl-75j5yKywYN3DeAqX0HrY6hu_YQVJgB6y8hT6VYIM-06MR9qu0SniwnvVyyBKYvdstXbs65oeX62wEqashF0xMNg2WWIaSE4SyMXiYe-KnBjGQxKxlgZ3AqP2t7AmeOgqqSoIfESKiu06l_s74qjTDXEY07e6Sb4lVi3_xwTyOSCBfqtJtdU78ZIfEkjelirZPjUakofR-Pdf07ASmIggiNXwxHpIUqE67-MM3IusTt3rWLSsVeueGsb8OcrHretRL_1KOHshfZv-W-wEmz2DkgmTZsn_2DDG7CE31yI5iLqHfEh_480mOU1gsoUqkHyw8wwcLDASROiNC4aFTeJPLao3_sJvDT1Q4pUyWZit5mdarjhYuFdkyj8b-PkzfBFuEFN_gYYOO1TcNJLO7nw9HTQe8i5rPMKP_-s2Yp4lzeJZZojSRtnVb)**.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=689955d556c145b897602460a7abb0a3&_e=Nzl7oLkPw2MVeKst4cxuvC3UQ6ym5GuBzLZpCZP2ClB7b572jOWegkGKGQU6Wj3IyxJ8McROa0E9S7ffqwFkSLMlVhX0oRO4pAb180eny4k5dR2JUp5IRAn0uSbhqN5mQsODPcKO0jXBOrKNURtg3HcgpzEp5AP8PZoQRrcLSbTfyozKKO_WROkBEBiQpcsTSRVBFvRyR_07KnYj8Z4fPv29clmWHRp9_rz_xgg-bE5vQSpwUU37NAQWKsNaUpRdDKklttcdX-Z8Fu1lc6CHvw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? clean_body: There is a disturbing trend on the left | | | Fellow American, There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. Thank you for your support, Riley Gaines | | Paid for by the Nine PAC | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3bdc47760c13432c81ec11006c221f66&_e=pXeKBa8bwUu_hepvvrKe2tCf_urFnV07Kt0fe1ZDy-n4jSVOzN8IwH4w2ZsrByAzRLdzLxFjS5w3jnINO_4rchsl6_gdID8c1gdfIU7djmgsdUI1xc76iMnsYXaWdy56fGlD-FAIQM8pv-cgqJ5NRJ0Gw8e4M_EstlKE2fFkkXkf29Y6_-g3FOkjoC4akO3-qBxCFDOF67HgXCsuqESfJGZs7TgEcHaoxVHCZb_WALUr1mrknXmVKK3A3URz23w4paPXCToSu34q-7rX_yWqodrBbFWo2Tpiaa7ic_80ZktD4RU3_YmqI1jqruFpSmsFnmFUyVpHc0WJ99M8WRG6nVHYBXYSqC0LCQOv2dQ2J4uGF-C_NFxTNSIwIv3pakm7)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---

clean_body: The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | | | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021... to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country. The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend? Here is the pledge ... | | " I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school." | | | | Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - and kids deserve better - | | | | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include... | | Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds AFC Fellow Corey DeAngelis Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr. | | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, and we need your voice. If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.** | | | | Thank you, Digital Team American Federation of Children | | | | | | | Paid for by American Federation for Children Contributions or gifts to the American Federation of Children are not tax deductible as charitable contributions. | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | Please see a brief message from the American Federation for Children (AFC): This is a prospecting message not affiliated with this list and is not meant to be an endorsement or opposition towards AFC | | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Take back the US House!
body:
To win a congressional seat, it's important to build a strong campaign strategy. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/take-back-the-us-house-9566903?e=16d812e81c)
---
# The House majority runs through the 4th!

Meet Jane.
She's a hardworking single mother who's struggling to make ends meet. She worries about the quality of the water her family drinks and the high rates of incarceration in her community. She's also concerned about access to affordable healthcare for herself and her children.Jane deserves a representative who will listen to her concerns and fight for her family's well-being. She needs someone who will stand up for women's rights, work to improve healthcare access, and push for prison reform. She needs a leader who will make sure that the water her family drinks is safe and clean.
Unfortunately, Jane's current representative is not that person. He has repeatedly voted in favor of corporate interests and the Republican Party, even when it goes against the needs and wishes of his constituents. When Jane tried to speak with him about these issues, she was ignored. He only seemed interested in serving his party and special interests.
But you can make a difference. With this Democratic candidate for Michigan, you have a real opportunity to stand up for the rights and needs of everyday people like Jane. By fighting for women's rights, healthcare access, prison reform, and clean water. We can help make a real difference in the lives of our community.Joseph Alfonso can be the voice that Michigan needs to represent its people. Let's work together to make Michigan a better place for all its residents.
| [Show your support!](https://josephalfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=da817fb706&e=16d812e81c)

name: Election Day Alerts
subject: Voter ID Petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
| You need an ID to do almost everything in America - but not to vote?
Elections across the country are just months away, and we STILL don't have nationwide VOTER ID.
It's insane.
[**That 's why we're asking you right here, right now to answer this one question: Do you support voter ID in EVERY state across the country?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581171:6CU4L0GNT:m:1:3371812801:94CBA36EC61F47148C47183DF5AF62C7:r)
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581171:6CU4L0GNT:m:1:3371812801:94CBA36EC61F47148C47183DF5AF62C7:r)
---
| [ **YES - DEMAND VOTER ID** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581171:6CU4L0GNT:m:1:3371812801:94CBA36EC61F47148C47183DF5AF62C7:r)
---
| [ **NO - NO ID NEEDED** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581171:6CU4L0GNT:m:1:3371812801:94CBA36EC61F47148C47183DF5AF62C7:r)
---
We need to protect our elections. We need voter ID IMMEDIATELY before it's too late.
[**Please answer now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581171:6CU4L0GNT:m:1:3371812801:94CBA36EC61F47148C47183DF5AF62C7:r)
Our elections won't be secure unless something is done.
| |
---
