name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Fight for small and family-owned farms
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1728027?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Picture this: a cherry-red barn surrounded by clucking chickens, wandering cows, bleating sheep, and mud-covered pigs basking under the sun. Fields brimming with fresh tomatoes, leafy greens, and assorted fruits and vegetables. Now imagine this: **bleak stretches of depleted soil** \-- a single crop as far as the eye can see. Pigs and chickens crammed into cages so small they **_can’t even turn around or spread their wings._** **Calves RIPPED away from mama cows.** Unsanitary conditions ripe for breeding new diseases. **Which of these farms should Congress be promoting?** Sustainable, family-owned farms or the cruel, industrial operations owned by megacorporations? Right now, factory farming corporations are dominating small and family-owned farms to the detriment of our communities, animals, and the planet. **_YOU can help change that_** \-- Congress could pass the Farm System Reform Act and transform our agricultural system away from one that values profit above all else. **[Please, Friend, take immediate action to FIGHT factory farms and PROTECT people, animals, and the planet from corporate greed!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1728028?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1728029?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Factory farms are often located in Black, brown, Indigenous, and low-wealth communities where they **POLLUTE the air and water, MISTREAT workers, THREATEN wildlife habitats, and DUMP animal waste into fecal lagoons.**
**There is no excuse for Congress to continue supporting this TOXIC industry.** That’s why this bill is so important, Friend. Your Members of Congress need to hear from you! **[Tell your representatives by 11:59pm TONIGHT: REIN IN corporate factory farms and STOP the pollution and animal abuse NOW!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1728030?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1728029?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Picture this: a cherry-red barn surrounded by clucking chickens, wandering cows, bleating sheep, and mud-covered pigs basking under the sun. Fields brimming with fresh tomatoes, leafy greens, and assorted fruits and vegetables. Now imagine this: bleak stretches of depleted soil \-- a single crop as far as the eye can see. Pigs and chickens crammed into cages so small they can’t even turn around or spread their wings. Calves RIPPED away from mama cows. Unsanitary conditions ripe for breeding new diseases. Which of these farms should Congress be promoting? Sustainable, family-owned farms or the cruel, industrial operations owned by megacorporations? Right now, factory farming corporations are dominating small and family-owned farms to the detriment of our communities, animals, and the planet. YOU can help change that \-- Congress could pass the Farm System Reform Act and transform our agricultural system away from one that values profit above all else. == | == Factory farms are often located in Black, brown, Indigenous, and low-wealth communities where they POLLUTE the air and water, MISTREAT workers, THREATEN wildlife habitats, and DUMP animal waste into fecal lagoons. There is no excuse for Congress to continue supporting this TOXIC industry. That’s why this bill is so important, Friend. Your Members of Congress need to hear from you! == == Standing with you, Chloë Waterman Climate-friendly food senior program manager, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4v82ento52ohgd4gcjcm9407hjhjc71g9n5hdro_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5kqhm8b07si0nmue96ng8ovc766t9hrre5hqs8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeqilp1g0emccqfiha0054a8acn6e8vtq0pom2v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlr02vnsik9gn5mtm88hr71ndqo7o1c9jllao1i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za1v2bet2csh9smn05otmt269jric9lr4chqpmbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hsq55oubjvuprls00r3cusr17ganafss0hse2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbb581r9sjihqn048q9pr0ol92qdcevuo2gr2lmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcd19q7vek70v9j2ek1l659b3kgae4lvj4qadkr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgm0ug0a744bo02scktveu93jpe5fothuvjttagg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z589im6gu4f2shrgtlvthdlmp3bb5k28qmnvttp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlb7gjgjoihh5fslkjqedf6125f1evtdnoemdl6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1geeor4cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvk1dint5bdqh7htcik4o2c0qpn2jk4v2d1ojp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zppsatv2kr8d3dlvo5e4r3ln032tperk3lu77lm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl0c929rkdum2clmhvn3db3vcokqcssrd94e4fdg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd1ptbic78lpg2m8kluuced0og2setdig891buc8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu4s4a85rcabq6egt66uh1kiddppt97akjvgce20_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi3m2i1tui1tbv169fece2pft96qjcokjsqtt4ko_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbnes94f5ni63bc4a8l5jf11lg94onhcbklhtfp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrqac55qghv1q01fqdv21o0671mh17l4v90uffd0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv69sc97nl9qdm92025pkrglnfq6r245qqskh0l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z86fv4uoqqgm4t635vjps6rhe33cs6kptgjb6mt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5p1fuqdg4qsk5cbgk5ugh3thdg5n9uiu82geho8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zddf8u4311av8vkesm3nm65u4dm50f0tpocch2cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmnbsh5ea51v5mdiqh5n7ibidah7pjep8fbvmio8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zicminkbjcaj8a95ap8shlaub1plrpo9okfd0ou0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrbj1b88455rpcoov11j5gvqbuspgm0efcl5mf1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhc6707u359qlkvetntdqpssj59f7vh9egmfff30_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj5ju66hp9k867tdmn9tn5fd12l6k5abts51jse0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Deroy Murdock

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjht044kj3uppfsomni22j5orpdhflqn818o0378_rp22sh2s8i66o74cji69p31c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Faith and Liberty News

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: What? “The Twitter Files?"
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.) Dear Fellow American, In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s free digest of liberty, you'll read about how the “Twitter Files” show that Big Tech and shadowy figures in the government worked together to control the information you and I see online. These revelations link many of the significant political controversies during the Trump-Biden era. They also show how at least one medical professional associated with Hillsdale College was placed on a **“Trends Blacklist”** for presenting **relevant facts** about COVID-19 and recommending a policy shift to save lives and preserve our way of life. But worse, it shows how Big Tech, big government, and state-funded non-profits worked together to **trample on the First Amendment rights** of their opponents and **deny the American people access** to alternative opinions and important news stories. **Have you, or someone you know, been “blacklisted” or warned by Big Tech for sharing their political views online? ** **We want to know.** Please help us understand the views of mainstream Americans on this issue by completing the **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey/](http://trk.libertyledger._5p6zC1RCPV1SB_-g)** Your answers will help strengthen our educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about our nation’s great heritage of liberty—and about the duty of each generation to defend liberty and pass it on to their children and grandchildren. We can succeed with the support of citizens like you who understand the importance of education to liberty. So, thank you again for your partnership and support, and I look forward to receiving your answers to our **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH**. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College |
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTA5LTU3MDliN2QxOWZhNTQwNTQ5MWRmMjQ0NmRkODAyM2IyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/BAagrQCBrq7LDxe-S_aSdA) to unsubscribe.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17729%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ae%2f3vN61jF6QEjmkw1P7yQ&sysid=1)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1euwACJPYkTf%2bqiFuUNB2g&sysid=1)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NC3mQxmlx0JgCUJNBY0xgg&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PDKBeotdN6k5EfnLXGkAHQ&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hPTaPKBl4wJHkqWKSvE22Q&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iB71o1FB3n%2fde3nyjPVhpQ&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kc0fcyM%2fQEbXZKo7Fhm%2byQ&sysid=1)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lh8GR%2bCm4urhkHuT%2b%2fJZQg&sysid=1)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aF70aPDR5ee7Pas5ar%2bAVw&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17738%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZ08RYdFWSSOB1f4RpgfAg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17739%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7LHH58FZx%2bEO85IHSRsm%2bA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17730%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nPfbOvjgdercbrk2a070RQ&sysid=1)

subject: Garland tried to silence parents.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Garland protected Terry instead of your children. | | | [](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b6758b719fbd45e6a25181b31100282c&_e=myTyosSFHAsnr1uoN0cvSznyc-1jkQxHVax7O-_8z5hG9LKEuGycghIBV9TY7uGzvzgiRerqOXQd0htvKXHcJs7CY-1cJnY4t1iPxUjkx6hAargQAcWt4E_PGdedJU1PtJr2DhtWA4bhqxDGh92Tq-iq1dTK1azYmKLOwVV5NP8sAWG9YDYwWvk6p5kcoL6Vrf878jE0mPZ39OHAeFR-BzcuVQp7mdJImxSTBYxr0Cx5rFqoJY9TPVIzNiAVCgzY03hHLmbb4O-KTqU7MinUuA%3D%3D)
---

This is incredible.
---
[](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b6758b719fbd45e6a25181b31100282c&_e=myTyosSFHAsnr1uoN0cvSznyc-1jkQxHVax7O-_8z5hG9LKEuGycghIBV9TY7uGzvzgiRerqOXQd0htvKXHcJs7CY-1cJnY4t1iPxUjkx6hShjgd6WlqrgSdJgj0fl6mLASB9G7BxkvCZqdH1lhtYsD7Nnu9z6BfqyTER1BP56oQg7-P8BdU3XATKGUV-xX7uoQEnIOVWJIShljmEguWSPZVWBjvK0y5vmeIErA5JVJcjNc_86hmimEC7TbLB853vR16zP2_lQqO6lYFqDBaHQ%3D%3D)
---
At a House Judiciary Committee hearing last month it was revealed Attorney General Merrick Garland’s now-infamous memo silencing any criticism of the Loudoun and Fairfax County School Boards had no basis in reality.

Instead, it was aimed at **dispersing the political threat to Terry McAuliffe’s re-election campaign**.

It’s not enough that we have public schools teaching Critical Race Theory, encouraging children to transition against their parent's wishes, and covering up sexual abuse.

We now have an Attorney General using the full powers of the DOJ to **use public schools as a****political tool to aid a fellow party member.**

Public Schools have become just another political tool to be used by party officials with _**our kids in the balance**_.
---

clean_body: Garland protected Terry instead of your children. | | | This is incredible. At a House Judiciary Committee hearing last month it was revealed Attorney General Merrick Garland’s now-infamous memo silencing any criticism of the Loudoun and Fairfax County School Boards had no basis in reality. Instead, it was aimed at dispersing the political threat to Terry McAuliffe’s re-election campaign. It’s not enough that we have public schools teaching Critical Race Theory, encouraging children to transition against their parent's wishes, and covering up sexual abuse. We now have an Attorney General using the full powers of the DOJ to use public schools as apolitical tool to aid a fellow party member. Public Schools have become just another political tool to be used by party officials with our kids in the balance. This is why the fight for Education Savings Accounts goes beyond simply giving alternative educational options to our children. It is a fight for their future. I am asking for your support in making Education Savings Accounts a reality in the Commonwealth. We need your help to convince the Virginia General Assembly that school choice has the backing of Virginia parents. Will you to my petition asking the General Assembly to back school choice? name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18933?t=1001&akid=3159%2E346206%2EVCepcB ][IMG]
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18933?t=1002&akid=3159%2E346206%2EVCepcB ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230419-3159-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3159_346206_VCepcB&akid=3159%2E346206%2EVCepcB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3159%2E346206%2EVCepcB

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zov0b2q0ajjl72qj7cjmt25cuejj5bq83nj7f970_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs55mup22l4spunsfubf226d7qp9l1molt5llgt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9urc459tna2vqs8famncjtm6u5bqrfglvvk7r4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z95384umecnoetj15opas62nin20tbu6u2rkb9mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj71mtvb0stun348e2rcnhqd610ad95i17c0mpu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)

---

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjbeomr5gfe715058ia9p0lrpjq7709j297otot0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6g9pi4178n2gb88519q52418pdfu03nnnpi5l70_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhfn0m2hq1um3e26g9o1qia3j90cgl2up01oa6sg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjh64pr2cdh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Sherrod Brown's a unicorn. One of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. Senator Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed. The jackal who just entered the race to challenge him is going to spend tens of millions of dollars smearing him, and Sen. Brown needs our help.
body:
We can’t lose another Ohio Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1037f1b9-5f1d-40cb-87cc-e4b022b27a66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Not Again. We Can't Let Them Do This Again._** _**Sen. Sherrod Brown's a unicorn. One of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. **__Senator Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed._ _In 2022, private polling had Tim Ryan basically tied with the ghastly J.D. Vance. Then billionaire Trumper Peter Thiel (Vance worked for Thiel) joined McConnell in dumping $50 MILLION dollars in the race, and we lost by 5-6%. _ **_Brown has advantages Ryan lacked, incumbency and statewide name recognition. Yet, they're trying again._** _From Brown's most recent email:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td01271c7-8bbe-4e80-8c07-fe7d2b325b86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The jackal who just entered the race, Bernie Moreno, will spend tens of millions smearing Brown. We can't let him do it unanswered._ **_In fact, Moreno endorsed Trump for President--AFTER he was indicted, and Trump already offered Moreno support_**. **_Moreno will ban abortion, put AR-15s in teenagers' hands, attack our elections and deregulate trains even after that toxic crash caused a public health crisis in the Ohio region. He's JD Vance in a Bernie Moreno mask._** **_Folks, if we lose Sherrod Brown, we won't get another like him from Ohio. We're sick & tired of the Kyrsten Sinema's. Brown's been her polar opposite, never forgetting he represents us. Losing him would be a tragedy._** [**_If we dig harder this time, we can combat their tens of millions, get Brown the resources he needs. Will you join us RIGHT NOW, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Sherrod Brown?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T404f68de-30ae-4b81-abab-7c175801f281/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for keeping Moreno far away from Washington._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T608eebf1-b426-4663-b5ba-5f9576245230/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Three chances →
body:
In less than one month, we have three crucial special elections that could determine chamber control. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OKjWyOUHaITxdUx5IZ2CWs75BxyIQZWGOCnLo52eV_jmul-Wy6x9J9b-LROGKxyhMPOQY8weRcKRPJiZgS-nNG-Cp8oO-K0YyHeAtyYV8wOtqxzIpJcLPQcGmGrqMc6DpE-AL8kTPcwp1CEC5y5XDn23cbtSqoND5iu5jI8GON2YSt_sAckZAWWPzI6I2bXo8R9VSfkh3NauQlyF8xfneJJwrEOMCWZvCHpQMxGl9cDfye7iUo6P2G5aTfRAyV237l21VuFaE6YtI5iYK6RqWvq50qWGB7ke-Zo2Z8SjsHuNsS6IOuCNaBUr9OlpjFN_juMXlVIXh-P97FlaMAsC7ofsiFGldt_n6dyQj76jBFFC4RUpOCal7COqa9aOxbCMIg/3vh/VSpPAqlmQqyg0h5ODB5xoA/h0/25GFXbsTm6SOlZvzXTWA0PtvJax7Y5KaxfW6N7v7udY) **In less than one month, we have three crucial special elections in chambers with _razor-thin_ margins!** _In Pennsylvania, a Democratic majority is on the line._ There are two races that could determine if Democrats keep their majority in the House. If Republicans win both of these seats, the Pennsylvania House will flip to Republican control. _In New Hampshire, it’s essential that state Democrats expand our current margin._ We must prevent the GOP from gaining a stronger majority in the New Hampshire House. [Grassroots donations go towards electing state Democrats across the country and building Democratic power in legislatures. Can you be one of the supporters we need from your state to chip in $7? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OKjWyOUHaITxdUx5IZ2CWs75BxyIQZWGOCnLo52eV_jmul-Wy6x9J9b-LROGKxyhMPOQY8weRcKRPJiZgS-nNG-Cp8oO-K0YyHeAtyYV8wOtqxzIpJcLPQcGmGrqMc6DpE-AL8kTPcwp1CEC5y5XDn3HBlqgn__JYKthD1hO22e7XQ3ByqRlM7Hi9uKe7OjQJBxLJzATkZ-1JOsOtPpF2kzcJiEdn86MeXVkUPibeYyvvQ8emaBzxt4JUWveXpha7GMukqKlrPRgSgQYD_YAWHipaoN0ipfnNbJBVeKb89Shq3wMVOsLiw_C7GPyR27ZnnfM66Eh6ir8K3JKv-mboyNQ0lUMjNtSA99Pe6YPs6iA-DSV3j-C6mYcKwTRmITncQ/3vh/VSpPAqlmQqyg0h5ODB5xoA/h1/kxVttdOLY2F68P8ICo9s5Cr6gVefmMc2o8DV-Mb49ec) Losing these races means Republicans in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire will be one step closer to passing extreme legislation that makes it harder to vote, access an abortion, and enact gun violence prevention. Protecting Democratic-held seats and securing wins in battleground states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire is critical to defending our fundamental rights, protecting Democrats’ electoral path to victory in 2024, and creating progressive change in your community. **That’s why we’re reaching out to you today – these special elections are more important than ever before.** [What do you say? Can you chip in $7 today to help push state Dems across the finish line in races like those in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OKjWyOUHaITxdUx5IZ2CWs75BxyIQZWGOCnLo52eV_jmul-Wy6x9J9b-LROGKxyhMPOQY8weRcKRPJiZgS-nNG-Cp8oO-K0YyHeAtyYV8wOtqxzIpJcLPQcGmGrqMc6DpE-AL8kTPcwp1CEC5y5XDn1okuRJG6XMRNi_pmm7t96jwQsBqPiyadOLcCGJ9PfUHvHFcTgiy6R_bOKgjOFdjmAfdM-PZk5SlbtdjwzJ2mmvTsaY-GoPew6LlnGkT1vzg62RO1G7BkitsWDWiPLFbMMsirBS4mIbp4CEbVQ5gmCRLjENxlY4th9K294c4D3U-YZFcMr09bd9-YRfYso9SdNgbJIwFEa35hWqIQ52WhgBYgYyALVcpu6pR1NQszVaqg/3vh/VSpPAqlmQqyg0h5ODB5xoA/h2/2sCvYqxdXZgrFkSMvQhV9_K6vZx6IUWz22TgrkxnoHs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: In less than one month, we have three crucial special elections that could determine chamber control. | | | | | In less than one month, we have three crucial special elections in chambers with razor-thin margins! In Pennsylvania, a Democratic majority is on the line. There are two races that could determine if Democrats keep their majority in the House. If Republicans win both of these seats, the Pennsylvania House will flip to Republican control. In New Hampshire, it’s essential that state Democrats expand our current margin. We must prevent the GOP from gaining a stronger majority in the New Hampshire House. Losing these races means Republicans in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire will be one step closer to passing extreme legislation that makes it harder to vote, access an abortion, and enact gun violence prevention. Protecting Democratic-held seats and securing wins in battleground states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire is critical to defending our fundamental rights, protecting Democrats’ electoral path to victory in 2024, and creating progressive change in your community. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today – these special elections are more important than ever before. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a part of this team, DLCC Special Elections Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:
1.
Experts
at
FiveThirtyEight
say
that
Nevada
could
once
again
decide
Senate
control,
which
means
so
many
Democratic
priorities
hinge
on
whether
we’re
able
to
defend
this
crucial
battleground
seat.

2.
Races
in
Nevada
are
won
and
lost
by
razor-thin
margins.
The
last
Senate
race
here
came
down
to
just
7,928
votes
–
making
it
the
closest
in
the
entire
country.
Meanwhile,
we
lost
Nevada’s
governorship
by
only
1.5
points.

3.
The
Washington
Post
reports
that
I’m
one
of
the
most
vulnerable
senators
up
for
reelection
in
2024.
Now,
the
GOP
is
coming
after
me
as
a
TOP
target
for
defeat
–
and
national
Republicans
have
already
launched
their
first
wave
of
attack
ads
against
me.
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:
So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Thank you so much, friend. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.
– Jacky Rosen

clean_body: I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend: So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. **[So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now and split $15 or more between me and American Bridge PAC so we can win and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61991706/401936890/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2511-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YWM5MWM5LWIyZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WeS27W0NthPNcyT2fN1AhvYqSJHf9vqd6qaGedcEob0=)**

| | | For years, Fox News has been stoking the fires of extremism and hatred, and spewing lies nonstop. And now Fox has been forced to pay nearly $800 million because of those lies, and admit that what it said was BS. **[But Fox needs to pay more -- a lot more](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5746761-03fb-4381-88a4-ecb2101e2033/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). We need to pressure Fox advertisers to drop Fox. No company should be helping fund their lies and the liars who tell them.** [**Add your name, demand that Fox advertisers cut their ties NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb01847e6-0917-4ef1-b206-290be914be97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It's the right thing to do, and if these advertisers give a damn about their fellow human beings and their country, they'll do it. And even if they don't care about those things, we know they care about lost sales. So let's show them there will be a whole lot angry consumers if they don't adjust their ad budgets accordingly. [**Sign now: Tell Advertisers to Dump Fox News and stop funding lies >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb15c04d-da77-4b26-a527-cc9ddad8673b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Tennessee Voter Project Endorses Debbie Helsley for Knoxville City Council
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
April 19, 2023
Dear friend,
TVP is pleased to endorse Debbie Helsley for Knoxville City Council At Large Seat B.
Debbie has called Knoxville home her whole life and has poured her energy into giving back to her community for decades. Debbie is a former union president and neighborhood organizer. I believe fully that she will carry the same energy into elected office to fight for a Knoxville that represents every neighborhood, background, and zip code.
JOIN TVP IN SUPPORT OF DEBBIE HELSLEY FOR KNOXVILLE CITY COUNCIL [bit.ly/tvpforhelsley]
It's clear that Debbie is tough as nails and willing to stand up to special interests. We need someone like her in office to continue building progressive power in Knoxville, the Appalachia, and our state.
Will you help TVP support Debbie's campaign and help boost progressive work in East Tennessee? [https://bit.ly/tvpforhelsley] Half of what you contribute will go directly to Debbie's campaign and the other half will go to turning out voters in the election this Fall.
You can learn more about Debbie at www.debbieforknoxville.com [http://www.debbieforknoxville.com] .
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_“The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.”_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don’t forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party’s only hope at survival._
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good.
---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | | | | | Friend, I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat. My message was simple: “The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.” In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country. Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party. Don’t forget that it was OUR America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the 1980s. The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa. We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory. America First is our Party’s only hope at survival. And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good. | Thank you, Donald J. name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’ll cut to the chase.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581556:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581556:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r "From the bottom
of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r)[**YES >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r)_[**NO >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62581557:JLudb0GkN:m:1:3361486117:910685E727BAE2BBFC6BE08E776D3BDD:r "image")
---
* * *
---
|
---

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. " That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before. But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected.
This election is one of the most CONSEQUENTIAL elections of our lifetime. And with so many laws and policies being passed that directly affect them, they deserve a voice too.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: The gun lobby’s fear mongering is killing our nation’s young people
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This should not and cannot remain the status quo in our country.
#

Friends -
Our country’s young people are being traumatized and killed by gun violence.
In Kansas City, 16-year-old Ralph Yarl was shot in the head after ringing the wrong doorbell when trying to pick up his younger siblings. Now, just like our founder Gabby Giffords, he will face a long road of recovery for the rest of his life.
Just days later in upstate New York, 20-year-old Kaylin Gills was shot and killed after she and her friends accidentally turned into the wrong driveway.
These shootings are the product of years and years of gun lobby fear mongering. They’ve peddled their scare tactics and propaganda to promote a worldview in which everyone is the enemy and you have to take up arms against them. Just last week, the NRA held their convention and spread more lies and fear.
**We cannot become complacent. This should not and cannot remain the status quo in our country.**
Black teens should not have to live with the fear that they will be shot after ringing the wrong doorbell. Young women should not have to be scared for their lives if they drive up the wrong driveway.
Please, continue to stand with us in our fight against the gun lobby as we work towards a future free from gun violence. Our nation’s children, communities, and future generations are depending on us to break the cycle of senseless violence.
\- The team at Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230419-1-15&t=1&akid=5248%2E3935704%2Ezi37Hi)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5248%2E3935704%2Ezi37Hi) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: The verdict is in.
body:
At Courier Newsroom, our dedicated reporters are fighting every day to fact-check bad actors like Fox, deliver high-quality journalism, and restore people’s trust.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)
Peter, the verdict is in:
**Fox News has been ordered to pay a whopping $787.5 million to Dominion Voting Systems** for amplifying conspiracy theories and lies around the 2020 election.
But the consequences of this case go beyond a steep price tag. The reckless, profit-driven actions of Fox News have **damaged our democracy and undermined people’s trust in the news.**
At Courier Newsroom, our dedicated reporters are fighting every day to fact-check bad actors like Fox, deliver high-quality journalism, and restore people’s trust.
[**Still, going up against Fox News isn’t easy, with their massive news network and deep pockets. We’re relying on grassroots supporters to chip in what they can, when they can to power our fight against bad information. Can we count on you to chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3664?refcode=em-20230419&t=2&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)
Here at Courier Newsroom, we aren’t driven by profit or clicks. **We’re driven by the truth,** which is why our reporters didn’t hesitate to share this news as soon as it broke:
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3664?refcode=em-20230419&t=3&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)
**This kind of quick-acting, honest journalism is what our country needs to restore trust in the news and in our elections.**
[**But for them to go toe to toe with media giants like Fox News and fight the spread of bad information, we’re relying on grassroots support from people like you. Please help us keep up this important work by contributing $5 today:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3664?refcode=em-20230419&t=4&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3664?refcode=em-20230419&t=5&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=873_120351_sjaOaF&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=873%2E120351%2EsjaOaF)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

| | Friend, It's another exciting week on the campaign trail and we are officially down to 1 month until Election Day. In 1 month, we will be another step closer to restoring conservative leadership to the Commonwealth that puts the people of all 120 counties first. Come out to any of our four meet and greets this week or tie up those laces and join us for our Super Saturday in Louisville on Saturday.

Here are the great meet and greets we have this week:
* **Wednesday, April 19 - Leslie/Clay County Meet & Greet**
* Location: The Axis Coffee Shop and Gathering Place, 38 Owens Rd. Manchester, KY 40962
* Time: 10:30 AM Eastern
* **Thursday, April 20- Covington, KY Meet & Greet Hosted by Chris Wiest and Rob Sanders**
* Location: Smoke Justis, 302 Court St. Convington, KY 41011
* Time: 6PM Eastern
**
* **Friday, April 21 \- Ohio County Meet and Greet**
* Location: Ohio County Community Center, 130 Washington St # 215, Hartford, KY 42347
* Time: 12:00 PM (Central)
* **Friday, April 21 - Warren County Meet & Greet**
* Location: Embassy Suite, 556 Hub Blvd, Bowling Green, KY 42103
* Time: 5:00 PM (Central)/6:00 PM (Eastern)

I look forward to meeting so many of you as we crisscross the Commonwealth.

Manchester, KY 40962 Time: 10:30 AM Eastern Thursday, April 20- Covington, KY Meet & Greet Hosted by Chris Wiest and Rob Sanders Location: Smoke Justis, 302 Court St. Convington, KY 41011 Time: 6PM Eastern Friday, April 21 \- Ohio County Meet and Greet Location: Ohio County Community Center, 130 Washington St # 215, Hartford, KY 42347 Time: 12:00 PM (Central) Friday, April 21 - Warren County Meet & Greet Location: Embassy Suite, 556 Hub Blvd, Bowling Green, KY 42103 * Time: 5:00 PM (Central)/6:00 PM (Eastern) I look forward to meeting so many of you as we crisscross the Commonwealth. | | This Saturday, join Team Cameron for a Super Saturday in Louisville! We need your help to get out the vote for Election Day! See you on the campaign trail soon! For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron Paid for by Daniel Cameron for Kentucky

subject: Will you join me?

body:
| | | Hi, I hope you and your family are well.

We have a serious problem in our country: The Republican Party is not working for us.

* Republicans vote to suppress the voices of people they disagree with.
* Republicans vote to trash our reproductive freedom and limit the ability of our friends and relatives to live their lives without fear.
* Republicans vote to protect the gun lobby while parents bury children whose only crime was going to school.

[**Together, we can stop them. Will you join me in donating $5 to help Senate Democrats expand their majority in 2024?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230419-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230419-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10475%2E9716520%2EU3AcEL)

When Republicans were in the majority, they confirmed an aggressive number of judges and justices whose prior judicial history reflected a so-called “conservative” agenda that left little room for justice. **Those Republican-confirmed judges and justices were appointed for the rest of their lives, and their harmful impact on our lives is increasing every day.**

In contrast:

* Democrats vote for laws and judges who will lift and protect us.
* Democrats vote to expand economic opportunities for us and educational opportunities for our children.
* Democrats vote to ensure our right to health care and reproductive freedom.
* And Democrats vote to appoint judges and justices whose agenda is _justice_.

[**We need to protect our Democrats in the Senate so they can continue protecting the future of our country and our communities. So please, will you chip in? >> **](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230419-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230419-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10475%2E9716520%2EU3AcEL)

\- Carole

Thanks to Joe Biden, the United States is once again _dependent_ on other countries to fulfill its energy needs – _and now we’re paying the consequences._

Saudis, other oil giants announce surprise production cuts

This far-Left administration _**KILLED**_ our energy independence during its first week in power.

---
**CatholicVote is preparing to sue the FBI if they don’t respond by the legal deadline. We need your help. Read >>>** FBI informants. Tripwires.

Even recruiting “sources” in local churches to report on their fellow Christians.

It sounds like the stuff of movies.

But last week, the FBI admitted this is the reality of how they’re treating Christians in America under the Biden administration.

CatholicVote played a pivotal role in exposing this plot, and now we're ready to take the next step.

body:
Now more than ever, our fundamental rights are under assault by extreme right-wing judges and corrupt politicians. Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick has repeatedly voted against legislation to codify Roe v. Wade, making him personally responsible for restricting access to reproductive healthcare and decreasing funding for family planning centers across the country. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62003322/401971931/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230419mifepristone_ae_actives_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI0MTZlNS1jMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ic1yd5ZusgXJxe7CF6h3dHemdlVYLDVYCN0RtvwDr-w=)

Here’s the deal, folks: __**First:**__ This month, a Donald Trump appointed judge in Texas issued a ruling that overturned the FDA’s 20-year approval of mifepristone — a safe and effective medicine used in medical abortions and managing miscarriages. **__Then:__** Another court allowed FDA approval of this pill, but with massive restrictions. Last week, the Justice Department appealed the decision to fully protect access to mifepristone, urging the Supreme Court to take on the case. __**Now:**__ Our right to safe, legal abortion medication is heading to the Supreme Court. The same justices who struck down _Roe v. Wade_ have the chance to decide the future of mifepristone access. **Now more than ever, our fundamental rights are under assault by extreme right-wing judges and corrupt politicians.** Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick has repeatedly voted against legislation to codify _Roe v. Wade_ , making him personally responsible for restricting access to reproductive healthcare and decreasing funding for family planning centers across the country. **[Fitzpatrick’s anti-choice agenda is extreme, dangerous, and out of step with our district. If I’m elected to replace him, I will always defend your right to choose and access the healthcare you need. name: Team Lateefah
subject: Lateefah will always stand up for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
After a Trump-appointed judge issued this anti-abortion ruling, we have to fight back.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)
A Trump-appointed conservative judge in Texas has issued a ruling that, if allowed to go into effect, could restrict the use of mifepristone, a drug that has been used for medication abortion for over two decades.
This ruling could upend reproductive freedom in our country. Our communities taught the nation how to fight for freedom. And now, we have got to do it again.
National Democrats are calling for the FDA to ignore this extremist ruling and allow continued use of this safe and effective medication _just as it has been used for the last two decades._**Lateefah has fought for the self-determination of women and girls for the past 30 years -- and when she gets to Congress, she'll join the frontlines of those fighting to protect and expand reproductive freedom.**
**[To help us send Lateefah to Congress to fight for all of us, will you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230419-1&refcode=em20230419-1?refcode2=14_1163_B9umL7&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230419-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230419-1&refcode2=14_1163_B9umL7&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)**
This ruling ignores decades of established medical practices and scientific consensus in favor of anti-abortion talking points and conservative fearmongering. It's wrong, and in the face of it **we must continue our efforts to protect reproductive freedom** from the increasingly radical whims of Trump-appointed judges.
That's why Lateefah is going to go to Washington and bring our voices with her — so that young people, vulnerable moms, and everyone who wants to enjoy bodily autonomy have a fighter for us in the halls of Congress.
**[Your support is what will make that happen.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230419-1&refcode=em20230419-1?refcode2=14_1163_B9umL7&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)** Thank you for being part of this team.
Together,
Team Lateefah

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230419-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230419-1&refcode2=14_1163_B9umL7&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=14%2E1163%2EB9umL7)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

It's wrong, and in the face of it we must continue our efforts to protect reproductive freedom from the increasingly radical whims of Trump-appointed judges. That's why Lateefah is going to go to Washington and bring our voices with her — so that young people, vulnerable moms, and everyone who wants to enjoy bodily autonomy have a fighter for us in the halls of Congress. Thank you for being part of this team. Together, Team Lateefah

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: A Teacher for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
Our political system is broken, Peter. If you need proof, visit Markham Middle School in Watts.

I started teaching at Markham fresh out of college, guided by the Jewish value of Tikkun Olam – heal the world. I was eager to work on the front lines to build a better, more fair world – and what better place to start than by educating and inspiring the next generation?

And to be sure, my students were everything we'd hope to see in our nation's future: hardworking, caring, brilliant, creative, and full of energy. (In the interest of full honesty, I'll admit that managing a classroom full of energetic middle schoolers didn't always feel like a gift, but that's on me.)

But for all their promise, so many of my students struggled, often because they were also facing issues well out of their control: income inequality, difficulty accessing health care, racism, food insecurity, environmental injustice, housing instability, a broken criminal justice system, and of course, underfunded public education.

I became a lawyer, and later, I ran for the LAUSD school board to push our schools to better serve all kids in Los Angeles – to remove the obstacles adults have thrown in their way.

But the trouble is bigger than Los Angeles. Every day, all of America's systemic problems show up at Markham Middle School and hundreds of others like it. I've long thought that if our elected officials focused on supporting those kids and creating opportunities for them to learn and to succeed, our entire country would be better for it. But the old guard in Congress lost sight of my students long ago.

It's time for new ideas and new folks ready to lead the fights that matter – not for political parties or corporate donors, but for kids I was lucky enough to teach, and their families, and the millions of kids just like them across the country.

I'm running for Congress because I'm ready for those fights, Peter.I know I'm not alone. Already, thousands of people have joined our movement, and we're growing every day. Together, we can elect a Congress ready to make the bold changes our communities – and our students – deserve.

Nick
