clean_body: Our political system is broken, Peter. If you need proof, visit Markham Middle School in Watts. I started teaching at Markham fresh out of college, guided by the Jewish value of Tikkun Olam – heal the world. I was eager to work on the front lines to build a better, more fair world – and what better place to start than by educating and inspiring the next generation? And to be sure, my students were everything we'd hope to see in our nation's future: hardworking, caring, brilliant, creative, and full of energy. (In the interest of full honesty, I'll admit that managing a classroom full of energetic middle schoolers didn't always feel like a gift, but that's on me.) But for all their promise, so many of my students struggled, often because they were also facing issues well out of their control: income inequality, difficulty accessing health care, racism, food insecurity, environmental injustice, housing instability, a broken criminal justice system, and of course, underfunded public education. I became a lawyer, and later, I ran for the LAUSD school board to push our schools to better serve all kids in Los Angeles – to remove the obstacles adults have thrown in their way. But the trouble is bigger than Los Angeles. Every day, all of America's systemic problems show up at Markham Middle School and hundreds of others like it. I've long thought that if our elected officials focused on supporting those kids and creating opportunities for them to learn and to succeed, our entire country would be better for it. But the old guard in Congress lost sight of my students long ago. It's time for new ideas and new folks ready to lead the fights that matter – not for political parties or corporate donors, but for kids I was lucky enough to teach, and their families, and the millions of kids just like them across the country. I'm running for Congress because I'm ready for those fights, Peter.I know I'm not alone. Already, thousands of people have joined our movement, and we're growing every day. Together, we can elect a Congress ready to make the bold changes our communities – and our students – deserve. Well, now we’re sounding the alarm. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d3V8LMi9s0tGn2l_JWgLq_xb-eiCT5N0tb-QZABWgLk4H7il0uKVqcb8LcZvXwfhkH7g5yBH4JNb1sdlBHeTyMYDHOQFRweP6McJOLPt1L10iWUaXF8muSMIXhkqg3RwxiFzaFvQBABHKMLsQJPqHQkMN-yZV0vtugBVqDB6qWRuhzlt_t85DAOQKUtT37MZ9g21-6stJ37eHgueOyxyOJI/3vh/JTf6vqvDT96pS40gHkblcw/h0/m4AIYhwP3VOoBFf0VYz2G2VxOJoam-TJOTCl5UMjpKY)And of course, Kyrsten Sinema is one of the roadblocks. Sinema has not officially said which way she’ll vote for Su – but we know from her campaign finance reports that she’s taken money from the same corporate interests that are trying to defeat this nomination. ******[That’s why we’re gathering signatures to tell Sinema: protect the interests of working people and confirm Julie Su for Labor Secretary. Add your name here, or if you already have, send to a friend >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8dxLLd-xrUl3TjhhA0B5Oq0OBBmDc6WQcy_jd1hgMq1vwpJKfdmzzaUpTQ1up8iLtiQBxUgduB0xkHdg217LS3B3wUFnksWmo5V9pmHOlb7XpjFgA2v_1G24nxG2U-PqiKXJ1lw23-wuXqqxmwOOnAYeIOfOsBchJwxo4AVZflKsojbIX9BXOQf4B_9ak5HN_aY5nR2DbLMItU8YAv6Vx8Hg/3vh/JTf6vqvDT96pS40gHkblcw/h1/fzjzjjE2HXhXrAyoYmtsTxFD0RmXB9Pt5MuNyxW45e8)** We appreciate your help holding Sinema accountable, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 **–PREVIOUS EMAIL–** Peter – Last year Kyrsten Sinema **joined with Republicans to block one of President Biden’s key nominees in the Department of Labor** because he’d been *too* tough on wealthy corporations like Uber and Lyft that abuse their workers. Now **we’re facing a similar situation with President Biden's choice for Labor secretary, Julie Su**. Su is a champion for working people and not corporate interests– which is why President Biden nominated her, and exactly why Sinema might oppose her. According to news reports, Sinema is not yet saying how she’ll vote. Su is already the Deputy Labor Secretary and served for seven years as California’s Labor Secretary. Su is imminently qualified – but she’s opposed by the same corporate interests that fund Sinema’s campaigns. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d1XmwdJVfe4je8kTyas64xC3TVCFXxxbARVEaSe3IgmHUdxgQRFZKzUHZ73KTOwdt-XlCQwumJLb0mWNOdMbWgrTrzTc2YQp19sqKM7okCaNbVgtro8Bgjild6eaNIRX9NDj7eSU8KrlMVtCwDw3TMZaw6HjFJNaD8uy6dfRQc4EnSXW8DnQ8GFp1e_izlKw2XZ15yvo_K4W5z6r6LtSNlE/3vh/JTf6vqvDT96pS40gHkblcw/h2/sdVBMZXNQ1uCpnQARFPVxdM_Edijzpu3v3LvbsCMmng) **That’s why** **we’re gathering signatures to tell Sinema: protect the interests of working people and confirm Julie Su for Labor Secretary.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d69WVoZGwcv1CfWu0HYoM8OKK5DeUdUJSnT_6L6NG0PUPnFh8WWJX-U8zuHKC3a_ZeSLXX1NCCR3zG6TV4Goqse1iDU-4e2SkgaSstNjhSsAHFFDAi-vNeZ80NCD3psBASncFLoAHx5XZ9JTaNCv8VYi2Cx1w0X9zGbpL2MXKHIBhBBRePxUdxULYjl7gJmGvfJyWtQANta1dc5dtRDKlbI/3vh/JTf6vqvDT96pS40gHkblcw/h3/iC_bmq6xB5P60kLG3402ulxTx10jXQKjZfGcyuSGit8) As the Washington Post reported, Julie Su “earned a reputation as an advocate for immigrants and low-wage workers facing wage theft and other workplace exploitation. She also helped design a law that addressed the classification of workers as independent contractors but received pushback from Uber, Lyft and other tech companies.” Uber previously helped kill David Weil’s nomination at the Labor Department because of the same reason – and Sinema helped them do it. Now, history is repeating itself. **** **[Tell Kyrsten Sinema, it’s time to side with workers instead of the giant corporations that exploit them. Sign our petition to confirm Julie Su as the next Secretary of Labor.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d0vQVS48N8-O_cb4NdByWP35fuwSEk0vb2276gpOOUg8keywMxU2AphXPs2duemqQwi5JmyeGwD2WIU_KvZuNqhHi3M06dpf59WKuNEiaiiY56a7qiqkJDuWyvvDd6nziVnyCvefAmj2DULGd7-adkisRU-I-2bFtiY-2Ystzwc3RAz6dQK746l_14lT_4JrOm3V3RJoTKjdUFMLP20PW3I/3vh/JTf6vqvDT96pS40gHkblcw/h4/lUj-WwqVL_omc2Dfajx7Q69rvRkKyWPwhUbxLZ7Nv94)** Let’s try to get Kyrsten Sinema to do the right thing for once, and then let’s replace her with a Senator we can count on. Together we’ll elect better leadership for Arizona, -Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, USA, Ret.
subject: Battle Plans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
In 2020, VoteVets-backed candidates held the House, took back the Senate, and kicked Trump out of the White House.
#
Derek — Paul Eaton here. Hope this finds you doing well.
Here at VoteVets, we’re putting together our strategy for the 2024 election cycle. And in just a few moments, **[I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to support that work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230419-1-15&t=1&akid=8190%2E3013755%2EGMCGAs) But first, let me explain our approach.
In Military circles, there’s an old saying: “No battle plan survives the first encounter with the enemy.”
That’s good to keep in mind in politics, too.
Over the last few years, it would’ve been impossible to plan for every scenario. But we had a good strategy — build a strong team, and support Veterans and candidates who can win in tough races.
The result? In 2020, VoteVets-backed candidates held the House, took back the Senate, and kicked Trump out of the White House. In 2022, we expanded our majority in the Senate. We did it because we had thousands of people like you behind us.
And to win back the House, hold the Senate, and make sure Trump never sits in the Oval Office again, we need you to step up.
**[So today, chip in your first $3 and support our mission. We might not be able to plan for every scenario, but we’ve got to do everything we can to be ready. Your early support is critical to our success down the line.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230419-1-15&t=2&akid=8190%2E3013755%2EGMCGAs)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.7rciog&refcode=em230419-1-15&t=21&akid=8190%2E3013755%2EGMCGAs)**

I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_t=qv4nbfkt-GCZgcLLSBVG4Jx4JqiDFrUo3OaaaJp0_UvhLMhefmYvvIsb1VkJIjDM25nkAhyUWGBUc2UWlhYuVAtKBYB9Zioa6SZSonnuysQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_t=qv4nbfkt-GCZgcLLSBVG4Jx4JqiDFrUo3OaaaJp0_UvhLMhefmYvvIsb1VkJIjDM25nkAhyUWGBUc2UWlhYuVAtKBYB9Zioa6SZSonnuysQ%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjQ9sPpEVZXuUBonhJ0fEk9AjPAsX7qOQBgRnLDRSybVoKysP91iZz1Ybla8cfvcAsq-RM6kUtFyVwpLE_JYsYryFvj2EiqrnmvBaaSTb-d5BaCjPWBYAlaao2bxVGh2qHEKM_l2FEvX5DgQxL9N4y_w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I am excited to tell you that I have officially launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio!

My name is Bernie Moreno, _and I am NOT a politician._ I’m a political outsider and proud American, entrepreneur and business owner, husband and father, **and I’m running to protect the American Dream for the next generation.[Will you join me?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjfFTZovPru0bHfDXeTmO-ZaPExX1MvjT_5q2dYruwN3iZ8NUOgkoxONq596x2QT5WE1elkQ_WvCvwygc4IV5qyy9GT48tLcUNPFivDzk0NlqoaDalJNBaJ1U6SrfcZ15XQXbp6HhXoclBLwH4AIb57A%3D%3D)**

[** JOIN BERNIE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjcj-57iN7lOQdcAr1HPFITu6XRIK3Aie64vq1jkkX8MmPidQ6zX039eifnKO36P4gaV5wbCK41z7wI8Yb7MFgELMO7P4tP_kWLW5FMigmJ7DoJLdC_PFFr5XQarz8Vni-rNMQGOZI83_dnM__WqiN0A%3D%3D)
My Democrat opponent – left-wing career politician Sherrod Brown – has not only failed to give Ohio the leadership we need, but has supported Joe Biden’s catastrophic agenda that has left America at the mercy of the Chinese Communist Party, Mexican drug cartels, and radical woke idealogues.

**It’s time for new leadership in Ohio, and it’s time to restore a conservative majority in the Senate that can restore American strength, security, freedom, and values.**

This will be one of the nation’s toughest races in 2024, which is why **Pres. Donald J. Trump himself encouraged me to jump in the race.** He believes I have what it takes to win:

I’m grateful and humbled to have this high praise from Pres. Trump, but I’m also going to need you on my team if we’re going to succeed.

[**Will you reject what Brown, Biden, and the Left are trying to do this nation and join me in this fight as a Week One Supporter with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or more today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjvsLfp_feVG_8YdZQSdejytBJJlETwBvUFHaOCJ2xCwpSY513fa96JOD5Yp5kvXEHPiGT5xdRAv8dbf-VHmdJoDqEYx-f7uc5kP71XEzhBjc-zwlENGzSGtR_R0VJPeZwGCObPHDoJhj1xTy-Enwz4Q%3D%3D)

[** BECOME A WEEK ONE SUPPORTER
OF BERNIE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewj4Sz_mITZ8yMCeuj_8wKdDG_s8un2s2ib7uo0ckZrFCR0VmjgXHRjPhvBfUxr1Gg0J5rQgqE7970sk-7D6pahyrA1WUpsI6zxckpD2FwL8KO7sZECyy-zqlEApJNG-HXqyeg_orWHVfz37q99TiGdyg%3D%3D)
At age 5, I came to America with my family from Colombia. I didn’t speak a word of English.
At age 10, I got my first job as a newspaper delivery boy and began learning about the value of hard work.
At age 18, I became an American citizen – one of the proudest moments of my life.

Eventually, I was able to purchase my first car dealership and built it into one of the largest and most successful luxury dealers in the nation. This success also led to me launching another auto-related business from an idea to a $100M+ company.

As an outsider who took advantage of the opportunities and freedoms this country provides and worked hard to start and grow a successful business that could provide for me and my family, **I can truly say I have lived the America Dream!**

Now, the American Dream is on life support and the America I discovered growing up is nearly unrecognizable.

**I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values.**

America gave me everything I needed to get to where I am today, and I believe the most important by product of success is to give back to the country that has offered me so much.

[**That’s why I am running for U.S. Senate, and it’s why I’m asking for your support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjpx5AIYQla99uMbI6G56Crh1v5ogFKZqjqMiguzDLkv_c-2LYio975kvYQvEipwa9sv-Zvp1bId8mpRHOzf8nBOUe9uf-Uz_lm6H9YrxvSsFPP_UBc4fkc5Af1XksfS57g_oHodJAZlHGCwUh_g8Ohw%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0b3384da8de64ababc36ec4b34a9bef1&_e=GMUWZ9f9dGs-4T1QoLCnyEWTwA6v70jb1QFF6tIl5nULVrvAy3z1BJxvgCkqUQmSi8S-p2zZVvR0l-zreenfrF_fH_yrdffzp-Iip3xOX2A2K6IfFIHPiZ4z7dAG8Go_AubivPWBk1OFPGUSLhT8YYE25QcDoQuqygFkmpUvHA739HLw6y81eSFPCdAC-okfTnUnnfKENyWR1P5iYvazVuLHaD3G9KuP_zeciK2wN2wmQtbNtqAOHCJE924tVewjkczpwFQoXyxKu9_PxNj28ORjJ6vPsqEulV1LpmAeXUNwfH1acwF9AWwk4hc9VoSahfj5ReTQDhZcf5-0HkCsDXbXO3BPULKfe7sbdc0WYbfpH1eEX112t1Ontqs0SRoW6Vk1hgGioeGljr4_jCpbYA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values. | | Fellow Conservative, I am excited to tell you that I have officially launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio! My name is Bernie Moreno, and I am NOT a politician. I’m a political outsider and proud American, entrepreneur and business owner, husband and father, and I’m running to protect the American Dream for the next generation. My Democrat opponent – left-wing career politician Sherrod Brown – has not only failed to give Ohio the leadership we need, but has supported Joe Biden’s catastrophic agenda that has left America at the mercy of the Chinese Communist Party, Mexican drug cartels, and radical woke idealogues. It’s time for new leadership in Ohio, and it’s time to restore a conservative majority in the Senate that can restore American strength, security, freedom, and values. This will be one of the nation’s toughest races in 2024, which is why Pres. Donald J. Trump himself encouraged me to jump in the race. He believes I have what it takes to win: I’m grateful and humbled to have this high praise from Pres. Trump, but I’m also going to need you on my team if we’re going to succeed. At age 5, I came to America with my family from Colombia. I didn’t speak a word of English. At age 10, I got my first job as a newspaper delivery boy and began learning about the value of hard work. At age 18, I became an American citizen – one of the proudest moments of my life. Eventually, I was able to purchase my first car dealership and built it into one of the largest and most successful luxury dealers in the nation. This success also led to me launching another auto-related business from an idea to a $100M+ company. As an outsider who took advantage of the opportunities and freedoms this country provides and worked hard to start and grow a successful business that could provide for me and my family, I can truly say I have lived the America Dream! Now, the American Dream is on life support and the America I discovered growing up is nearly unrecognizable. I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values. America gave me everything I needed to get to where I am today, and I believe the most important by product of success is to give back to the country that has offered me so much. I’m not a politician – I’m an outsider. This means I’m not counting on support from lobbyists and special interests to fund my campaign like Sherrod Brown is. I’m counting on everyday Americans like you to help me build a grassroots movement. Ohioans and all Americans need a leader who will put them first and prioritize making our nation safer and more prosperous. Thank you, In Freedom, Bernie Moreno Republican for U.S. Senate Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: DanKildee.com
subject: Mifepristone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Here’s the truth:

**People, not politicians or judges, should have the freedom to make their own health care decisions.**

But sadly, we're seeing extreme lawmakers and anti-abortion activists weaponize the courts to control other people’s lives, health and bodies.

Recent court rulings by Republican-appointed federal judges have threatened access to Mifepristone, a FDA-approved drug that has been available for over two decades. Mifepristone is safe and effective, but extreme judges are now substituting their own political ideology for the FDA’s well-documented scientific and evidence-based review process. While mifepristone remains accessible, this recent decision reminds us that we can’t take anything for granted.

**_[Will you add your name to Dan’s petition today to take a stand for the freedom to make your own health care choices?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62006255/401983157/446647928?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230419_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVmZWIwZS1jNmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqbwqKaT2iR3foMhXW0sZKJE_XHfEF1MaXAvnKacTQ4=&emci=82f2a2cf-c5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9eefeb0e-c6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

Dan recently signed an amicus brief urging the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn the lower federal court ruling and keep mifepristone available for Americans who need it. And in Congress, he’ll always stand up for your right to make your own health care decisions free from interference from the government.

**_[If you agree, will you add your name to our petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62006257/401983159/446647928?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230419_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVmZWIwZS1jNmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqbwqKaT2iR3foMhXW0sZKJE_XHfEF1MaXAvnKacTQ4=&emci=82f2a2cf-c5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9eefeb0e-c6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62006258/401983161/446647928?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230419_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVmZWIwZS1jNmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqbwqKaT2iR3foMhXW0sZKJE_XHfEF1MaXAvnKacTQ4=&emci=82f2a2cf-c5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9eefeb0e-c6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | Here’s the truth: People, not politicians or judges, should have the freedom to make their own health care decisions. But sadly, we're seeing extreme lawmakers and anti-abortion activists weaponize the courts to control other people’s lives, health and bodies. Recent court rulings by Republican-appointed federal judges have threatened access to Mifepristone, a FDA-approved drug that has been available for over two decades. Mifepristone is safe and effective, but extreme judges are now substituting their own political ideology for the FDA’s well-documented scientific and evidence-based review process. While mifepristone remains accessible, this recent decision reminds us that we can’t take anything for granted. Dan recently signed an amicus brief urging the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn the lower federal court ruling and keep mifepristone available for Americans who need it. And in Congress, he’ll always stand up for your right to make your own health care decisions free from interference from the government. — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: CoriBush.org
subject: Cori calls for Clarence Thomas impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Add your name today to join Cori in demanding his impeachment.
#
Peter, breaking news:
**Cori just became the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’ impeachment.**
Justice Thomas shouldn’t hold public office, given his history of sexual harassment and abuse. Even further, he has disgraced the integrity of the Supreme Court with his complete disregard for ethical standards.
[**Clarence Thomas must be impeached from the Court immediately. Add your name today to join Cori in demanding his impeachment.**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-thomas-now/?source=em20230419-2542-a&t=1&akid=2542%2E1082990%2EezU-3a)
**[ADD MY NAME »](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-thomas-now/?source=em20230419-2542-a&t=2&akid=2542%2E1082990%2EezU-3a)**
ICYMI, here is a brief overview of all the reasons Clarence Thomas should not be on the Court:
* Decades of **attacking marginalized communities** while sitting on the highest Court in the country
* Secretly **accepted undisclosed luxury gifts** over two decades from a billionaire Republican mega donor
* **Played a role in overturning _Roe v. Wade_** — and further expressed his intent to overturn court rulings protecting marriage equality
* **Voted against a Supreme Court ruling that would release the Trump administration’s records** related to the January 6th insurrection — which his wife played a role in

**Justice Thomas has proven himself time and time again to be in the pocket of the rich and well-connected.** He has shown he cannot rule with impartiality and his continued presence on the bench continues to damage the legitimacy of the highest court. He has made further disgrace of an already-illegitimate Supreme Court.
[**Justice Thomas must be impeached immediately. If you support Cori’s call for accountability, please add your name to our petition calling for his impeachment immediately.**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-thomas-now/?source=em20230419-2542-a&t=3&akid=2542%2E1082990%2EezU-3a)
**[ADD MY NAME »](https://act.coribush.org/sign/impeach-thomas-now/?source=em20230419-2542-a&t=4&akid=2542%2E1082990%2EezU-3a)**
In order to continue our movement’s push to reform our criminal justice system — we need accountability to be applied evenly to those who so egregiously violate the law. _**No one is above the law**_ including Justice Thomas.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230419?refcode=em20230419-2542-footer&t=5&refcode2=2542_1082990_ezU-3a&akid=2542%2E1082990%2EezU-3a) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

subject: The stay expires at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|

The Supreme Court could rule on the fate of mifepristone, the abortion drug used in over half of all abortions in the United States, any minute now. Last week, Justice Alito put a pause on a previous ruling putting restrictions on access to the drug — but that pause expires **tonight at midnight. ** The Court is likely to act before then, and we need to be ready when they do. Whatever the Court decides today will have ramifications for tens of millions of women across the country. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h63l1wAD3-FtCvzOEbbvuKOxfL3msvNpMGVSUHfmxpEPXfQZlqqhzUAvAakeOz_hl4W93DBSdDsrmdBvkVwjetWZ2CJe0pXWGS1lmeAUMfHru2WWpAsq3fqJyufM1OkXbBmVin4W_qhWD2JzxP5ddPXs%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h61HwKkulrPyBfo_UvoCo5F9G_mSZqpqMXPCCuSw-3xgtWYHx96LrUGNjxlmO0SHvZY3rWkpBwfpmKelq8Osxz7idno5gmkTfg75SR-gNeDBsCiRM81CFUUl8cSaavA-Xb3KfYrNzo1YbhBxfeuLFJZg%3D)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h62fFdJKeY2CrvSrgp7VJGHhryy2s9yfoHh7kBPfU5MJ3EHxXbrAdSxEDxyaY5Aaug0xtRx_GBDPEa7dlvoRZ9ej85Pr9C-zTjcCnEAp2dkWFift4XVUXaDBRaNFa50a912GhN0nGsCqfMnobRexwMOI%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h62oN4NsKI2yPVmKic6YCY2e9jwKZcJ3IzjdlzjBdHV0GAzdt9WrbZaYDLiZWGO8lwBDiQKe3TBFR-6vYi4NxbW83uTGqaBpyOXZIG8RiaENUnfbJVvMoDLGNX14rL7NepnZILuQzvX3Oh1Dj9U4KXY4%3D)** for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h63wnEMaglbG9NxflfDLJPUvzXbNF2tP75xVhH-u3x5bnrgVemqlLRK7AqcM0E0h-6W4KigQLVvGLfqsoK-kayIWD_TVpLu5n3lLvnq34anuB5DNig6TRwzPm0Fj5idLjJc3GNRKlG_L0DD2Zu3bDxqE%3D)** Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9953f96df5034409b4066b365ab0d548&_e=gAv74SsXO7JGHSNpUayMFDZVslpL3Oc3R2cSTucj3XHTVNjMDSHj59sAPgKRWpjIgUcXsDwKr8Sex3zUfHISLMeeCtVhCzPUdezU_Ml3fw9V3y34vYUG8s6RDEfmgO2UNJz_4tNeWuRsr1BHp1S8Wet3YvrtsPg0UYTRRhHdHJVY-RmUCazufJk1_94ryHXL3pA25FOrughleUeXsVYpCRtVq3PvGUEKhzRn4Ld3vuIm4j5yD3NQen9IurWM_0W7A-0lTbF0WavVjTjjUq-h67V7fu6qmIgwA6idnl2ovJwLgzVvq1PHuE8dzSaDba8LpmHWMJC7UDtQkAer5d6V6qJa-t8aH000yWEfz_5CFPJO1P_i7PWFBwu0E0Z8u_cTn5kY23SkaT02gqlam8ENsiY6N4O4LXBZaf0AX-t4wco%3D)** Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2123%2E5257348%2EHSBiXb ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — noted Jewish space-laser enthusiast Marjorie Taylor
Greene just said that I “should be dragged in front of Congress” because
of my work holding Trump accountable on the January 6th Committee.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230419_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2123%2E5257348%2EHSBiXb ]Marjorie Taylor Greene's tweet saying that Adam “should be dragged in front
of Congress” because of his work holding Trump accountable on the January 6th
Committee.

This is all an attempt to somehow undermine Trump White House aide Cassidy
Hutchinson’s testimony before the January 6th Select Committee last year.

As a reminder: Hutchinson revealed that Trump knew the insurrectionists
had weapons, and wanted the magnetometers taken down so they wouldn’t be
forced to give them up. After all, as she testified, the crowd wasn’t
there to hurt him. And as it was happening, he watched from the White
House dining room and refused to lift a finger to stop them.

Greene says that somehow this is all a lie — but that “if Steve Bannon and
I had organized that, we would have won...and it would have been armed.”

Greene is an insurrectionist, a QAnon conspiracy theorist, and a vile
performance artist, which is exactly why she has vaulted to the top of
Republican leadership as one of Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s most trusted
allies.

name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats’ property tax increase
body:
Tax Day is officially behind us! Given the annual stress associated with the government fishing into our pocketbooks, we respectfully refrained from asking for support from our readers during the week leading up to Tax Day. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61719373:W168uiDNC:m:1:2610672541:CA4F8F563DB7EBE187AF3BCFC0D4926F:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Tax Day is officially behind us! Given the annual stress associated with the government fishing into our pocketbooks, we respectfully refrained from asking for support from our readers during the week leading up to Tax Day. But what the Democrats were up to in Olympia last week is a perfect reminder of why our mission at Shift WA is so important. During the last decade, Democrats have increased state spending by multiple digits, raised various existing taxes, and created entirely new taxes. But none of that appears to be enough. **Democrats have now proposed a 20 percent increase in the next budget and - along with the spending spree - a huge new property tax increase.** Adding insult to injury, Democrats are also claiming that they care about affordable housing. Senate Republican Leader John Braun Senator Braun put it succinctly when he wrote, "Raising property taxes would make the affordability crisis in our state worse, lifting the 1% cap on annual growth goes against the will of the voters, and to say it again, state government doesn't need more money. We must do better." **Of course, Democrats have no issue going against the will of voters when it comes to tax increases.** Voters said no to a state income tax, so Democrats circumvented them and passed a capital gains income tax. Voters endorsed a law that limits the growth of property taxes to no more than 1% per year, so Democrats are simply doing away with it altogether. Unfortunately, Republicans in the State Legislature have no say in what is going on with the budget. Democrats have completely shut them out of all negotiations.**Voters holding Democrats accountable by voting them out of office is the only way to put an end to out-of-control taxes and spending.** Holding Democrats accountable requires voters to know what is going on in Olympia. And you can be sure that mainstream media outlets will not inform them of the facts. But we here at Shift WA - as the only conservative media outlets in our state - are making progress in informing more and more voters about what's really going on in their backyard. Our efforts depend entirely on support from grassroots supporters like you. We're behind on our mid-month fundraising goal. **_[Will you help by contributing $50, $25, or $10 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61719374:W168uiDNC:m:1:2610672541:CA4F8F563DB7EBE187AF3BCFC0D4926F:r)_** **_[Your help makes a difference in informing voters.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61719374:W168uiDNC:m:1:2610672541:CA4F8F563DB7EBE187AF3BCFC0D4926F:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61719375:W168uiDNC:m:1:2610672541:CA4F8F563DB7EBE187AF3BCFC0D4926F:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14183555&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW168uiDNC).
---

subject: FW: [PENDING] from Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + | | | Friend,

---
President Trump just released his **LISTENING TO AMERICA SURVEY** to ensure __YOUR_ _VOICE__ cuts through the barrage of attacks and negativity coming from the biased Fake News.
---
But as we were compiling the survey results for the President, our team noticed that you hadn’t taken the survey yet.
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Held for ransom by a violent mob.
body:
Hi, my name is Riley...

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17868%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5fod5tEla6JMqJLoXqQzFA&sysid=1 "Riley Gaines")
---

Hi, my name is Riley Gaines.

_**[And, I need your help to save women's sports.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17869%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mr21CP0gUXCwbV0Q9cHlOA&sysid=1 "And, I need your help to
save women's sports.")**_

When I graduated college last year, I was one of the fastest women's 200 butterfly swimmers in the world and a 12-time all-American.

But in the national championship, I tied with another swimmer down to the hundredth of a second.

**That swimmer was Lia Thomas: a biological male who swam in the men's division the year prior.**

Officials told me they had ONE trophy and ONE spot on the podium.

Both went to Lia Thomas.

And I went home empty-handed.

_**[I knew this was wrong, so I decided to take action for all female athletes.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17860%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bfcDT6AKFQwwNEcAxVX9KQ&sysid=1 "I knew this was wrong, so
I decided to take action for all female athletes.")**_

But this has made me a target of the woke Left. Just last weekend, I was invited to speak at a university in San Francisco, and when I arrived, a group of transgender activists was already protesting the event.

It quickly became a violent mob.

I was shouted down... I was held for ransom... I was assaulted... And, I had to be escorted out of the building by armed police officers.

_**[All for defending women's sports.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17861%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2HSb2E6nYI7%2bZxtR1uJYOA&sysid=1 "All for defending women's
sports.")**_

It shook me to a core, but I can promise you this. I won't back down - even if it means standing up to the activist mob.

If you're with me, I humbly ask you to join my efforts to SAVE WOMEN'S SPORTS:
---
| | [SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17862%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kPhcH3a%2fZF6AsKmh07dIZg&sysid=1 "SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS")
---
We can't let this issue go. We can't let the violent mob win. We must fight back.

Thank you,

Riley Gaines

---
|
---

name: Becca Balint
subject: I just introduced my first bill, the Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62007544/401988471/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlMWZmNS1jYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiKP2mwQy24_HZkzg0Y3u9Z-Ed0OB0VKM5Rhu1h9grA=&emci=37924464-a9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=960e1ff5-cade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, American kids and teens are reporting record-high levels of stress, sadness, and depression. I’ve seen it in my former students, my constituents, and in the kids I’ve spoken with during recent visits to high schools around Vermont. **Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act._That’s why I’m proud to introduce The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act. _** My bill ensures that teachers, school personnel, and students can be trained and ready to assist their peers who may be facing a mental health crisis by:
* Recognizing symptoms of mental health disorders in children and adolescents.
* Referring participants to necessary mental health treatment.
* Identifying signs of immediate mental distress (such as a panic attack) and, upon recognizing such signs, apply mental health first aid tactics.
* Educating participants on the resources that are available in the community for individuals with mental health challenges.

**Peer education is an effective, research-backed tool that we can use to improve the mental health of kids and teens – and I’m incredibly proud to introduce this bill on behalf of young people in Vermont and across the country. ** [**Add your name here to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my very first bill – The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62007545/401988472/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlMWZmNS1jYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiKP2mwQy24_HZkzg0Y3u9Z-Ed0OB0VKM5Rhu1h9grA=&emci=37924464-a9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=960e1ff5-cade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62007546/401988473/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlMWZmNS1jYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiKP2mwQy24_HZkzg0Y3u9Z-Ed0OB0VKM5Rhu1h9grA=&emci=37924464-a9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=960e1ff5-cade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) With kids and teens under immense pressure to do well academically, excel in extracurriculars, get into colleges, be accepted by their peers, be present on social media, and look, act, and perform in certain ways, it’s no wonder that 42% of high school students report persistent feelings of sadness or hopelessness (according to the CDC). Over the past three months, I’ve heard time and time again that teens want to know how they can show up for their friends, classmates, and siblings who are struggling with mental health. **It’s time for us to empower, educate, and equip young people with the knowledge they need to help their peers navigate through tough times. This is just one tool to give people experiencing mental health challenges the support they need, but it is a first step in addressing this crisis.** [**If you support my work to address teen mental health, add your name here to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my very first bill – The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62007547/401988474/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlMWZmNS1jYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiKP2mwQy24_HZkzg0Y3u9Z-Ed0OB0VKM5Rhu1h9grA=&emci=37924464-a9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=960e1ff5-cade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62007548/401988475/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlMWZmNS1jYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiKP2mwQy24_HZkzg0Y3u9Z-Ed0OB0VKM5Rhu1h9grA=&emci=37924464-a9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=960e1ff5-cade-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Thank you, Becca Balint

clean_body: Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act. | | Peter, American kids and teens are reporting record-high levels of stress, sadness, and depression. I’ve seen it in my former students, my constituents, and in the kids I’ve spoken with during recent visits to high schools around Vermont. Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act.That’s why I’m proud to introduce The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act. My bill ensures that teachers, school personnel, and students can be trained and ready to assist their peers who may be facing a mental health crisis by: Recognizing symptoms of mental health disorders in children and adolescents. Referring participants to necessary mental health treatment. Identifying signs of immediate mental distress (such as a panic attack) and, upon recognizing such signs, apply mental health first aid tactics. Educating participants on the resources that are available in the community for individuals with mental health challenges. Peer education is an effective, research-backed tool that we can use to improve the mental health of kids and teens – and I’m incredibly proud to introduce this bill on behalf of young people in Vermont and across the country. With kids and teens under immense pressure to do well academically, excel in extracurriculars, get into colleges, be accepted by their peers, be present on social media, and look, act, and perform in certain ways, it’s no wonder that 42% of high school students report persistent feelings of sadness or hopelessness (according to the CDC). Over the past three months, I’ve heard time and time again that teens want to know how they can show up for their friends, classmates, and siblings who are struggling with mental health. It’s time for us to empower, educate, and equip young people with the knowledge they need to help their peers navigate through tough times. This is just one tool to give people experiencing mental health challenges the support they need, but it is a first step in addressing this crisis. Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: (2) Sean Spicer, Steve Scalise
subject: FWD: I’m parting ways with Newsmax.Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It’s important.

|
---
| | | Hi Friend,

_Sean Spicer didn 't hold anything back when he was at Newsmax_. He spoke the truth to the American People, held Joe Biden accountable, and set the record straight when the Liberal Media swept his failures under the rug.

Now he's charting a new path and turning his attention to the 2024 election.

Sean is absolutely right when he says we cannot afford to be outworked, outsmarted, and outraised by the Democrats. **And now his warning is even more urgent ... **

We just heard House Democrats outraised Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House.

_**[Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq61h1tdhc67qgea1j52tkrdo6gobq1k1jvg4ngo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.")**_

Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It's important.
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6orpljrtdkfa830070hc87e6o2f5kc4iuqu42l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7q4krppgv23gd18jof2c6api4tvrul21iigmch8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50k3pf7luj1lg31c7qukiq41q0n01d7ih4ef3sg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)**
---
Talk soon,
Steve Scalise

* * *
From: Sean Spicer
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fsq2dnhfq0dk1uf2debvpichd44eb7tsgue1og_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "data-amp-placeholder-3-amp-end")**_
Subject: I'm parting ways with Newsmax. Here's what I'm up to now:

Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtsqnaij7clghjmd6fnji1m46t8nd1g4gft0vig_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97r8f763jksdo2u4mnu7q7rqueikle23rj3e5n8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6nva1a6kcghk0gmrajkrrd0209k1q3iak6m8ao_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqel706k30cg81qfdhhvop48dqjetn326kaa5r90_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6vehe4hemk1jm6rp01h50gvgu33dfto0e3su7g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziphoaatdid61pstfk1n0k5q1bqn7n4dvjmo1nao_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7tfae5q4ok2d7uh0vo6oa0rh5o2ledmu4022bl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs)**
---

|
More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81fmm3l8c2v6ijgbuquikifcm6s1qt3i004bktg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj62ob1cph2bs "image")

Friend,
Wow!
Conservative journalist Greg Price reviewed some of the most common history textbooks in our country – and he found that they’re already teaching COMPLETE LIES about me and our America First movement.
_**It’s truly sad to think about how badly the Left is poisoning the minds of the next generation of Americans.**_
Children are learning that they can switch genders, that our Founding Fathers were evil, and that America is an irredeemably racist country.
And now, they’re even being taught to hate the greatest political movement in history that promises to put the American people FIRST. How could anyone hate that?
_But no matter how much the Left tries to rewrite the past, they cannot dictate our future._
We will win back the White House, we will stop the Left’s destruction of our great country, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Defeat DeSantis: Take Away His Power
body:
Gen Z DESTROYING DeSantis
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c8f356d-f6ae-4982-8ec6-236c787ec5b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06a0a2af-e6d1-40d6-a31a-7bd24f580e51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In just the last few weeks DeSantis has been AWFUL: passed permitless carry of guns, threatened to put up a prison next to Disney World for their support of LGBT community, and passed an abortion ban. He MUST be stopped.

We can defeat Ron DeSantis, but we must begin our work RIGHT NOW. GEN Z is the answer – they’re the ones who saved the Senate from Republicans midterms! While the media largely ignores Ron DeSantis’ attacks on democracy, Gen Z is ANGRY. We must support them to FIGHT BACK. [Help us register enough young Democrats to continue the trend of turning Florida blue, and before 2024. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4adbac08-392d-4938-9c5a-279e570ebd3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But it’s not just Ron DeSantis! We can also FLIP THE HOUSE, by registering enough new Democratic voters in districts with the most vulnerable Congressional Republicans. We've identified a dozen key races where your powered donations can make the biggest difference. [Help us flip the seats where Republicans are on defense and are quickly losing a path toward winning. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta014385c-f3ff-4ab2-8112-5b8db6f4e5c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We cannot afford another session with Republicans at the helm. They continue to elect bizarre, unstable candidates; threaten to purposely tank our economy; and pose a very real threat to Social Security and Medicare as we know it. Democrats.com has been on the forefront of grassroots operations but we need your help. We want to focus time and energy on registering Democrats NOW and we must create the necessary infrastructure to bring them to the polls. Young people are fired up. Let's get Gen Z registered! Will you [be a part of the initiative that FLIPS THE HOUSE back to the Democrats and REMOVES Ron DeSantis’ power in Florida?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd0d62ef-45b1-4ffc-bab4-18abe813806c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cf20c91-5fb3-4196-8c30-17a83d25e0f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Sharice Davids
subject: politicians and judges should not have a say in our healthcare decisions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Abortion rights are under attack from coast to coast. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone, setting up a legal battle going all the way to the Supreme Court.

And in state legislatures across the nation, extreme Republicans are doing whatever they can to severely limit or totally ban our reproductive rights. Here in Kansas, Governor Kelly just vetoed an anti-choice bill passed by the legislature.

**Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with our votes to protect our freedoms — _and now’s the moment when we need to double down on the fight._**

**[Can I count on you to chip in before the Supreme Court weighs in on abortion rights for the first time since overturning Roe? clean_body: | Abortion rights are under attack from coast to coast. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone, setting up a legal battle going all the way to the Supreme Court. And in state legislatures across the nation, extreme Republicans are doing whatever they can to severely limit or totally ban our reproductive rights. Here in Kansas, Governor Kelly just vetoed an anti-choice bill passed by the legislature. Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with our votes to protect our freedoms — and now’s the moment when we need to double down on the fight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = No one should be forced to let a politician or a judge make life-altering healthcare decisions for them. Fellow Conservative,

I am excited to tell you that I have officially launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio!

My name is Bernie Moreno, _and I am NOT a politician._ I’m a political outsider and proud American, entrepreneur and business owner, husband and father, **and I’m running to protect the American Dream for the next generation.[Will you join me?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSFuv4-Fk07lBHCnFcmVZ_z076fZLCU_GuuQcfO-HrwqBJK6Di0seMxrD6Czv5_sPJEp4QpVh_rX0v9cHdWJMKQ0fVC8EeyfXdH3zk3GxrBGjVYvchVVdpfi1qXEJDR4zR2a-l48OuuqzNKcqGV5zfeXkcIkJVQCiPzn3j89CxkybE%3D)**

[** JOIN BERNIE ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSFynefEOlCgDexbfA0oZwYFHgeeuxBBFV-81SL73_-89soGfHiR8JnsfC_7DfxxxpPdDh4Sp0934nUvON_Sg964M1DdaH2moSBc6toaunGlBMCwrjYCXS-h5oEiiZk0r8gj8GJkwcvOI9xrq9j8La5M_xkI8wQsYIhAy-nf3W5pD8%3D)
My Democrat opponent – left-wing career politician Sherrod Brown – has not only failed to give Ohio the leadership we need, but has supported Joe Biden’s catastrophic agenda that has left America at the mercy of the Chinese Communist Party, Mexican drug cartels, and radical woke idealogues.

**It’s time for new leadership in Ohio, and it’s time to restore a conservative majority in the Senate that can restore American strength, security, freedom, and values.**

This will be one of the nation’s toughest races in 2024, which is why **Pres. Donald J. Trump himself encouraged me to jump in the race.** He believes I have what it takes to win:

I’m grateful and humbled to have this high praise from Pres. Trump, but I’m also going to need you on my team if we’re going to succeed.

[**Will you reject what Brown, Biden, and the Left are trying to do this nation and join me in this fight as a Week One Supporter with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or more today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSF0D5PPzrq2WcYrQj8smU-vvj_MmYfb5u2-ZWoiZxk_XAbrf8wf_LnGIxNS8Tojku5Q1cZNTIEkaeCQJriPo7ykrYAc31DlZmwSkma02gvJM-SByGNMwyHx6CFf__TNptR5AyaFptf_uqpiwok4w-UqLCvbX75VWvsR2rUqCEq1Ds%3D)

At age 5, I came to America with my family from Colombia. I didn’t speak a word of English.
At age 10, I got my first job as a newspaper delivery boy and began learning about the value of hard work.
At age 18, I became an American citizen – one of the proudest moments of my life.

Eventually, I was able to purchase my first car dealership and built it into one of the largest and most successful luxury dealers in the nation. This success also led to me launching another auto-related business from an idea to a $100M+ company.

As an outsider who took advantage of the opportunities and freedoms this country provides and worked hard to start and grow a successful business that could provide for me and my family, **I can truly say I have lived the America Dream!**

Now, the American Dream is on life support and the America I discovered growing up is nearly unrecognizable.

**I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values.**

America gave me everything I needed to get to where I am today, and I believe the most important by product of success is to give back to the country that has offered me so much.

[**That’s why I am running for U.S. Senate, and it’s why I’m asking for your support.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSFGaXil1mjcf4SIC4edtHQ3Or8_XRuDoCLRhSHaRmcgOXQY446P5CIhjcHe8163m5QJPWVHi8B23WLx6GfQ6kWM9s9ZKCoBvjAceafvk292-iEW2tC6jmvHfcik-lsC83ODKr_gNEgFqlyneFbMRqmHoh52rd5MNq_qMV_DAhHRfk%3D)

[** BECOME A WEEK ONE SUPPORTER
OF BERNIE ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSFabKFBKvyWrf7VTdpoMg2Vr86eWSuYBqWfCEPvvtLPB6SKM6S1LQlLTOmDW-SC0kVPeF8cRj1F0wB3ryTYcoslzX8kMkmUtmuFQCJKs3QNR0yzPRVZhgEMgds08MrrZkoXw5Vn6yXNrkQ1xpoF_0I7CFbt1oiOQRPLUyVBx2MQAI%3D)
I’m not a politician – _I’m an outsider._ This means I’m not counting on support from lobbyists and special interests to fund my campaign like Sherrod Brown is. I’m counting on everyday Americans like you to help me build a grassroots movement.

Ohioans and all Americans need a leader who will put them first and prioritize making our nation safer and more prosperous.

[**That’s my commitment to you, and now I’m asking you to make a commitment to support my fight. Please don’t wait to join us – jump in as a Week One Supporter with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or more, and let’s restore the America we’re all dreaming about!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=534f3c1337084dcbb989d566e95d533a&_e=C-iLKYXvm_s8SYdf86cRJYymFegUgtcyLHLXkvufOb7X9UzTqa5R7D_g8V-ItHIbxX8VExn9-dI9dC5b3yJMZHMxDhG8VbdCa9-MLZkWVEn73QY4icXLH6SsvpoQ5JRzLtEALtSRjuuXljtlpY3UKfDkXsADL-OCvx9Eck4btK58L2knI6v16EAj-leEbaBaskZ6tiGSamBeqaoBZgaKfgDDwJLdpP5XMo3DN3GK_t5MXMXSuCwagwJSv0OeKVSFDkcxa_dKJxg3SAOeSGLTNnKVtYwsPXyfHpk937XO1IVj3b3qIKfreXDz4GMXsIl54445medqfMwB2mKYpKqTj1xEIxfHEVbZW5WochNT2f0AE20Sp9GXDV-XwOZIy0V-FSn21y8B17-0doI-x8pK-Cru4TjR27chPM2eiur2Dig%3D)

In Freedom,

Bernie Moreno

clean_body: I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values. | | Fellow Conservative, I am excited to tell you that I have officially launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio! My name is Bernie Moreno, and I am NOT a politician. I’m a political outsider and proud American, entrepreneur and business owner, husband and father, and I’m running to protect the American Dream for the next generation. My Democrat opponent – left-wing career politician Sherrod Brown – has not only failed to give Ohio the leadership we need, but has supported Joe Biden’s catastrophic agenda that has left America at the mercy of the Chinese Communist Party, Mexican drug cartels, and radical woke idealogues. It’s time for new leadership in Ohio, and it’s time to restore a conservative majority in the Senate that can restore American strength, security, freedom, and values. This will be one of the nation’s toughest races in 2024, which is why Pres. Donald J. Trump himself encouraged me to jump in the race. He believes I have what it takes to win: I’m grateful and humbled to have this high praise from Pres. Trump, but I’m also going to need you on my team if we’re going to succeed. At age 5, I came to America with my family from Colombia. I didn’t speak a word of English. At age 10, I got my first job as a newspaper delivery boy and began learning about the value of hard work. At age 18, I became an American citizen – one of the proudest moments of my life. Eventually, I was able to purchase my first car dealership and built it into one of the largest and most successful luxury dealers in the nation. This success also led to me launching another auto-related business from an idea to a $100M+ company. As an outsider who took advantage of the opportunities and freedoms this country provides and worked hard to start and grow a successful business that could provide for me and my family, I can truly say I have lived the America Dream! Now, the American Dream is on life support and the America I discovered growing up is nearly unrecognizable. I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values. America gave me everything I needed to get to where I am today, and I believe the most important by product of success is to give back to the country that has offered me so much. I’m not a politician – I’m an outsider. This means I’m not counting on support from lobbyists and special interests to fund my campaign like Sherrod Brown is. I’m counting on everyday Americans like you to help me build a grassroots movement. Ohioans and all Americans need a leader who will put them first and prioritize making our nation safer and more prosperous. Thank you, In Freedom, Bernie Moreno Republican for U.S. Senate Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. But an extremist judge in Texas has recently ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of Mifepristone, a safe and trusted medication that has been used for over 20 years.

I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfje92seu436h2931a7t5r8ufeshq456u9u3cnr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl76d4gv1s4sk9at44u9pfgjbdldtku408lmc6d0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zta5u88485qdks9lc886g8umh2c3el03b6r22370_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0uvtqe2m13e1od7l8a4f1i56iok5o096bqe41v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmilis00mln2elhaiteadh8rtatgu62g0p4d1jdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6gf7mlmosae9ut24k1kpmscujs3d49cgh7p30o8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq60hckb00d1b2a9pfdhb0j2v1j4r4t2jtfa0lgg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj66oj6cdh2bs)

---
