name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Update: My first bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Team, if you’re receiving this email, then you probably already know that our nation’s opioid epidemic is deeply personal to my family.

Team, if you’re receiving this email, then you probably already know that our nation’s opioid epidemic is deeply personal to my family. When I was 6 years old, my mom injured her back and was prescribed a dangerous amount of opioids — ultimately leading to a decades-long battle with addiction. For 10 years, I brought my experience fighting to save my mom’s life in a broken behavioral health system to the Colorado State Legislature — working with Democrats and Republicans to ensure others who are struggling with a substance use disorder or a mental health issue have access to the treatment they need in Colorado. Now that I’m serving in Congress, I’m taking this fight to the national level — because every day across this country, people are losing their lives to the scourge of opioid addiction. And fentanyl has made this crisis so much deadlier. **Fentanyl has taken over drug supply chains globally and was responsible for more than 85% of all opioid overdose deaths in the U.S. in 2021. That’s why I just introduced the _Stop the Import of Fentanyl Act._** **[If you agree with me that we need practical, commonsense solutions to our opioid epidemic, I’m counting on you to add your name next to mine as a cosponsor of this legislation. Will you please sign today and become an official supporter of my first bill in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62010633/402000533/1058366595?refcode=email_041923_first-bill-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRiYWY0NC1kMWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1gA3sEbEGcBznLIbo87m0IQE1RFXJQrirnBeI_tpCg=&emci=99a7ad7f-cfde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=854baf44-d1de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62010634/402000534/1058366595?refcode=email_041923_first-bill-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRiYWY0NC1kMWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1gA3sEbEGcBznLIbo87m0IQE1RFXJQrirnBeI_tpCg=&emci=99a7ad7f-cfde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=854baf44-d1de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

My _Stop the Import of Fentanyl Act_ will create a National Center dedicated to combating the import and distribution of fentanyl and other illicit synthetic drugs. This legislation will help us tackle the opioid epidemic by holding drug cartels accountable, consolidating national efforts to stop drug trafficking, and protecting families across Colorado and the nation.
[**I’d be so grateful for your support as I work to get this important legislation moving through Congress. Please use this link to add your name as a citizen cosponsor →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62010635/402000535/-1920732758?refcode=email_041923_first-bill-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRiYWY0NC1kMWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1gA3sEbEGcBznLIbo87m0IQE1RFXJQrirnBeI_tpCg=&emci=99a7ad7f-cfde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=854baf44-d1de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

Brittany Pettersen

clean_body: Team, if you’re receiving this email, then you probably already know that our nation’s opioid epidemic is deeply personal to my family. Team, if you’re receiving this email, then you probably already know that our nation’s opioid epidemic is deeply personal to my family. When I was 6 years old, my mom injured her back and was prescribed a dangerous amount of opioids — ultimately leading to a decades-long battle with addiction. For 10 years, I brought my experience fighting to save my mom’s life in a broken behavioral health system to the Colorado State Legislature — working with Democrats and Republicans to ensure others who are struggling with a substance use disorder or a mental health issue have access to the treatment they need in Colorado. Now that I’m serving in Congress, I’m taking this fight to the national level — because every day across this country, people are losing their lives to the scourge of opioid addiction. And fentanyl has made this crisis so much deadlier. Fentanyl has taken over drug supply chains globally and was responsible for more than 85% of all opioid overdose deaths in the U.S. in 2021. That’s why I just introduced the Stop the Import of Fentanyl Act. | | My Stop the Import of Fentanyl Act will create a National Center dedicated to combating the import and distribution of fentanyl and other illicit synthetic drugs. This legislation will help us tackle the opioid epidemic by holding drug cartels accountable, consolidating national efforts to stop drug trafficking, and protecting families across Colorado and the nation. subject: A Victory for the Second Amendment: Constitutional Carry Bill Passes Final Vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Celebrating the passage of Constitutional Carry in Nebraska and reaffirming our commitment to protecting our 2nd Amendment rights. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a406b50c5548/n41kepo7ku-471818?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f7074d1ca9&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We are delighted to share the exciting news that [LB 77](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b9c200a972&e=25844e23a8), the Constitutional Carry bill, has successfully passed its final vote in the Nebraska legislature! This historic achievement for Nebraska is a testament to the unwavering commitment of Nebraska Republicans to uphold and defend the Constitution, including our Second Amendment.

This legislation will now head to the Governor's desk for his signature. Once signed into law, the Constitutional Carry bill will further secure the rights of law-abiding Nebraskans.

The Nebraska Republican Party is immensely proud of our Senators and supporters who have tirelessly advocated for the passage of this bill. Together, we have made a profound impact on the protection and preservation of our Second Amendment rights for current and future generations.

We are grateful for the advocacy, persistence, and patience of Senator Brewer on this topic. After years of coming up just short, 2023 was the year a signature piece of his legislative work reached the finish line.

Thanks for staying the course Senator!

As we celebrate this victory, we remain committed to defending the rights and values that make Nebraska a great place to live. [**Your continued support is crucial to our efforts, and we encourage you to stand with us as we work to preserve our liberties and promote conservative principles.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=48518af231&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Sincerely, Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1d45e9f241&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| P.S. [**Your contributions**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ee2ee021cb&e=25844e23a8) are vital in helping us advocate for Nebraska Republicans and our shared values. Please consider making a donation to support our ongoing efforts in championing the rights of our citizens.

clean_body: [, aren’t you sick and tired of special interest groups trying to push politicians around? So am I. And so is Wiley. Despite the American Action Network's attempts to sway his stance on the Lower Energy Costs Act, Wiley is staying true to his values and fighting for the everyday people of North Carolina. Because no dark money Super PAC is going to back Wiley into a corner on how he votes. In Congress, Wiley is: Standing up to special interests and cracking down on big corporations' price gouging at the pump. Delivering real solutions for energy by emphasizing clean energy, energy efficiency, and regulatory rules for emissions standards. With Wiley in Congress, you can be sure your voice is heard. But he can't do it alone. He needs your support to continue his work. Can you chip in to support his campaign today? We’ve been named a “Frontline” race, which means it will be one of the top races in the country in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62011426/402004273/-1930090685?refcode=E20967-20230419-GOPFails-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI4Mjc5Yi1kM2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bt8pXcoF7SBCDNjc1Wst0SZOiuIXPUnPwXOfXT4F15M=) Earlier this year, House Republicans also introduced the Parents’ Bill of Rights, which is nothing more than a culture war bill aimed at the most extreme and anti-free-speech fringes of their base. The bill would put trans youth at risk, requiring parental consent before changing a student’s pronouns. Not only that, but it would opened the door for banning books and discussions about LGBTQ+ topics in general. As an educator, Jahana was aghast at this bill. She knows that our queer and trans youth need more support, not less. But this is no surprise in a party more focused on riling up their base than tackling the kitchen-table issues that face our families, from the affordability crisis to healthcare. We need to get McCarthy and his extremist party OUT of the House. Jahana has been named one of Democrats’ “Frontline” races, meaning one of the most important to taking back the House in 2024. **[We can’t lose this vulnerable blue seat – will you chip in $10, $50, or even $100 to help flip the House?!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62011448/402004295/-1930090685?refcode=E20967-20230419-GOPFails-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWI4Mjc5Yi1kM2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bt8pXcoF7SBCDNjc1Wst0SZOiuIXPUnPwXOfXT4F15M=)** – Team Hayes

name: Katy Frisch
subject: Nate Silver got this one very wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.

Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62012585/402007709/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2486-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMzI5MzUxLWQ0ZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sb10udno8JBig-toe4la6ownpijSlMdIG9ZWhE_nWF0=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
**[Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and American Bridge PAC to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62012589/402007713/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2486-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMzI5MzUxLWQ0ZGUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sb10udno8JBig-toe4la6ownpijSlMdIG9ZWhE_nWF0=)**

| | | Derek, I just spoke in support of Senate Bill 272 - the Parental Bill of Rights - and urged the House of Representatives to pass the bill and send it to the Governor's desk. It was great to see so many activists out in support of a Parent’s Right to Know. _**Here is my testimony from Concord: __**_ Dear Chairman Ladd and Members of the House Education Committee, I am here today to speak in support of SB272, the Parental Bill of Rights. As a father, I understand the importance of protecting parental rights and ensuring that parents have the information they need to make informed decisions about their children's education, and as the former Senate President I know just how important this legislation is to so many Granite State parents and families. At its core, SB272 is about enshrining a parent's right to know what their child is being taught in school and the conversations our children and grandchildren are having with their teachers. This may seem like a simple concept, but it is one that is often overlooked in our education system. Parents should have access to information about their child's curriculum, as well as any materials or resources that are being used in the classroom. This knowledge is essential to ensure that parents can make informed decisions about their child's education and can provide the necessary support at home. In addition, Senate Bill 272 also protects a parent's right to opt their child out of certain activities or materials that they may find objectionable. This is a fundamental right that parents should have, and it is one that has been upheld by the courts. By enshrining this right in law, we are providing parents with the assurance that their wishes will be respected and that they will have a say in their child's education. Ultimately, Senate Bill 272 is about empowering parents and ensuring that they are at the center of their child's education. As a parent myself, I know firsthand how important it was to be involved in my child's learning and development, and I want her rights protected when it comes to her future family and my future grandchildren. By enshrining a Parental Bill of Rights in law, we are sending a clear message that parents are valued partners in the education process and that their input and participation are essential to the success of our schools and our children. I urge you to support Senate Bill 272 and to send a strong message to parents across New Hampshire that their rights are valued and protected. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, Chuck Morse
** __****_
_****_
_**

subject: BREAKING: Trump endorses my bill authorizing military force against the cartels

body:

|
Peter –
In an exclusive interview with Breitbart News, President Trump just announced his support for my bill to authorize the use of military force against the Mexican drug cartels.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkgs3e_hA5iMv1bIuIW3yHBMgTPrg2AqQGpmI5DkfhUB7srtnmMpByYcCrvY3r1p2aVdPRKZLtYPiGXv4uxvtkUX2WiuIoPcBuoqhowQpOKtriQvb77_l7ItOpnWyOcFnyn_G3HRcEWRtD2B_lGEUYsqYU1OBQ8c0VM4jo_sjgHsMS0YroI7BJ9TEW8g63eWi3vfD50mXzeoSf8DN2XbjGwMYRs__vmv9mrcTMt_ndBdtgPu5Dze5DBgxMDp_6rOe3I2Q2SbZT4gWF_d5SyQAw==&c=LfaVCUjT0HbG1yLJxyuVWGBf2Hd3sKoW7b3gQ0_arqQb3JktL_nZhg==&ch=SE6n0-NyXpfYkWI_ntqXIJgmdC3v7qvYhxIcDSn8LMd4J0AWqEezjA==)

| I'm grateful for President Trump calling attention to my bill. Now it's up to Congress to take action and pass it into law. If you agree, sign my petition:
---
| | | [TELL CONGRESS TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE CARTELS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkgs3e_hA5iMv1bIuIW3yHBMgTPrg2AqQGpmI5DkfhUB7srtnmMpByYcCrvY3r1pzDThhzVZdWUqpnuHKGRMnZG7ha0H3tugVECe7NPmi7hv7zKqaG4Y0PbqkjyALMI9eGD1bogzADmERAhLVa9GUuiHqa2_tYR4dng-IgFtN5ETY5JtHNN6jHu8TAoUb613cN8WyAx4zZ-O2gWxIkBvsudPywbnJivC88_RxcT4YKGWe6DVznoYxrzP0fDwMAEQ7VbzUb0kFpmQUB9WbndAGOYatyUcuKao3sC3bjS9gRumTXprabJwwLu6I4VOO0l3C2us9OffRIkkMKlzVEgKIubv3tBSZjAHvvjrNGylDxk=&c=LfaVCUjT0HbG1yLJxyuVWGBf2Hd3sKoW7b3gQ0_arqQb3JktL_nZhg==&ch=SE6n0-NyXpfYkWI_ntqXIJgmdC3v7qvYhxIcDSn8LMd4J0AWqEezjA==)
---
| Here's what my Authorization for Use of Military Force (AUMF) would mean in practice:
It gives the U.S. President the legal authority to act with the force of the military against deadly drug cartels in Mexico.
This does not mean invading or going to war with Mexico, as critics will lead you to believe. It can take many forms, including non-kinetic action like intelligence collection and sharing. An AUMF is also the minimum authority needed to operate with the Mexican military (as we've done with other allies battling internal insurgencies).
We're focused squarely on one mission: taking down the cartels that are killing Americans. And working with Mexico would be a key part of that.
The Trump Administration had the strongest border security policies we've ever seen - and they worked. President Trump understands the dire threat from the Mexican drug cartels that have operational control of our southern border. My authorization for use of military force against the cartels is the most effective way to deal with that threat, which is why President Trump supports it.
If you stand with President Trump and me, [please sign the petition telling Congress to authorize military force against the Mexican cartels now.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkgs3e_hA5iMv1bIuIW3yHBMgTPrg2AqQGpmI5DkfhUB7srtnmMpByYcCrvY3r1pzDThhzVZdWUqpnuHKGRMnZG7ha0H3tugVECe7NPmi7hv7zKqaG4Y0PbqkjyALMI9eGD1bogzADmERAhLVa9GUuiHqa2_tYR4dng-IgFtN5ETY5JtHNN6jHu8TAoUb613cN8WyAx4zZ-O2gWxIkBvsudPywbnJivC88_RxcT4YKGWe6DVznoYxrzP0fDwMAEQ7VbzUb0kFpmQUB9WbndAGOYatyUcuKao3sC3bjS9gRumTXprabJwwLu6I4VOO0l3C2us9OffRIkkMKlzVEgKIubv3tBSZjAH31ZM9j72hX0WAyL4cgXf_g==&c=LfaVCUjT0HbG1yLJxyuVWGBf2Hd3sKoW7b3gQ0_arqQb3JktL_nZhg==&ch=SE6n0-NyXpfYkWI_ntqXIJgmdC3v7qvYhxIcDSn8LMd4J0AWqEezjA==)
We need you in this fight.
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: The biggest year for ballot measures EVER is just around the corner >> | | Friends, It may seem like a long ways away right now, but the truth is, 2024 is just around the corner – and we’re gearing up for what’s shaping out to be the biggest year for ballot measures ever. Ballot initiatives have a proven track record of progressive wins, but it can often take months or even years to get a question up for a vote. Whether it’s conducting polling to gauge public opinion or gathering petition signatures, it takes a LOT of work to put a ballot campaign together. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Last year was incredible. From raising the minimum wage to $15/hr in deeply conservative Nebraska to expanding Medicaid to over 40,000 people in South Dakota, 2022 was the most successful year our team at the Fairness Project has ever had. But now, anti-democracy extremists who oppose the progress we’ve been making have seen the power of the ballot process –and they’re investing MILLIONS of dollars to counter our people-powered movement. They may have big money on their side, but we’ve got something better. You. = = Thank you, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. The Supreme Court could decide _today_ whether a Donald Trump-appointed judge’s partisan ruling to suspend access to mifepristone, a safe and effective abortion medication, will go into effect. I am a mechanical engineer. I am rooted in the belief that politics should never guide decisions about FDA-approved medication — science should. But Republicans are determined to enact abortion bans state by state, and attack abortion pill access nationwide. The conservative Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ was far from the end of their decades-long agenda to restrict and outright ban abortion. I won’t back down from this fight. Reproductive healthcare is healthcare — and we must act on the federal level to protect it for every person who needs it in every state. **[That’s why I am an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ to guarantee reproductive rights for all. Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor right now to show your support for reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013496/402011093/-1327803680?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjVkYzgwOC1kN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9D8Rm_dcyfWo_-biGSDdsWkKtI-49XaATjjnwlKh5I=&emci=40a48fb5-c8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af5dc808-d7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013497/402011094/-1327803680?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjVkYzgwOC1kN2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9D8Rm_dcyfWo_-biGSDdsWkKtI-49XaATjjnwlKh5I=&emci=40a48fb5-c8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=af5dc808-d7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013824/402012466/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUzNjIxNS1kOGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vvbgeC8xnsu6NXz8zzu8wjvCADUR6E0r29gcmJ0TC4=&emci=0ce36215-d8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=26e36215-d8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**As a 21-year-old labor organizer, I worked alongside construction workers to successfully push the City of Austin to pass a city ordinance guaranteeing workers a right to water breaks.** With the help of so many everyday Texans, we passed it, the first of its kind in the state.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013825/402012467/996568197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUzNjIxNS1kOGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vvbgeC8xnsu6NXz8zzu8wjvCADUR6E0r29gcmJ0TC4=)**

**But now, Republicans in the Texas legislature are trying to undo that progress—and go even further to take away workers’ right to rest breaks, paid sick days, wage theft protection, and more.**

Republicans’ House Bill 2127 would strip local cities in Texas of the right to pass regulations like these that protect workers’ rights and keep our communities safe and healthy.******This bill tramples on the right of workers—and we must stop it.**

**[If you agree, chip in $20 or whatever you can, to support my team’s efforts to fight for workers’ rights–even in the face of far-right extremists trying to take them away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013826/402012468/996568197?refcode2=26e36215-d8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUzNjIxNS1kOGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vvbgeC8xnsu6NXz8zzu8wjvCADUR6E0r29gcmJ0TC4=)**

Peter, let me backup a bit.** **

Over the years, as the Republican-controlled Texas legislature has failed to take action to protect workers and hold corporations accountable, local governments have stepped up. Communities across Texas have passed rules to improve the quality of life for our workers and **guarantee basic things like water breaks for those working in the Texas heat.**

But Greg Abbott and his far-right, corporate-backed allies in the Texas legislature want to undo that progress—all to benefit their corporate donors who finance their campaigns. **They’re pushing HB 2127 so that they can control what cities do to protect their residents.**
**But local communities know their needs better than Greg Abbott and his wealthy donors. We must defeat HB2127 and stand up for workers’ rights across our state.**

**[Help us fight back—chip in $20 or whatever you can to help us push back on this disastrous bill and fight for workers’ rights in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62013830/402012472/996568197?refcode2=26e36215-d8de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUzNjIxNS1kOGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vvbgeC8xnsu6NXz8zzu8wjvCADUR6E0r29gcmJ0TC4=)**

Thank you for being in this fight,
-Greg

clean_body: Peter, As a 21-year-old labor organizer, I worked alongside construction workers to successfully push the City of Austin to pass a city ordinance guaranteeing workers a right to water breaks. With the help of so many everyday Texans, we passed it, the first of its kind in the state. = But now, Republicans in the Texas legislature are trying to undo that progress—and go even further to take away workers’ right to rest breaks, paid sick days, wage theft protection, and more. Republicans’ House Bill 2127 would strip local cities in Texas of the right to pass regulations like these that protect workers’ rights and keep our communities safe and healthy.****This bill tramples on the right of workers—and we must stop it. = **= Peter, let me backup a bit. Over the years, as the Republican-controlled Texas legislature has failed to take action to protect workers and hold corporations accountable, local governments have stepped up. Communities across Texas have passed rules to improve the quality of life for our workers and guarantee basic things like water breaks for those working in the Texas heat. But Greg Abbott and his far-right, corporate-backed allies in the Texas legislature want to undo that progress—all to benefit their corporate donors who finance their campaigns. They’re pushing HB 2127 so that they can control what cities do to protect their residents. But local communities know their needs better than Greg Abbott and his wealthy donors. We must defeat HB2127 and stand up for workers’ rights across our state. = Thank you for being in this fight, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: (2) Sean Spicer, Steve Scalise
subject: FWD: I’m parting ways with Newsmax.Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It’s important.

Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It’s important.
|
---
| | | Hi Friend,

_Sean Spicer didn 't hold anything back when he was at Newsmax_. He spoke the truth to the American People, held Joe Biden accountable, and set the record straight when the Liberal Media swept his failures under the rug.

Now he's charting a new path and turning his attention to the 2024 election.

Sean is absolutely right when he says we cannot afford to be outworked, outsmarted, and outraised by the Democrats. **And now his warning is even more urgent ... **

We just heard House Democrats outraised Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House.

_**[Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2qqsbmuv40033snii3gopv0g2i8b5er65rg1f8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.")**_

Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It's important.
---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ode9942e8d3jmfm8bvvg9770las91a5sd9sgt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqmjnnb4jr626i05tvamohqfheh3vo7k5k7r2kv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb1pn1bqh1up74odggpetf9v84b04rlid1k2394g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)**
---
Talk soon,
Steve Scalise

* * *
From: Sean Spicer
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjmllfe0v1vcvhi7n7pujc0c6uprs5hqt8ol7d70_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "data-amp-placeholder-3-amp-end")**_
Subject: I'm parting ways with Newsmax. Here's what I'm up to now:

Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrae8ta8bjsk4tu1dc996qo8e3oie0vs5uffnjro_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zch34ndu3pfnc46fph45fab07d968jhqlp97i5dg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zks2jbdk5b9hb6t4rksok33ae03kv26tv2u9fltg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[>From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zri4gnql3uoqtvq558a1kubm63clg6g2crm7hjt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5eaii68945678smk7egkl3j404jqrnrr9p6b0kg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbo4k4mub5e98fl26db356r7gckv9p906vb5q8q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpufale5u1gb2d6t5bpo71r7p5ogmmqvg4i3hqj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs)**
---

|
More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn63483bhks3qklrof8ffem9da5e43n8pu8gj5d0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjj69o76cjh2bs "image")

My Democrat opponent is hauling in MASSIVE amounts of cash from far-Left socialists across the country. He’s connecting with the most radical donors from New York City to San Francisco, and they’re pouring money into our race here in Missouri. And with so much money coming in from the coasts, it’s going to be hard to catch up. I’m counting on my grassroots patriot force, and YOU are one of the most dedicated conservatives I know. Peter, I know 2024 may seem far off, but my opponent is already laying out a path to victory - and if we don’t act soon, it will be too late to stop him. I won’t stop fighting for this seat because I KNOW that our Senate majority - and America’s future - rides on this race. | | I believe in making _**sacrifices **_for what I believe in, Peter – because that's how I was raised. My older brother and I were raised by my single mother, who did everything she could to ensure we had clothes on our backs, and food in our bellies – and taught us the value of _**hard work**_ _****_ and _**dedication**_. [_**Help me take those values to Washington by contributing to my campaign today.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=6caad5bdcd724064b7274a16ccf97530&_e=DJHMBHCjkrGJ7SYj-eZTWutQ_aTm5GKZNICVY2FEMAcRgN4RjwrLr2U2DIeuPeqSuzlSb6c1H91T3Sz3WthvEWa6wBSpBJ7qsUVAyaSPv89fZQ1KrkDOua3_dpOeJluJsiFwITlSS5uJcZ_1JF00UWs7d-YssXf-a_2K-zWfsr3XWfPUjnjFYejN3V3Hx1N4eh42ZCdXDcP5WDxsNJGcEjUuv0FjLCHIGz8h-YRfbZE2YRw9cJaiQDd924bqqwY6)

My brother and I took the principles our mother instilled in us when we enlisted in the military. He joined the Marines, and I enlisted in the Air Force. The lessons mom taught us were invaluable to me while I was deployed overseas in Afghanistan. I took those same values of _**sacrifice**_ , _**dedication**_ , and _**hard work**_ to my career at the Department of Defense and then Veterans Affairs to ensure our incredible Veterans were cared for. Now I want to take those same values to the Halls of Congress. [_**Help me continue to serve you and work for change by contributing $5, $10, $15, or more to my campaign today, and let's bring conservative, American values back to Washington.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=6caad5bdcd724064b7274a16ccf97530&_e=DJHMBHCjkrGJ7SYj-eZTWutQ_aTm5GKZNICVY2FEMAcRgN4RjwrLr2U2DIeuPeqSuzlSb6c1H91T3Sz3WthvEWa6wBSpBJ7qsUVAyaSPv89Kepm0GIZ-LnJzK2kR-VWLbFtglpkmROVtdqdVefdJI0xvM6WYQgMm4rptJQWeBLG7YBgGy61vk7mQSF3W7Ttm1-W0rdaWdBL0KDaAY5WjZ3OV7VMuaA4KnD9L4YPZpbdRnYkYXgxJ1zklyYmNPOUl) We're building a conservative Maryland movement, and I need you on my team! My brother and I took the principles our mother instilled in us when we enlisted in the military. He joined the Marines, and I enlisted in the Air Force. The lessons mom taught us were invaluable to me while I was deployed overseas in Afghanistan. I took those same values of sacrifice , dedication , and hard work to my career at the Department of Defense and then Veterans Affairs to ensure our incredible Veterans were cared for. Now I want to take those same values to the Halls of Congress. We're building a conservative Maryland movement, and I need you on my team! Thank you, Mariela Roca** | | | | | | |

On Wednesday, April 19, 2023, just one day after he was hosted in Washington DC by the Heritage Foundation, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is scheduled to make his first appearance in South Carolina, but his entrance into the key-early primary start is already off to a rocky start.
DeSantis will be speaking at Spartanburg at First Baptist North Spartanburg on Asheville Highway at an event scheduled to begin at 7 p.m, but doors open at 5:30 p.m.
DeSantis was invited to speak in South Carolina by State Senator Josh Kimbrell.
Joshua Kimbrell is currently a South Carolina State Senator, representing District 11. He was elected in November 2020.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6919bdc0-f21a-4933-95e5-d5f941ded9e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Before his election to the State Senate, Kimbrell ran in the congressional primary in 2018 to fill Trey Gowdy's seat (SC-4). However, he lost the primary and came in fourth place, despite being endorsed by Club for Growth.
Kimbrell recently told the Associated Press that he would be hosting DeSantis to give him exposure to the Upstate of South Carolina, which is heavily Republican, and that he's been in touch with the Governor for months making plans to bring him to South Carolina amid DeSantis's shadow Presidential Campaign.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/438b5ff6-ea4b-45db-9a55-f9034e2a9d7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> _" I've told everybody associated with his team, you've got to get here early and often,'" _said Kimbrell, who said he has already joined efforts with a political action committee urging DeSantis to get into the race._ "I've tried to make it clear to them that, if you want to win, you've got to get here early."_
South Carolina is a key-early primary state that Republican candidates who wish to secure the GOP Presidential nomination need to win.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/752389d3-c9c2-4692-9b58-bb7014050802?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I have confirmed that Sen. Josh Kimbrell was arrested on October 14, 2014 and charged with first-degree criminal sexual conduct with a minor under the age of eleven. He was accused of fondling and committing other sexual acts against his three-year-old son, and was held behind bars without bond. Supporters of Kimbrell came to his defense, and he blamed the charges on his ex-wife, Kacy Kimbrell.
The charges were eventually dropped by the Thirteenth Circuit Solicitor, Walt Wilkins, in February 2015, four months after Kimbrell's initial arrest. Wilkins stated, "Upon receiving this case from the Greenville Police Department and completing an investigation spanning almost four months, my office has determined that there is insufficient evidence to prove the elements of this crime beyond a reasonable doubt."
However, the Greenville Police argued otherwise, and released a statement supporting their decision to arrest Josh Kimbrell, and the charges filed against him. Greenville Police, which made the initial arrest, also put out a statement and stood by their decision to arrest Kimbrell. **"We understand that the solicitor's office has declined to prosecute the case against Josh Kimbrell. However we stand by the fact that probable cause was established to obtain the warrant for Kimbrell's arrest."**
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..105Jsq0a_e_5v9esWcVejJPI5nhS-p1roRp-2j3pXHA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=115884315)
Kimbrell eventually wrote a book about his experience entitled, _Fatherhood on Trial: The Fight to Be a Father in the Age of Divorce_.
It is also worth noting that DeSantis's scheduled event in South Carolina with Kimbrell comes one day after the _[Daily Mail](https://substack.com/redirect/df2b0e39-49e6-4ac6-a99f-416f0387d2ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[confirmed ](https://substack.com/redirect/df2b0e39-49e6-4ac6-a99f-416f0387d2ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)my reporting from December 2022 about how DeSantis's admitted best friend, and one of his donors named Kent Stermon was under investigation for sex with a minor at the time he committed suicide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02ac5b39-6294-427a-96f0-8a61ba234897?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fec6db09-c3eb-421a-a709-8a08a7c7ebcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/00f841ce-59fa-4d66-831e-7b46ff9cb741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 2014 Nikki Haley, the former Governor of South Carolina who has also jumped into the 2024 Presidential Primary, named Kimbrell to her "Faith and Family Coalition". However, the day that news of his arrest broke, she removed his name from her campaign website.
South Carolina's Republican Presidential Primary will take place on Feb. 24, 2024. It is the first in the South, and third in the nation.
DeSantis will have a difficult path ahead securing support in South Carolina after his associations with an alleged child diddler have been brought to light his first day on the campaign trail.

clean_body: This isn't the first alleged sexual predator who has close ties and associations with Governor DeSantis. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? This isn't the first alleged sexual predator who has close ties and associations with Governor DeSantis. | | | Apr 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! On Wednesday, April 19, 2023, just one day after he was hosted in Washington DC by the Heritage Foundation, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is scheduled to make his first appearance in South Carolina, but his entrance into the key-early primary start is already off to a rocky start. DeSantis will be speaking at Spartanburg at First Baptist North Spartanburg on Asheville Highway at an event scheduled to begin at 7 p.m, but doors open at 5:30 p.m. DeSantis was invited to speak in South Carolina by State Senator Josh Kimbrell. Joshua Kimbrell is currently a South Carolina State Senator, representing District 11. He was elected in November 2020. | | ---|---|--- Before his election to the State Senate, Kimbrell ran in the congressional primary in 2018 to fill Trey Gowdy's seat (SC-4). However, he lost the primary and came in fourth place, despite being endorsed by Club for Growth. Kimbrell recently told the Associated Press that he would be hosting DeSantis to give him exposure to the Upstate of South Carolina, which is heavily Republican, and that he's been in touch with the Governor for months making plans to bring him to South Carolina amid DeSantis's shadow Presidential Campaign. " I've told everybody associated with his team, you've got to get here early and often,'" said Kimbrell, who said he has already joined efforts with a political action committee urging DeSantis to get into the race. "I've tried to make it clear to them that, if you want to win, you've got to get here early." South Carolina is a key-early primary state that Republican candidates who wish to secure the GOP Presidential nomination need to win. | | ---|---|--- I have confirmed that Sen. Josh Kimbrell was arrested on October 14, 2014 and charged with first-degree criminal sexual conduct with a minor under the age of eleven. He was accused of fondling and committing other sexual acts against his three-year-old son, and was held behind bars without bond. Supporters of Kimbrell came to his defense, and he blamed the charges on his ex-wife, Kacy Kimbrell. The charges were eventually dropped by the Thirteenth Circuit Solicitor, Walt Wilkins, in February 2015, four months after Kimbrell's initial arrest. Wilkins stated, "Upon receiving this case from the Greenville Police Department and completing an investigation spanning almost four months, my office has determined that there is insufficient evidence to prove the elements of this crime beyond a reasonable doubt." However, the Greenville Police argued otherwise, and released a statement supporting their decision to arrest Josh Kimbrell, and the charges filed against him. Greenville Police, which made the initial arrest, also put out a statement and stood by their decision to arrest Kimbrell. "We understand that the solicitor's office has declined to prosecute the case against Josh Kimbrell. However we stand by the fact that probable cause was established to obtain the warrant for Kimbrell's arrest." LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Kimbrell eventually wrote a book about his experience entitled, Fatherhood on Trial: The Fight to Be a Father in the Age of Divorce. It is also worth noting that DeSantis's scheduled event in South Carolina with Kimbrell comes one day after the reporting from December 2022 about how DeSantis's admitted best friend, and one of his donors named Kent Stermon was under investigation for sex with a minor at the time he committed suicide. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- In 2014 Nikki Haley, the former Governor of South Carolina who has also jumped into the 2024 Presidential Primary, named Kimbrell to her "Faith and Family Coalition". However, the day that news of his arrest broke, she removed his name from her campaign website. South Carolina's Republican Presidential Primary will take place on Feb. 24, 2024. It is the first in the South, and third in the nation. DeSantis will have a difficult path ahead securing support in South Carolina after his associations with an alleged child diddler have been brought to light his first day on the campaign trail. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: While the news cycle may have moved past the events occurring in Tennessee, we cannot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends —
Over the past few weeks, Tennessee has made it crystal clear that democracy is not a priority for its legislators.
We saw the Republican State Senate Supermajority choose their self-interests over the lives of children when they expelled two Black lawmakers for expressing their rightful freedom to protest against gun violence.
But that’s not all that has been happening in Tennessee. Tennessee Republicans have been systematically working _for years_ to disenfranchise the Democratic minority across the state through heavy partisan gerrymandering.
The vulnerability of Tennessee’s democracy goes far beyond the expulsion of Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. And we will continue to see its democracy at risk if we don’t act.
So the fight to restore democracy, fairness, and equality is on and one of the best ways to help is to support the Tennessee Democrats, who are working hard in that fight.
[**Please split an $5 contribution between the Tennessee Democratic Party and The Long Run so we can continue to fight for pro-democracy candidates and policies throughout the country, together.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-tndems-split.5PaQnQ&refcode=em230419-1-t2&t=1&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-tndems-split.5PaQnQ&refcode=em230419-1-t2&t=2&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
It’s time to sound the alarm. Democracy is under attack in Tennessee and there is no doubt that other red states will use these same tactics as a blueprint around the country to continue to support their self-interests — whether that be pleasing the gun lobby or limiting reproductive rights.
As long as these Republicans have the majority, they will continue to gerrymander the maps to disenfranchise marginalized voters.
They will continue to limit freedom of assembly to silence the voice of the opposition.
And they will continue to try to dismantle our democracy.
So while the news cycle may have moved past the events occurring in Tennessee, we cannot.
[**Please split a $5 contribution between the Tennessee Democratic Party and the Long Run today to help us support and elect more Democrats in Tennessee and across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-tndems-split.5PaQnQ&refcode=em230419-1-t2&t=3&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
Thank you in advance for being a part of this fight with us.
\- Mandela and the team at The Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4373_196590_DxPv5M&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4373%2E196590%2EDxPv5M)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Team Kirsten
subject: We're in the news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
We may be over a year out from Election Day, but we already know that this is going to be one of the most important races in the country. Kirsten announced that she was running for Arizona's Sixth Congressional District last week, and news sites are already taking notice:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines]
Despite being outspent more than 6:1, Kirsten lost in 2022 by just one percentage point . That means this seat will be one of Democrat's top opportunities to take back control of the House — and no one is better suited to run (and win!) in this district than Kirsten.
Here's what the Daily Kos had to say about our announcement:
"Arizona Democrat Kirsten Engel announced Wednesday that she would seek a rematch against Republican Rep. Juan Ciscomani in the 6th Congressional District, a constituency in the Tucson area that she came unexpectedly close to winning in 2022 even after national Democratic groups canceled their planned spending . Engel, who is a former state senator and environmental lawyer, is the first serious candidate to challenge Ciscomani in a contest that could be key to a future Democratic majority ." ( x [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/4/12/2163532/-Arizona-Democrat-launches-bid-to-avenge-tight-loss-in-one-of-nation-s-most-competitive-House-seats?pm_campaign=blog&pm_medium=rss&pm_source=] )
We know that a race as competitive as this one is also going to be very, very expensive. We had a really successful launch thanks to the incredible grassroots support of folks like you, but we'll need to keep that momentum up to build a winning campaign.
Kirsten is committed to fighting for reproductive rights, water security, Medicare and Social Security, and common sense gun control in Congress. Will you support her by becoming a Founding Donor to her campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines]
CHIP IN MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines&recurring=1]
Thanks for all you do!
— Team Kirsten Engel for Congress
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_0411923_Headlines]

clean_body: Just think back to when our country – and YOU – were thriving and free. | | | Friend, The sheer number of patriots who have proudly proclaimed they would NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny is truly remarkable... While the Democrats are transforming America into a tin pot dictatorship that ARRESTS its political opposition, it’s important to remember just how much better we can be. Which is why I pose one simple question: Was your life not better before Biden? If the answer is yes, and you’re sick and tired of those who BUY power at YOUR expense and weaponize our justice system to silence and persecute descent, then I ask that you stand with me during these dark times for our nation. And in return, I promise you this: We WILL restore America’s greatness, and YOU will thrive and be free once more. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, April 16, 2023 Subject: Was your life not better before Biden? To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, The America you and I once knew and loved is gone. And in its place now stands a Third World nation more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than a Free Republic. But YOU have a choice, Patriot. Biden and the radical Democrats’ tin pot dictatorship doesn’t have to be America’s reality. Just think back to my FINAL State of the Union Address, when our country – and YOU – were THRIVING and FREE. All of that can be had once more. But we are at a pivotal point in our nation’s history, one in which only a movement with the resolve and perseverance of our movement can right these egregious wrongs. There’s no other way to say it: YOU are our country’s FINAL HOPE. | Patriot, one day the history books (so long as the liberal censors keep their hands off them) will speak of an American decline unlike any our country has ever experienced. Think back just a short while ago to our once great country under our leadership... Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, we were WINNING! And all of this can be had once more. We can and we WILL save our country. But our mission to WIN BACK the White House and renew America’s greatness is dependent on the support of grassroots patriots like YOU. | Thank you, Donald J. name: Emily Busch
subject: My son ran for his life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
My name is Emily Busch, and I’m a Democrat running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District. On November 30, 2021, my son, Andrew, ran for his life from a school shooter. Andrew was in music class at Oxford High School that day when a 15-year-old with a gun opened fire on his classmates in the hallway, killing four and wounding seven. I was one of the lucky ones – my kid came home safe that day. But after such a horrific event in my own community, I knew I had to take action to protect our kids. | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d7d70e5faf1c4151989216654932d6ab&_e=0ZyovJ32FVC0zlaLc_hm9V2d2EQhVc8Oz4r3M86fSPIRFUU3o5xY0AqchIsk5PmUqaCpEqCwCFaEaabRKkGaFZFoLzRyBUkeEY852z-D9DgENK5CVa4chjAoGS8WdCXSY_vjOhFQVnbLOHHgiUsAudyG9zwF6WmJMekOLhGPHXn6tOWHdVlEoCvzJGEqKjqEfCPFTH7cFIsHEJLZU6AGFbUpmX_GzdmEotG6cOw-S8rTpXpaSv2i9FqvJpwEGBcZbe7SYxgyDafjRmK04tNfLNI091E-5PXgx3WianumaQrMAwXIre8NVZZVBPSNlP6PxqboR0xXFsixeopHE58njeTrKu0rBdT9yFc8FQ_BpqV1FjghFWCsZfsmrnWu6_uH8yHEsUIf47qi5mPjkqzUk4tGU8-Fk4HIXyxpPvDeLWI%3D) My name is Emily Busch, and I’m a Democrat running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District.**On November 30, 2021, my son, Andrew, ran for his life from a school shooter.** Andrew was in music class at Oxford High School that day when a 15-year-old with a gun opened fire on his classmates in the hallway, killing four and wounding seven. I was one of the lucky ones – my kid came home safe that day. But after such a horrific event in my own community, I knew I had to take action to protect our kids.I saw my community plunged into grief, sadness, and anger. But this tragedy wasn’t unique to my community. Far too many in this country have experienced moments of horror just like this.After every tragedy, communities are united in grief, but our leaders seem incapable of seeing past their own political calculations. Some, like our Congressman John James, offer up thoughts and prayers – and then refuse to take action, instead continuing to fill their campaign coffers with money from the gun lobby. Washington fails over and over to end the threat of school shootings,**which is why I’m stepping up and running for Congress – to ensure Michigan and our nation have a leader who will take action.****[If you’re ready for a new leader in Michigan’s 10th district who will fight to protect your children and your families, become a Founding Donor of my campaign by chipping in $1 today!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d7d70e5faf1c4151989216654932d6ab&_e=0ZyovJ32FVC0zlaLc_hm9V2d2EQhVc8Oz4r3M86fSPIRFUU3o5xY0AqchIsk5PmUqaCpEqCwCFaEaabRKkGaFZFoLzRyBUkeEY852z-D9DgENK5CVa4chjAoGS8WdCXSY_vjOhFQVnbLOHHgiUsAudyG9zwF6WmJMekOLhGPHXn6tOWHdVlEoCvzJGEqKjqEfCPFTH7cFIsHEJLZU6AGFbUpmX_GzdmEotG6cOw-S8rTpXpaSv2i9FqvJpwEGBcZ6j5Bwk9_p6JLRMeX-5zdYWx6wVt6lDHK-nPl2AFf8o_ub85yykuZRzYN_7aQTEBVkN8TS8_Al6CVeOn716v9QP6k5ZUiVijLG-Vmcm57AOnVZHcjcWaJjVtdah8-VZd0e9-rFVvjGAzAuOLMtbYkg15oyqQzTl1cxTKpJTqhqr9eAMBgpVrTDWwiQ7dX75FG)** Protecting public education. Passing common-sense gun safety measures. Preserving our environment. Safeguarding abortion rights. Our country can do these things, with the right leadership.**[I believe I can be the leader we need. If you’re with me, please jump into this race and chip in $1 to my campaign!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d7d70e5faf1c4151989216654932d6ab&_e=0ZyovJ32FVC0zlaLc_hm9V2d2EQhVc8Oz4r3M86fSPIRFUU3o5xY0AqchIsk5PmUqaCpEqCwCFaEaabRKkGaFZFoLzRyBUkeEY852z-D9DgENK5CVa4chjAoGS8WdCXSY_vjOhFQVnbLOHHgiUsAudyG9zwF6WmJMekOLhGPHXn6tOWHdVlEoCvzJGEqKjqEfCPFTH7cFIsHEJLZU6AGFbUpmX_GzdmEotG6cOw-S8rTpXpaSv2i9FqvJpwEGBcZ6j5Bwk9_p6JLRMeX-5zdYWx6wVt6lDHK-nPl2AFf8o-rdsBKKuF5GMnMed2mhI1FbhOAtTY4ay66LauPlJAbOh_2nNIWBRhy92kEQadQGd0N5GCmMTU38L5lGnuN7k1UvzpXTN-BVGD_r_4JDD0vW02F5WzVv9sAX_9y80KNvZTyADULzemtdIk9FuMgSZE-)** On November 30, 2021, my son ran for his life. Now, I’m running for Congress to protect kids like him. I just need your help to get me there.Let’s do this together.Thank you,
Emily Busch
_Candidate for Congress, MI-10_[ __](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d7d70e5faf1c4151989216654932d6ab&_e=0ZyovJ32FVC0zlaLc_hm9V2d2EQhVc8Oz4r3M86fSPIRFUU3o5xY0AqchIsk5PmUqaCpEqCwCFaEaabRKkGaFZFoLzRyBUkeEY852z-D9DgENK5CVa4chjAoGS8WdCXSY_vjOhFQVnbLOHHgiUsAudyG9zwF6WmJMekOLhGPHXn6tOWHdVlEoCvzJGEqKjqEfCPFTH7cFIsHEJLZU6AGFbUpmX_GzdmEotG6cOw-S8rTpXpaSv2i9FqvJpwEGBcZbe7SYxgyDafjRmK04tNfLPS_zuRRgMko-2T1Q29r0c6k6FWGAbJ1BXBJLV82ZyeLxdo6XVyjAfFSMRuvznq1P1qcgfPLAPsjnZ_fVeFNlI8Bgp3g4Blr1Xyqdtz1yJQjzsVx1cTHUDEnw8MTS3mFGNh78uWEPUKlnyMOQ-PWe0Y%3D) PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

Friend,

Throughout our time on the campaign trail and in the halls of Congress, we have built a powerful and diverse coalition and earned the support of folks in every corner of the district.

Last cycle, Greg garnered support from labor unions, advocacy groups, political organizations, religious communities, and the hundreds of thousands of voters who believed in a better future for our children and families.

**But now as we kick Greg’s re-election campaign into full gear, we are still missing the most important endorsement: Yours.**

This campaign has always been – _and will continue to be_ – about you and the community of hardworking folks across Southwest Ohio. Knowing Greg has your support would mean the world.

Last cycle, Greg garnered support from labor unions, advocacy groups, political organizations, religious communities, and the hundreds of thousands of voters who believed in a better future for our children and families. But now as we kick Greg’s re-election campaign into full gear, we are still missing the most important endorsement: Yours. This campaign has always been – and will continue to be – about you and the community of hardworking folks across Southwest Ohio. | | Peter, we have an urgent opportunity to save women's sports and protect the rights of female athletes. Heritage Action has been working behind the scenes since 2019 to enshrine the sanctity of women's sports into law, and **now is the time for Congress to act.**
Our national survey in 2019 found that _**62%**_ of Americans support keeping female high school level and amateur sports teams _female only._

We knew this was a pivotal cultural issue then, and have worked ever since to INCREASE support for protecting women and girls sports. This is about more than just fairness—it’s also about protecting women and girls' privacy and safety.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d40168c17e2f4d1ea8cb4e7daa8e002d&_e=BTvjtJR1U3ejwgoc87hXipHHBMEbzWKyyEKbL45dN-bT3t9F8me3lVavi8Qu2NaCqziZBuVLIOUz00FUuSAwlGmpdVlEC-MqzKsJZuKkqRJongIAAyrDI0dboyDxSx_jdUnaJDWG0oyAxJo8qu7dPQJkA4TV9k5o-h6Xp8FWQbBDQZ20V8ObbJ94j05U0jdOl1ytJikEb7Gz-QeP-fhrhB_GrruqItrnIKmYZL9M4O7xMkry_hsgObAXvC2fohzOigFXOKhS1V8LZDLoHeacCOkyjY1jtdjakmfop5iuKrMP6FRl3P9RvaCKzPdHOHWc1_76MiPW0V3IPELdRIXPTKxqKevWkyBorDQaEGIV9TM7h8pdczBbhL7RIOkuZfR8)

Peter, the majority of America wants Congress to pass _the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act_. [**Will you support our grassroots efforts to save women’s sports?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d40168c17e2f4d1ea8cb4e7daa8e002d&_e=BTvjtJR1U3ejwgoc87hXipHHBMEbzWKyyEKbL45dN-bT3t9F8me3lVavi8Qu2NaCqziZBuVLIOUz00FUuSAwlGmpdVlEC-MqzKsJZuKkqRJongIAAyrDI0dboyDxSx_jdUnaJDWG0oyAxJo8qu7dPQJkA4TV9k5o-h6Xp8FWQbBDQZ20V8ObbJ94j05U0jdOl1ytJikEb7Gz-QeP-fhrhB_GrruqItrnIKmYZL9M4O4_R9u5yEnVAXa9LoAM6brocoWa7YlkKxfsFKYVuafIlDTkZ67E2_BlO3GVAr0TV9P4mN2tNP-5n3srDR0I0GjJZ0Ei94oQ4o37fmv4E_CbcveQz6B7RHGvM3Zxzb49URAx3wl8ZGEVId0Vxe42rsw1) Together, we can ensure that women's sports are protected and that female athletes have a level playing field. Protecting fairness in sports is an important battle in the war against the Left’s radical transgender ideology.**We simply cannot let our children be indoctrinated into the Left’s woke gender confusion—it hurts our sons and our daughters whenever it is taught.** We need to keep the Left’s transgender misinformation out of our children’s classrooms. Protecting the integrity of women’s sports is one way we can do that. [**Stand with Heritage Action to protect children and Save Women’s Sports – rush an urgent donation now >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d40168c17e2f4d1ea8cb4e7daa8e002d&_e=BTvjtJR1U3ejwgoc87hXipHHBMEbzWKyyEKbL45dN-bT3t9F8me3lVavi8Qu2NaCqziZBuVLIOUz00FUuSAwlGmpdVlEC-MqzKsJZuKkqRJongIAAyrDI0dboyDxSx_jdUnaJDWG0oyAxJo8qu7dPQJkA4TV9k5o-h6Xp8FWQbBDQZ20V8ObbJ94j05U0jdOl1ytJikEb7Gz-QeP-fhrhB_GrruqItrnIKmYZL9M4O7JN0SzFcqsEwrhZrd_NL20prNosrT9eA92im54Ra49cpRjXzwmW1r6nq8FW2Cv8-ITgFcpeMbRTdqT80IMnqnt7RXChc-m-iJ8HmidUgbIn5tOKN5-qT-LikoijbkcRVOZD2UUNXKbJNWkBGXdhSsz) Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action

This is about more than just fairness—it’s also about protecting women and girls' privacy and safety. Peter, the majority of America wants Congress to pass the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act. Together, we can ensure that women's sports are protected and that female athletes have a level playing field. Protecting fairness in sports is an important battle in the war against the Left’s radical transgender ideology.We simply cannot let our children be indoctrinated into the Left’s woke gender confusion—it hurts our sons and our daughters whenever it is taught. We need to keep the Left’s transgender misinformation out of our children’s classrooms. Protecting the integrity of women’s sports is one way we can do that. Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. body:
There are a record number of Democratic women serving in the House of Representatives this Congress.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62019111/402026446/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230419SURV_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM1Mzg2MC1lNGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nix8o_vd7m-JpwHwzB_V-CtsZguuJo2pxW2LPlL2HfU=)

There are a historic number of Democratic women serving in the House of Representatives this Congress. And last month, I was honored to be appointed co-chair of the Democratic Women's Caucus Outreach Task Force.

From reproductive rights to equal pay to more affordable childcare to paid family leave, I'm focused on advancing the discussion on the issues that impact women across this country — and I'll be working to help present the Democratic policies on these issues.

**I look forward to doing my part in crafting a message that can resonate with voters all across the country, especially in the swing districts that will decide control of the House in 2024.**

That's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your input. [**Will you take a minute and fill out our short survey to tell me how I can best fight for gender equality and opportunities for women?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62019113/402026472/581375096?ms=EM_PET_230419SURV_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230419SURV_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM1Mzg2MC1lNGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nix8o_vd7m-JpwHwzB_V-CtsZguuJo2pxW2LPlL2HfU=&emci=13b579bc-d5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3b353860-e4de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62019116/402026492/581375096?ms=EM_PET_230419SURV_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230419SURV_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM1Mzg2MC1lNGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nix8o_vd7m-JpwHwzB_V-CtsZguuJo2pxW2LPlL2HfU=&emci=13b579bc-d5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3b353860-e4de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) I'm looking forward to reading your responses!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: On May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the Pennsylvania state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!
body:
Republicans could take this state house in May!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3eb8f627-bd65-4e33-9282-fc2cd3615088/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We must stop the Republicans from ripping the state house away from Democrats in Pennsylvania!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2d7a608-f271-4a87-9839-2839d0f1f79e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _One of the biggest victories on election night, 2022, was in Pennsylvania. We elected a Democratic Governor, Josh Shapiro, over seditionist Doug Mastriano, and Senator John Fetterman over right-wing Mehmet Oz._ **_And, in an incredible highlight of the night, we unexpectedly took back the state house by a 101-100 margin!_** **_It created opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better, and those in surrounding states and across the country. As we know, guns sold illicitly and climate-change-causing carbon don't know what state lines mean._** _**So, on May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!**_ _Democrat Heather Boyd (District 163) is clear after the travesty of Dobbs, "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is the main reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn (District 108) says he'll stop permitless carry to protect our schoolchildren. Both GOP opponents, meanwhile, are ready to give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. And they're terrible on EVERY other issue._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn so we keep progressing in Pennsylvania and across the country, and never return to MAGA Republican policies of pre-2020?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td17effd8-97ce-44e8-b62d-e26345f08db2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95f5b2e5-e821-4971-a904-2a29a0a2af4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Ohio Update [via AOTL]
subject: Clearly, these extremist lawmakers are out of touch with voters.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Unless you have read the latest news in _The Ohio Capital Journal_ cover to cover, you might have missed something important: **Conservative lawmakers’ anti-democratic agenda, hiding there in the details.**
[**✂️Majority of conservative lawmakers want to cut voter access to Ohio Constitution.✂️**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62032647/402060197/-1070237729?refcode=20230419_AOTL_F_OHUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMmM4NGU3LTA1ZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nVVpEFeb7CtEFj2FEPpKPGZL_NMJ2u_4Z2jh1d365JQ=)
Conservative lawmakers in Ohio have begun to pass a measure that would make it more difficult for voters to amend the state Constitution. The Ohio Senate just passed it today! **Experts argue their proposal is nothing more than an attempt to block constitutional amendments that push for ending gerrymandering and protecting abortion rights.**
[**But we can't allow them to undermine the voice of the people. That's why All On The Line is fighting to combat gerrymandering and protect voters' ability to participate in our democratic processes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62032648/402060198/-1070237729?refcode=20230419_AOTL_F_OHUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMmM4NGU3LTA1ZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nVVpEFeb7CtEFj2FEPpKPGZL_NMJ2u_4Z2jh1d365JQ=)

**These efforts are undemocratic, unpopular, unfair and unnecessary, and that's why our work is even more critical today to support voters in states like Ohio and nationwide.**
We're working hard to hold politicians accountable and ensure every voice is heard. And with your help, we can keep up the fight.
