clean_body: | Unless you have read the latest news in The Ohio Capital Journal cover to cover, you might have missed something important: Conservative lawmakers’ anti-democratic agenda, hiding there in the details. = Conservative lawmakers in Ohio have begun to pass a measure that would make it more difficult for voters to amend the state Constitution. The Ohio Senate just passed it today! Experts argue their proposal is nothing more than an attempt to block constitutional amendments that push for ending gerrymandering and protecting abortion rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Clearly, these extremist lawmakers are out of touch with voters and don't care about the impact of their actions on our communities. But despite conservative politicians' determination to ignore voters in favor of political power, we are not giving up team. These efforts are undemocratic, unpopular, unfair and unnecessary, and that's why our work is even more critical today to support voters in states like Ohio and nationwide. We're working hard to hold politicians accountable and ensure every voice is heard. And with your help, we can keep up the fight. = Together, we can make a difference and protect voters' rights everywhere. We appreciate your support. \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. body:
Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It's important.

|
---
| | | Hi Friend,

_Sean Spicer didn 't hold anything back when he was at Newsmax_. He spoke the truth to the American People, held Joe Biden accountable, and set the record straight when the Liberal Media swept his failures under the rug.

Now he's charting a new path and turning his attention to the 2024 election.

Sean is absolutely right when he says we cannot afford to be outworked, outsmarted, and outraised by the Democrats. **And now his warning is even more urgent ... **

We just heard House Democrats outraised Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House.

_**[Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3df14ad4536b46e99a027ba8425ee4bd&_e=fvldO6EQJArnBO93WTlaRasAh9O_ELgf3A-pAk8fNA2wiQ6DV27oSTF5rs1F2CBH0AXjtGtPFpYs8lU_q37veVXfcwKkX_Pc_1GJu5PO0VSB70n-FtGV3Nv1jwr9027mkk-K1cd28Fx1fkPpCJnIU00iN4WgM7z_lIovn7eroShbche7qKteRvEFyyLNLVI06ZpTVnKt5JJt29UKFDLYnDZPivripWBdat3XUbUaTBj5L3adAtq6HT_yue83zoyTKTkAzAseoiR2aukLECKwxyBkdbAlLfEsUI9uT2e192zBWJcDU0F9vMABW5OA6e3EFeX3BPa8nHvnVw4diqZB_PgN5AilUzhEfZncrfF7aDXlGrQZkTsvWoBkMvQFw9sG5zAniTjTSu70b1j-dCovRkVl37cMJYR6NMouTDE0JGViKsFdUMKbRUHoDpWyWvYejJsCUCZXrag6BaxUWjX80w%3D%3D "Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.")**_

Subject: I'm parting ways with Newsmax. Here's what I'm up to now:

Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3df14ad4536b46e99a027ba8425ee4bd&_e=fvldO6EQJArnBO93WTlaRasAh9O_ELgf3A-pAk8fNA2wiQ6DV27oSTF5rs1F2CBH0AXjtGtPFpYs8lU_q37veVXfcwKkX_Pc_1GJu5PO0VSB70n-FtGV3Nv1jwr9027mkk-K1cd28Fx1fkPpCJnIU00iN4WgM7z_lIovn7eroShbche7qKteRvEFyyLNLVI06ZpTVnKt5JJt29UKFDLYnDZPivripWBdat3XUbUaTBj5L3adAtq6HT_yue83zoyTKTkAzAseoiR2aukLECKwxyBkdbAlLfEsUI9uT2e192xIU1oRQHIXTI-UcqT5SaMFkCddBnRkZFNyNBpzQUt8XM6OB4KHSQ507yt90gf_mDRwAFd4zwzpthja6XOl2_c2RdQTWXfRD8OaYYd7x0UgTwXFo-Z70fjgTr_w9PU5TCCwwzhIpPHYCDiVDrblHusf09JJyUw4w0gQXLGLy8dAmw%3D%3D "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3df14ad4536b46e99a027ba8425ee4bd&_e=fvldO6EQJArnBO93WTlaRasAh9O_ELgf3A-pAk8fNA2wiQ6DV27oSTF5rs1F2CBH0AXjtGtPFpYs8lU_q37veVXfcwKkX_Pc_1GJu5PO0VSB70n-FtGV3Nv1jwr9027mkk-K1cd28Fx1fkPpCJnIU00iN4WgM7z_lIovn7eroShbche7qKteRvEFyyLNLVI06ZpTVnKt5JJt29UKFDLYnDZPivripWBdat3XUbUaTBj5L3adAtq6HT_yue83zoyTKTkAzAseoiR2aukLECKwxyBkdbAlLfEsUI9uT2e192x7K4ZPH9lvDqCoiY3fOqXGHSViG7FAopoYUgB0_B6PHcTFOv-8PTj5m1MrxtAKNsCbaGPLTUN72-Vv-MxoA4aim_BkSvsAnYr8vnBshxjwzbHRTOLZCS-ZhDEfEjzdeCwIavCmMw31zaPn9u4NQDygb3XwUeSusVa2k6GSEoiXRQ%3D%3D "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3df14ad4536b46e99a027ba8425ee4bd&_e=fvldO6EQJArnBO93WTlaRasAh9O_ELgf3A-pAk8fNA2wiQ6DV27oSTF5rs1F2CBH0AXjtGtPFpYs8lU_q37veVXfcwKkX_Pc_1GJu5PO0VSB70n-FtGV3Nv1jwr9027mkk-K1cd28Fx1fkPpCJnIU00iN4WgM7z_lIovn7eroShbche7qKteRvEFyyLNLVI06ZpTVnKt5JJt29UKFDLYnDZPivripWBdat3XUbUaTBj5L3adAtq6HT_yue83zoyTKTkAzAseoiR2aukLECKwxyBkdbAlLfEsUI9uT2e192w8CdOC1xMiRk-K4Q-HIRS7NZsHTWz79t2Vf0NEYx9JFuNPcorfd7F55OaqxaoxRA6yjp0g1V-noaGympRy13WLysW9bdJRfC7SNaPwAVcLvuQk8WCLZqfPdfWgTHoLA9kzKDghdl3HRV8OYlI5oz_oD4X2C3quUBD9Cu7XinE5ww%3D%3D "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3df14ad4536b46e99a027ba8425ee4bd&_e=fvldO6EQJArnBO93WTlaRasAh9O_ELgf3A-pAk8fNA2wiQ6DV27oSTF5rs1F2CBH0AXjtGtPFpYs8lU_q37veVXfcwKkX_Pc_1GJu5PO0VSB70n-FtGV3Nv1jwr9027mkk-K1cd28Fx1fkPpCJnIU00iN4WgM7z_lIovn7eroShbche7qKteRvEFyyLNLVI06ZpTVnKt5JJt29UKFDLYnDZPivripWBdat3XUbUaTBj5L3adAtq6HT_yue83zoyTKTkAzAseoiR2aukLECKwxyBkdbAlLfEsUI9uT2e192w8CdOC1xMiRk-K4Q-HIRS7FGaqF_HJaQ6kFbHvfoih72UYFRG3_MDwz-JwTxFabbHd-G-DkEgRfxAlrrm9EGV-6n6L3h3G5qUjdKSpsnXKa_r1_3Auw-TUSTVLXKD1Vrf12Of64XgwpwBqJrcIfp_QT2CjNMyNvsS0_qJpxmpr5A%3D%3D "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

## Olympia Watch
---
|
---
|
### SB 5599
---
| SB 5599 is a deeply concerning bill getting national attention right now, and rightly so. This bill allows shelters to hide runaway or homeless youth without parental permission. This effectively bypasses parental consent, separating loving parents from their children without even notifying the parent.

This bill removes a parent's ability to protect and make important decisions for their children. Moreover, the bill allows host homes to house youth without parental permission if the youth is seeking or receiving protected health care services, including gender reassignment services, further undermining parental authority. This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing.
---
|
### SB 5770
---
| Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure.

This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds.
---
|
### HB 1240
---
| HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons:
1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence.
2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers.
3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups.

Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens.
---
|
### Blake Fix
---
| Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction.

Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority.

Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state.
---
|
### SB 5082
---
| SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people.
---
|
### Capital Gains Tax Ruling
---
| The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes.

In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: **who will they target next? **
---

clean_body: WSRP Monthly Update - Events | Ways to get involved | Join the team | and more! | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | | Republican Action Conference | | We are incredibly excited about our lineup of speakers and panels that will be speaking at our 2023 Republican Action Conference, taking place on May 5th and 6th at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center. Don't miss the opportunity to hear from these influential and inspiring individuals, and participate in engaging panels and workshops! ## ## ## ## ## | | "More Info: 2023 Republican Action Conference" | | Heart of the Party | | 🌟 : Join us at our Heart of the Party banquet, the culmination of our Republican Action Conference! Featuring keynote speaker Liz Harrington, Trump Spokesperson, and State Representative Jim Walsh - this is an event you won't want to miss! Mingle with party members and enjoy an unforgettable evening at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center, on May 6th. 🌟 : Come and meet Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers, U.S. Representative for Washington's 5th congressional district, amd Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee at our 5th Annual Heart of the Party Reception in Spokane. Rep. McMorris Rodgers is a national leader and this is a great opportunity to hear the imact she is having on national policy. Come and connect with fellow Republicans and share your thoughts on the future of our party. 🌟 : Join us in Maple Valley for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn. This is your chance to learn more about their vision for our great state and show your support. | "More Info: 2023 Heart of the Party Events" | | Get Involved | | Candidate Schools | The WSRP is teaming up with several organizations to host candidate trainings to help us set the stage for wins in 2023 and 2024! Candidates - , the BIAW, and other partner organizations at upcoming candidate trainings on April 29th or May 13th of this year. These schools will cover the following topics: Voter Contact and Identification Voter databases Fundraising Techniques Budget Allocation Campaign Planning Importance of effective messaging Role of media in a campaign Responding to attacks from opponents Time management and discipline Creating a campaign calendar to achieve set goals | Can't attend a BIAW Candidate School? Let us know about your intent to run as a candidate in the 2023/2024 election cycle by filling out and we will let you know about future candidate schools as they are scheduled! | "Register for upcoming Candidate School" | "Let us know you are interested in running!" | | Grassroots Leadership Trainings | Get involved - join our Political Director at one of his upcoming volunteer trainings, through the clicking the image below, or contact Matthew Frohlich at mailto:matthew@wsrp.org for more information! Upcoming dates and locations include: April 20th at 6PM in Kent April 22nd at 10AM in Tumwater April 22nd at 3:30PM in Okanogan April 29th at 3PM in Okanogan May 2nd at 6:30PM in Bellevue May 9th at 6PM in West Seattle May 10th at 6:30PM in Marysville May 13th at 10AM in Ocean Shores With more dates and locations being scheduled! | | "Join the Team - Sign up for a Grassroots Leadership Training Today!" | | Olympia Watch | | SB 5599 | SB 5599 is a deeply concerning bill getting national attention right now, and rightly so. This bill allows shelters to hide runaway or homeless youth without parental permission. This effectively bypasses parental consent, separating loving parents from their children without even notifying the parent. This bill removes a parent's ability to protect and make important decisions for their children. Moreover, the bill allows host homes to house youth without parental permission if the youth is seeking or receiving protected health care services, including gender reassignment services, further undermining parental authority. This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing. | SB 5770 | Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure. This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds. | HB 1240 | HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons: 1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence. 2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers. 3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups. Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens. | Blake Fix | Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction. Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority. Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state. | SB 5082 | SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people. | Capital Gains Tax Ruling | The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes. In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: who will they target next? | | Join the Team! | Become a Sustaining Member of the Washington State Republican Party and help us build a stronger, more vibrant conservative movement in our state. Your contribution is crucial in supporting our ongoing efforts to promote Republican values and candidates throughout Washington. When you sign up as a Sustaining Member, you'll receive a personalized membership card that signifies your commitment and support for the Republican Party in Washington State. This card represents your dedication to advancing our shared goals, and your role in shaping a brighter future for our communities. | | "Become a Sustaining Member Today!" | Your monthly contribution will help us bring the fight to the Democrats in key 2023 local races across our state and in 2024 fight to end the Democrat majority, Take back the 3rd Congressional District and Flip the 8th, and bring Republicans back into statewide offices! | | WSRP Storefront | | | In the News: | National Local WAGOP in the news | | "Contribute to our efforts to elect Republicans in 2023 and beyond!" | Contact: Benjamin Gonzalez Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 mailto:ben@wsrp.org | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. name: Josh Harder
subject: my thoughts on Clarence Thomas scandal
body:
Undisclosed gifts like superyachts, private resorts, even buying his mother’s house? The fact that the public had no knowledge a GOP activist is bankrolling a Supreme Court Justice for decades is absolutely unacceptable. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62022630/402030313/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTY5M2NiYjktZTdkZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oM1DwuRGUQnz_6dh27UZyb6EOaJg_2ZgVr2bKMjBAFk=) | Peter, I’m still in a state of disbelief with all these stories about Clarence Thomas’ corrupt relationship with GOP billionaire Harlan Crow. Undisclosed gifts like superyachts, private resorts, even buying his mother’s house? The fact that the public had _no knowledge_ a GOP activist is bankrolling a Supreme Court Justice for decades is absolutely unacceptable. **This is a big deal for one very clear reason:** Clarence Thomas has written numerous decisions with vast impact on our lives and our democracy - all the while being secretly funded by a GOP billionaire activist. _And this all happened because the Supreme Court currently has no real code of ethics._ That’s why I support a new important bill: the Supreme Court Ethics Act. This bill will establish new rules of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas, similar to the rules that are applied to me and every other member of Congress. [_**But I need your help to show my colleagues how much support this bill really has! clean_body: Undisclosed gifts like superyachts, private resorts, even buying his mother’s house? The fact that the public had no knowledge a GOP activist is bankrolling a Supreme Court Justice for decades is absolutely unacceptable. | = | Peter, I’m still in a state of disbelief with all these stories about Clarence Thomas’ corrupt relationship with GOP billionaire Harlan Crow. Undisclosed gifts like superyachts, private resorts, even buying his mother’s house? The fact that the public had no knowledge a GOP activist is bankrolling a Supreme Court Justice for decades is absolutely unacceptable. This is a big deal for one very clear reason: Clarence Thomas has written numerous decisions with vast impact on our lives and our democracy - all the while being secretly funded by a GOP billionaire activist. And this all happened because the Supreme Court currently has no real code of ethics. That’s why I support a new important bill: the Supreme Court Ethics Act. This bill will establish new rules of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas, similar to the rules that are applied to me and every other member of Congress. This isn’t just about one corrupt Supreme Court Justice. This is about safeguarding our democracy. I refuse to let dark money flow into our politics at any level - whether it’s Congress, the Presidency or the Supreme Court. It’s despicable and we cannot let it continue. Let’s get this passed! \- Josh

subject: What I said to the RNC…

body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bc0a5aaacef4b2ab2c5dbf6ffb73f00&_e=qXR9ixjcAgDKLnnCT8fHWNXB_CTuhIV8vu0lievub8QZj4EBvDqlvmodbzBLqBTNTZKK3ftX529f1p1ycoNH9rKauaBsvpSwBRhFUGZBfH5zpHdjDyh9fsgkSrJMg6BnHNVEzHKkdjoo3AKaQ13BOtgeYJXszFsJQo-bNK74aAzjxdSVXNxOpAd_fadV6ZA-iqt9B9lt63vaIxUw0UhPy0EzN3HtGIpJQjdqJQ94MtDyLBIpAsby9rSLwDbtOuRw8Au7blhNChO1rvy8bzLK6gyo7Rjnd782rlSV7kfpW-lrsEbfvWTPEdg7d5ly1gdXGDo4WhTVL5TQE9h4JlQY0JWiFxD348v0-BjvLg5_pgb_U2DmOVjsCvGS-pdkJc3y9Q8D2hQOjngmhIkEf9wFiw%3D%3D)

| | Friend,

---
I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_" The old Republican Party is gone, and it's never coming back."_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America's interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don't forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin - states that Republicans hadn't won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn't win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party 's only hope at survival. _
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win - or we lose America for good.
---

name: Team AOC
subject: Thank you from AOC & our team ​​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, we wanted to thank you for being a part of our campaign for transformative change in Washington »
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230419.wPUamR&refcode=em20230419-4161-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4161%2E2526796%2EvmQQng)
Because of your support, Alexandria has been a relentless force for progress since 2018 and has stood with the working families of NY-14 every single step of the way — from supporting Starbucks workers unionizing, to speaking out against monopolistic billionaires, to setting up a ‘homework helpers’ tutoring program for students in NY-14.
All of this work is made possible because of the collective power of our movement, and people like you contributing what they can to help build a brighter future for all people across the country.
[Will you contribute $3 right now in order to support Alexandria and our entire movement as we continue to build this campaign and push for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230419.wPUamR&refcode=em20230419-4161-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4161%2E2526796%2EvmQQng)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230419.wPUamR&refcode=em20230419-4161-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4161%2E2526796%2EvmQQng)**
Alexandria and our team are so grateful for your support. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, thank you so much for being a key part of this people-powered movement.
Pa'lante,
Team AOC

All of this work is made possible because of the collective power of our movement, and people like you contributing what they can to help build a brighter future for all people across the country. Alexandria and our team are so grateful for your support. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, thank you so much for being a key part of this people-powered movement. body:
: Keeping Helen’s ads on TV costs money. A lot of it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62025704/402032319/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230419_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTNjMTYxNi1lYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejxvUPt4xtz5rBOHj0zHSkqDg8-Uihb1AQdfvaqwaMM=)
---
I’ll be blunt: Keeping Helen’s ads on TV costs money. A lot of it. Every day, my team and I check our fundraising numbers to determine how much we can budget to keep our message in front of Philly voters. We make these decisions a few days at a time — because unlike our opponents, we rely on thousands of grassroots donations instead of writing ourselves massive checks. **One of our top priorities is raising enough (from emails like this one) to keep Helen on TV every day until May 16th.**[**Can you please make a donation of any amount so we can keep running TV ads and working to elect Helen?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62025708/402032321/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230419_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTNjMTYxNi1lYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejxvUPt4xtz5rBOHj0zHSkqDg8-Uihb1AQdfvaqwaMM=) | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62025712/402032323/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230419_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTNjMTYxNi1lYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejxvUPt4xtz5rBOHj0zHSkqDg8-Uihb1AQdfvaqwaMM=)
---
Keeping our ads up every day is mission critical because our self-funding millionaire opponents have been dominating the airwaves for months already. We can bet they’ll spend even more down the homestretch, so we could really use your support at the critical turning point.
It’s so important that we have resources necessary to keep spreading the word about Helen’s story and vision for a stronger, safer city — but we know this is something we can only do together.
**I’m hoping I can count on you.[Will you pitch in $20.23, or whatever you can donate right now, to help keep our ads on air and make sure our message for a safer, thriving Philadelphia reaches as many voters as possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62025715/402032325/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230419_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTNjMTYxNi1lYWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejxvUPt4xtz5rBOHj0zHSkqDg8-Uihb1AQdfvaqwaMM=)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Trans Radicalism
body:
Last night, I gave a speech at the University of South Carolina, but that was ONLY after radical Trans activists tried to shut down the event. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F1EwfwcbIsDw3VwSLDaAO6A%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/1/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/lQ0haQyR9xnE-KUY0BFJ8DoJg2E=318) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F1EwfwcbIsDw3VwSLDaAO6A%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/2/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/ClVJPp1XlrFO9zXbRHDdciSkjIw=318) Dear Friend,

Last night, I gave a speech at the University of South Carolina, but that was ONLY after radical Trans activists tried to shut down the event.

The original venue, the Graduate Hotel, cancelled the reservation for the event at the last minute due to pressure and violent threats made by hate-filled Trans disruptors.

Ironically, the Trans organization that wanted to silence me led their call-to-action by tweeting:

"Fascist former political candidate Laura Loomer will be speaking tonight . . . Come rally against her and show that hate won't go unanswered!"

They should take their own advice! Hate won't go unanswered, so [please click here to send a tweet](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F1EwfwcbIsDw3VwSLDaAO6A%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/3/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/XQu8KxD9l3laO96hVf2eah2PF_I=318) to these hate-filled Trans activists by telling them:
"Hey @sc_oat, you enjoy the freedom to promote your lifestyle, so why would you want to stop @LauraLoomer from speaking out against censorship? Stop your hate and be brave enough to invite Laura back to @UofSC to debate your best trans activists! #Loomered #TRANtifa"

Their attack on me is pretty ridiculous, as I don't spend most of my time speaking about Trans athletes or the LGBTQ community . . . but I'll be sure to add it to my list!

Now, whether it's Trans groups or ANTIFA, Leftists are the most INTOLERANT people you will ever have the misfortune of running into.

And I'm sure you can relate. Whether you've experienced this at a family gathering, college campus, or the workplace, there's always at least one intolerant Leftist who gets red-in-the-face mad over the presence of any conservative opinions.

And that's their weakness . . . they can't debate because they cannot think for themselves.

And why is that?

Because their groupthink is propagated by Leftist controlled social media platforms that AMPLIFY the Left while silencing the Right . . . which is exactly what that Trans group tried to do to me last night.

And that's why we must keep fighting back!

So after you send that tweet (if you're on Twitter), [ please support my work and my ongoing lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia so we can put an end to Big Tech's enabling of Leftist insanity. ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F1EwfwcbIsDw3VwSLDaAO6A%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/4/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/68wUxFQWynl2SEDjFYj5S-bABAA=318)

My case continues to advance, and [I can only keep fighting with your continued support](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F1EwfwcbIsDw3VwSLDaAO6A%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/5/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/2yCindwXEf81PhWTAtIHujTAxpk=318).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

[View Web Version](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fw%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FK892bQLSTSCT5SUN0ZcP1oQA/1/010001879b0caf3b-bfeed8ca-c3c8-4909-9b66-81a89d70d552-000000/2omg5yZoQQsmFWuvWdoGI1HdT-U=318) **

body:

| This is Speaker McCarthy and it's urgent that I hear from you.

I promised that when we took back the House and FIRED Nancy Pelosi, things would change, and we would deliver results.

We are now in a position to do so. I'm reaching out to my top patriots for their priorities, input, and feedback.

body:
We can’t afford to let our foot off the gas, especially when the GOP has listed us as a top 2024 target.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026895/402034163/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=)

Hey folks, can we get just a moment to go over something with you? Since the 2022 election, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from folks like you [**chipping in what they can**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026896/402034165/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=) to show that they still have Andrea’s back as we prepare for the challenges ahead. But here’s the thing: That surge of momentum has started to slow down, and right now we’re behind on our online fundraising. **We can’t afford to let our foot off the gas,_especially when the GOP has listed us as a top 2024 target._** We’ve been reviewing the numbers, and we calculated that if we raise [**just $3,000**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026899/402034166/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=) by Thursday night, we can get back on track to building our campaign’s grassroots base and having the resources we need to keep Andrea in Congress. [**Team, keeping up our momentum has never been more important than it is right now. So, can you chip in to help us meet our $3,000 goal, build our team, and ensure we have the resources we need to reelect Andrea?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026901/402034168/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _ | _[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026902/402034170/-388004332?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=)_ | _[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62026903/402034171/-388004332?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_ts_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmRiYmVkYi1lYmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVW48WA9UOmhCPxhKj5m7Y1GA1LtBIKR2Ae7JlQNG8w=)_

clean_body: We can’t afford to let our foot off the gas, especially when the GOP has listed us as a top 2024 target. = Hey folks, can we get just a moment to go over something with you? Since the 2022 election, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from folks like you = to show that they still have Andrea’s back as we prepare for the challenges ahead. But here’s the thing: That surge of momentum has started to slow down, and right now we’re behind on our online fundraising. We can’t afford to let our foot off the gas,especially when the GOP has listed us as a top 2024 target. We’ve been reviewing the numbers, and we calculated that if we raise = by Thursday night, we can get back on track to building our campaign’s grassroots base and having the resources we need to keep Andrea in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = We know that if everyone reading this email chips in what they can spare today, we’ll be able to reach this goal right away. subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Funding for EcoHealth/Wuhan Institute Research to Create Coronavirus ‘Mutants’
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it received 552 pages of records
from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which
include the initial grant application and annual reports to the
National Institutes of Health (NIH) from EcoHealth Alliance,
describing the aim of its work with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in
China to create mutant viruses “to better predict the capacity of
our CoVs [coronaviruses] to infect people.”

name: Keep PA-17 Blue
subject: 3 updates you need to know today, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
There have been major updates in our campaign to keep Chris in Congress, so we wanted to bring you up to speed.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62027057/402035137/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_kpa17b_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjViNTI4ZC1lY2RlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtwfqy9uDHAwSut_7bMfT5aOqwgCSKaPraEGK2pfVEs=) Derek, there have been major updates in our campaign to keep Chris in Congress, so we wanted to bring you up to speed.

**First:** A federal judge in Texas has reversed the Food and Drug Administration's approval of the abortion pill, potentially ending access to medical abortion and **proving how important it is to have pro-choice advocates like Chris fighting for us in Congress.**

**Then:** Chris’s first 2024 opponent launched his campaign, and Republican strategists rushed to support him, which signals to us that **the national GOP is laser focused on defeating Chris and instilling a radical Republican in his place.**

**Now:** Our April fundraising has dipped, and with so much on the line and Republicans watching our race closely, **_we can’t afford to lose momentum._**

body:
| | | Fellow Patriot,

Corporate America has stooped to a new low.

Bud Light, a supposed all-American brand, is celebrating a delusional **MAN** who’s pretending to be a woman.

I know one thing for certain: I won’t be serving Bud Light at my family’s next barbecue.

_**In Mississippi, we believe in basic science, and that means men are men and women are women.**_

[**Join us today to stand for basic science and make America sane again!**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=2f45f26659ab4bcc841304e56564270a&_e=7h8MMLjBlJYrERpI9L4pmXURG4l8AjHR9AD-Us4mZYtAfgNJzr7-FF4YENRco1QvzPBpmaYWV7dC5nPlpeLhiUkWwskPLTPYUH1Qjdjc9rV1pRXhJJ2f5ZwRbrCAEepTyPRGg-N5d8YWUtAekFFjQ_rQFYs8yDbGUSGvF1EWmaIZr_zO-xJOx0KNVejQ3qvYSjPg77BF3FywUcMMEDrKT6EKH1pKerzBKPK9MtWYw9YrarH5K4OlHD0Zv1wqL0my77gS8JCQXj1nRZoqijWDrZtonsZYio9g9TxE1an0hk0Tvydxs9KBFmWq3uflWeAVyrbzYrFpEG8gHZ982fxLDsqeGd_wOtnOu5wYvxSNPkA%3D)

clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, Corporate America has stooped to a new low. Bud Light, a supposed all-American brand, is celebrating a delusional MAN who’s pretending to be a woman. I know one thing for certain: I won’t be serving Bud Light at my family’s next barbecue. In Mississippi, we believe in basic science, and that means men are men and women are women. As Governor, I’m doing everything I can to stop this madness from poisoning our children. That means banning the transgender lie in schools and stopping far-Left doctors from treating our kids like hormone guinea pigs. I’m not afraid to get blowback from the insane Left - and trust me, we’ve gotten a LOT for our strong stance on science. But now, they’re putting MILLIONS to try and bring their lies to Mississippi, and I need your help to keep them OUT and keep our kids safe. | | Thank you, Gov. Tate Reeves | | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

name: Team Tina
subject: Tina’s first 100 days in office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, **Today marks Tina’s 100th day in office!** What Governor Kotek has been able to achieve in her first 100 days is significant, so we’re taking a well-deserved moment to celebrate the progress made — as well as acknowledge the progress that still needs to be made. From her first day in office, Tina made it clear her administration would be laser-focused on making life better for Oregonians in three main priority areas: Housing and homelessness, mental health and addiction services, and early literacy. On housing, Tina’s proud of the recently signed Housing Emergency Response Package — a down payment on all the work needed to solve the housing and homelessness crisis. **Oregon is getting to work building more affordable housing, adding shelter beds, preventing evictions, and more. ** On education, Tina’s excited about the progress on the bipartisan Early Literacy Success Initiative, which would invest $120 million into schools, community organizations, and tribes in order to boost childhood literacy rates. On behavioral health, Tina is doubling down on her commitment to decrease preventable deaths due to substance abuse or mental health issues, support the behavioral health workforce, and disrupt the homelessness-jail-hospital pipeline. **There’s still more work to be done, but in her first 100 days Tina has proven that her administration has what it takes to deliver results and put Oregon on a brighter path. ** [_**Peter, sign the card congratulating Governor Kotek on a remarkable first 100 days in office! There’s even a spot to leave a personal note for Tina.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62027653/402038923/526288790?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxODg5OS1lZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qXe-fsVmaBDmOKLp4cECoSbI8TdcKGfWwqSwb5Ww_M=&emci=8aafc6a0-e6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14c18899-edde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729) | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62027654/402038924/526288790?contactdata=+F9swvNN5zFsWIzL0kkPoJGLRrfeAgZ8Thk97KcR/mY3G7vGztYolzGrCHqNZpU8OUl5ykjNsXgbtusRUax27nFww4DW53nz58kWWPaaF3dH0M2VoP4/4lrDicWxAUiV9HlgoSiF5vqkFQ69hDQKfH58cLMUHqgnU27JEUNTtQY=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxODg5OS1lZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qXe-fsVmaBDmOKLp4cECoSbI8TdcKGfWwqSwb5Ww_M=&emci=8aafc6a0-e6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14c18899-edde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)
---
As Tina said today, “to get big things done, we must first believe they are possible – and in Oregon, we do believe in the possible.”
Thanks for believing in the possible with us, Peter, and for helping us get the big things done.
— Team Tina
P.S. Check out Tina talk about her first 100 days in this [**new video she posted on Twitter!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62027655/402038925/-489086411?s=20&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxODg5OS1lZGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qXe-fsVmaBDmOKLp4cECoSbI8TdcKGfWwqSwb5Ww_M=&emci=8aafc6a0-e6de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14c18899-edde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)

name: VADEMS
subject: The GOP War Chest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Youngkin raised over 2.6 million dollars in the first quarter

|
---
Derek, The Quarter 1 finance reports make it clear, we are up against vast amounts of Republican Dark Money. Glenn Youngkin has raised $2.6 million since the start of the year! The governor isn’t allowed to raise money during the General Assembly Session so this $2,600,000 is just the beginning. The GOP work tirelessly to expand their influence and is constantly trying to undo all the progress we’ve made throughout the Commonwealth. They will do whatever it takes to take Virginia backwards and they have the donors who will help them every step of the way! Virginia Republicans will continue to fill their coffers with dark money millions. The GOP work tirelessly to expand their influence and is constantly trying to undo all the progress we’ve made throughout the Commonwealth. name: Katie Porter
subject: Corrupt, not just conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
There are changes we can make to reform the Court and restore peoples’ trust in democracy.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21485%2E3422442%2E1nU1CY)
Derek,
As we wait for the Supreme Court to determine the fate of a commonly used abortion medication, we’re once again reminded how badly the Court needs reforms.
Our democracy is only as strong as people's trust in it, and Americans are right to question if their government is really working for them. In the Senate, I’d support broad changes to the Supreme Court like:
* Expanding the number of justices
* Implementing term limits
* Creating a judicial code of ethics

Right now, the Supreme Court doesn’t just lean conservative, it’s straight up corrupt. **Just look at Justice Clarence Thomas’ long list of ethics scandals, or at the cases the Court even bothers to take up—the Court is clearly beholden to a handful of Republican mega-donors.**
One of my top priorities is taking on the greed and corruption that has been part of Washington for far too long. [**If you’re with me, consider donating to our campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230419-1?refcode=EMAG19_1_SCO_20230419_V1_F&refcode2=21485_3422442_1nU1CY&akid=21485%2E3422442%2E1nU1CY)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230419-1?refcode=EMAG19_1_SCO_20230419_V1_F&refcode2=21485_3422442_1nU1CY&akid=21485%2E3422442%2E1nU1CY)**
Thanks for your support,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG19_1_SCO_20230419_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21485_3422442_1nU1CY&akid=21485%2E3422442%2E1nU1CY)**

subject: debt in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
the long and short of it is that in order to win New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat, our campaign went into debt.
| | |
---
Hi – the long and short of it is that in order to win New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat, our campaign went into debt.

We have no doubt that it was the right thing to do (polls were so tight!). But now, our fundraising has come to a screeching halt compared to what we raised around Election Day, and we’ve still got some pretty big bills left to pay.

We know we ask a lot of you, but this is a really important one:

**[Will you please kick in $3 or more to help get these final bills paid?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62028362/402042339/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2259-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE4YTFmMy1mMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GR8TkbLNAx0eRqHDFimwruEi9NyJ1fywmVUObovW404=)** With the GOP now in control of the House and pundits already saying 2024 will be tough for Dems, we need to put this to bed ASAP. You’re a top supporter, so we felt like we could ask you.

Here’s the link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62028363/402042340/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2259-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE4YTFmMy1mMGRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GR8TkbLNAx0eRqHDFimwruEi9NyJ1fywmVUObovW404=)**

Thank you _very_ much.

Team Maggie

Look, Bob did EVERYTHING in his power to support me in 2022 — and I couldn’t have won without his support. So we can’t let these new attacks on him slide. **[Will you chip in right now to defend Bob against Mitch McConnell + the GOP? clean_body: This is really worrying, Peter. The Senate Republican campaign arm released an ad attacking my friend Bob Casey ...less than 24 freakin’ hours after he announced his re-election campaign. Look, Bob did EVERYTHING in his power to support me in 2022 — and I couldn’t have won without his support. So we can’t let these new attacks on him slide. = = I’m not gonna lie...this is just the beginning, Peter. Take it from me — you can bet that Republicans are going to dump hundreds of million$ into gross, misleading ads in PA’s Senate race. In fact, this is going to be one of the most competitive + expensive races of 2024!! So here’s the deal. If we’re serious about winning this thing, we need to start building up our grassroots resources NOW to ensure we can keep Bob in the Senate to fight alongside me for working Pennsylvanians. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Much love, John 💛 PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: My first 100 days highlights ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
In my first 100 days in Congress, here's what we've already gotten done:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62028620/402043538/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230419100DaysHighlights_NB_8_TESTB&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc1YmRhMC1mMmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7luT142a7zD1Gwf9_y7Iwpdj3ChrTCoQIdR01qBILc=)
Hi, team. I just wrapped up my first 100 days in Congress, and I’m happy to say we’ve truly hit the ground running. Here are some of the things I’ve been working on as the Representative for central and southern Illinois:

➡️ Building bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and deliver real results for our families and communities

➡️ Providing training opportunities for job seekers and strengthening our workforce to help small businesses

➡️ Protecting our farmers by bolstering crop insurance programs, and investing in rural development initiatives

➡️ Ensuring access to quality healthcare services for our veterans, especially in underserved areas

➡️ Visiting every single county in our newly drawn 13th district to meet with constituents and hear firsthand the things you care about most
[I’m so proud of all that we’ve accomplished already, and I’m already back in Washington working to keep our momentum going. Can you support my fight for working families in Congress by chipping in $3, $10, or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62028621/402043539/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230419100DaysHighlights_NB_8_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc1YmRhMC1mMmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7luT142a7zD1Gwf9_y7Iwpdj3ChrTCoQIdR01qBILc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62028622/402043540/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230419100DaysHighlights_NB_8_TESTB_EL3&amount=3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc1YmRhMC1mMmRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7luT142a7zD1Gwf9_y7Iwpdj3ChrTCoQIdR01qBILc=)

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Our ads are live!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PACGeorgia House Democratic Caucus
body:
Friend,

Georgia House Democrats are going on offense earlier than ever before to take the Majority and deliver on our vision of a better Georgia... That starts now.

We are excited to announce the launch of our first digital advertising campaign to hold House Republicans accountable for their bad votes during the Legislative Session.

These radical Republicans are trying to masquerade as “moderates,” but Georgians deserve the truth. Georgians deserve to know that they are supporting the GOP’s extremist agenda that hurts children and families and that they are helping advance the culture war that attacks our Democratic values. We won’t stand for it.

Georgia House Democrats are holding radical Republicans accountable, but we need your help to show Georgians the truth. Can you chip in $10, $25 or even $50 today?

DONATE HERE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots

By giving just $10, you're ensuring that these ads will reach 1,000 more potential voters!

House Democratic Leader James Beverly said it best: “We must do better, for all Georgians. The votes of House Republicans have made their extreme priorities clear - defunding public education, eroding our voting rights, and failing to address the gun violence epidemic.”

Help us tell radical Republicans that their extreme agenda and culture wars don’t reflect our values. Will you stand with us and help us get our message out to as many Georgians as possible?

Chip in to keep our digital ads online and support our efforts to replace these extreme House Republicans! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

--

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?
DONATE TODAY >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots

Paid for by Georgia Blue PACGeorgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: my opponent loaned himself $𝟮 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
We wanted to make sure you didn't miss this, Peter:
A Nashville mayoral candidate and former finance executive loaned his campaign a whopping $2 million.
This isn’t just about funding. It's about making sure we elect a mayor who truly serves the people, not himself. Greed drives so much of our political process right now, and the last thing we need is a Mayor who’s driven by profit.
Peter, let me be clear: Nashville can't be bought. We don't need $2 million today to win this election. Our people-powered agenda has drawn grassroots support from all over Nashville, and with your help, we can stand united and reject a millionaire candidate trying to buy Nashville. Can you counter his $2 million with a flood of $20 grassroots contributions today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
GIVE $20 TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
Peter, Nashville is full of working-class families, some of whom budget paycheck-to-paycheck just to get by. We value pulling up our sleeves, helping our neighbors, and truly looking out for each other
Solutions for Nashville’s affordability crisis will come from problem-solvers and public servants – not from the big money moguls who got us into this situation.
But my opponent is a finance millionaire with deep pockets and special interest support. He won’t focus on lowering costs or delivering on our values.
If we want to make Nashville a better place for everyone , we need to make sure we have the resources to keep up.
Peter, Nashville can't be bought. With your help, our people-powered campaign WILL beat our millionaire opponent—can you chip in $20 or more today to keep our grassroots momentum going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230419_em_fr_b1_HC_initial&amount=20]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:

We don't need $2 million today to win this election. Our people-powered agenda has drawn grassroots support from all over Nashville, and with your help, we can stand united and reject a millionaire candidate trying to buy Nashville. Can you counter his $2 million with a flood of $20 grassroots contributions today? >> [] GIVE $20 TODAY [] Peter, Nashville is full of working-class families, some of whom budget paycheck-to-paycheck just to get by. We value pulling up our sleeves, helping our neighbors, and truly looking out for each other Solutions for Nashville’s affordability crisis will come from problem-solvers and public servants – not from the big money moguls who got us into this situation. But my opponent is a finance millionaire with deep pockets and special interest support. He won’t focus on lowering costs or delivering on our values. If we want to make Nashville a better place for everyone , we need to make sure we have the resources to keep up. Peter, Nashville can't be bought. With your help, our people-powered campaign WILL beat our millionaire opponent—can you chip in $20 or more today to keep our grassroots momentum going? [] DONATE [] With gratitude, Heidi Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. Box 330302 Nashville, Tennessee 37203 SUPPORT HEIDI [] Paid for by Campbell for Mayor Chip Forrester, Treasurer Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer Campbell for Mayor PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: we missed this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Hi ,
Yesterday, I reached out to my most trusted supporters – including you – because our fundraising for April is pacing a bit behind.
We needed to raise $2,500. We didn’t get there.
All hope isn’t lost though. If just 3 folks kick in $10 in the next hour or so, we’ll be in much better shape. Can I count on you to be one of them, please? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230419_onedayfollowup]
I know it might sound crazy that 3 donations could make a huge difference. But so much of my campaign’s power comes from folks like you giving to emails like this one. If we fall even a little bit short of projections for even a few days, it adds up.
I rely on emails like this one to power my campaign because it allows me to focus on important issues like climate change, abortion access, and gun safety. That’s especially important since Republicans hold the majority and are doing everything they can to throw up roadblocks.
I have to ask one more time: Will you please rush a donation of $10 or more right now so that I can keep focusing on fighting for the most important issues of our time? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230419_onedayfollowup]
Thank you,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: I’m fighting for your reproductive care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
I'm proud to be at the forefront of this fight. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=f93c820183&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter \-- our healthcare is under attack.

In Texas, an unprecedented federal ruling by a Trump-appointed judge attempted to suspend the approval of the safe and effective abortion drug, mifepristone. In Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis signed an extremist six-week abortion ban, which is before many people even know they are pregnant.

But here in New York, I've been hard at work, preparing to stand up to attacks like these for years. And I'm not backing down now.

[**Help me continue this fight with a donation to my re-election campaign today.**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=34afa46668&e=2de202398d)

On the City Council, I created the first Abortion Access Fund so that anyone who comes to New York can receive abortion care. I introduced and passed legislation to make mifepristone, as well as long-acting reversible contraception, available at public clinics to anyone who walks in the door.

I'm proud to be at the forefront of this fight, working to lay the groundwork to ensure New York remains an abortion haven for all -- those who call our city home and every person who comes here seeking care.

I'm running for re-election so I can keep New York leading the nation forward on reproductive rights. [**Will you chip in today?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=a344bc0f1f&e=2de202398d)

Thank you,
Carlina
---

clean_body: I'm proud to be at the forefront of this fight. | | | | | Peter \-- our healthcare is under attack. In Texas, an unprecedented federal ruling by a Trump-appointed judge attempted to suspend the approval of the safe and effective abortion drug, mifepristone. In Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis signed an extremist six-week abortion ban, which is before many people even know they are pregnant. But here in New York, I've been hard at work, preparing to stand up to attacks like these for years. And I'm not backing down now. On the City Council, I created the first Abortion Access Fund so that anyone who comes to New York can receive abortion care. I introduced and passed legislation to make mifepristone, as well as long-acting reversible contraception, available at public clinics to anyone who walks in the door. I'm proud to be at the forefront of this fight, working to lay the groundwork to ensure New York remains an abortion haven for all -- those who call our city home and every person who comes here seeking care. I'm running for re-election so I can keep New York leading the nation forward on reproductive rights. Thank you, Carlina | | | | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Carlina 2023, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: Update From Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5e29c2204ebf/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9324077?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| I didn't run for Congress to make promises - I ran to deliver on them. And with just over 100 days in office, I'm proud to say we are making significant progress on key issues facing Upstate New York.

>From lowering costs and strengthening public safety, to delivering support for our veterans, farmers and small businesses - I've worked with members from across the aisle to across the country - anyone who is willing to honestly and earnestly take on the important issues and deliver results.

There's still a lot of work to do, but I'll continue to work hard every step of the way, and fight to ensure Upstate has a strong voice in Congress.
---
|
---
| |
---
**_LISTENING TO THE PEOPLE_**

I've already held over 200 meetings, hosted an 11 county townhall tour (and stopped at quite a few Stewarts along the way!)

Be sure to follow me on [Facebook ](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=65bf45f9b9&e=a39a20e5dd)and [Instagram ](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=36e33b652d&e=a39a20e5dd)to stay up to date!
---
|
---
| |
---
**_DELIVERING RESULTS_**

In the first 100 days, I've worked hard to deliver for Upstate. Here is some recent news coverage outlining what's been accomplished so far, and what's to come:

\- "[Molinaro Recaps His First 100 Days in Office](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=e6b57a58ec&e=a39a20e5dd)"
\- "[Rep. Molinaro shares progress report after first 100 days in office](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=8c1749d871&e=a39a20e5dd)"
---
|
---
| |
---
**_FUNDRAISING RECORD!_**

Despite the message we sent last November, and despite all the bipartisan work we've done, the Washington DC elite are going to try again to buy this seat in 2024. They've pledged tens of millions of dollars, and a familiar face - DC lawyer Josh Riley - has already announced he's running again.
---
| But we're not going to let them. With your support, we set a record in the 1st quarter, raising $640,000!

**Can you help me keep the momentum going? Every donation, every dollar, makes a difference.**
---

subject: bringing the voices of Rhode Islanders to Washington
