body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=7jvuUAad%2FURUxa6EAvaWg1cqZ8j%2FO0uboSL8vxerYu1u35LDaiW1JP55DhgRwAOOUP6evmS9dtrFNZjUwjjXVVOhI8o95syvvOT5X6I1bZDb%2BgSe34cOokRu%2FF30aLHAIkBMg8L5nWI6QAJrRpp6OahwIV3T0B%2Bx6cB4BdV9Q0YmQx%2Bzp4cMjturyMRWXBj8A%2FtFVDEspuZI7D3YVwQJdRipKesy%2BrgDGy9PyFdYq27UKtLis0NORgcWplwtVzFuhggnKji%2FMEBZr%2BGEsfDwjq04q8xH%2BJNDKe6g6lcBSEeDGNeT5ZWMsEuEOYRw4Zbk0FqGbKn8ThXTjtn%2B%2FnCZX7KMO6QJ3EtGkgquqFzcg4npkwWQPt7%2FlWkOGolE47D3eIDlbi3ZrL1BKsJuSSuFBJzsnL2cUQGpYgvBtdaUa4i1QT8NB21J78GPKjXWw4sw)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

It’s Seth Magaziner. I’m a few months into my first term representing Rhode Island’s 2nd district in Congress and I wanted to check in and share some updates with you.

I’ve been named to the House Natural Resources and Homeland Security Committees.

**On the Natural Resources Committee, my work will focus on how affordable clean energy will impact the economy in Rhode Island.** I’m looking forward to working with my colleagues to invest in Rhode Island’s Blue Economy and the transition to affordable clean energy.

**And on the Homeland Security Committee, I will work tirelessly to defend our democracy and combat violent domestic extremism.** Ensuring the safety and security of our nation and every American is central to my work, and I take the responsibility I’ve been given seriously as I begin my work on this critical committee, including in my role as Ranking Member on the Counterterrorism and Intelligence Subcommittee.

**I’m excited to bring the voices of Rhode Islanders to these two very important committees and will be sure to keep you updated on my work.**

Along with serving on these committees, my team and I have hit the ground running, focusing on strengthening our economy, lowering costs for working people, expanding access to healthcare, and making Rhode Island communities safer. I’ve already co-sponsored a national ban on assault weapons and bipartisan legislation that would ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.

**During my first remarks on the House floor, I made clear my commitment to delivering for Rhode Island’s working people.** I’m focused on fighting for all Rhode Islanders to have access to a middle-class life, the security of a dignified retirement plan, and the promise of a better future for the next generation. That’s what I want for my young son, Max, and what I’m fighting for every day in Congress.

[These are my priorities, and now I want to hear what you are thinking about. Peter, can you take two minutes to share your thoughts on the most pressing issues facing Rhode Island’s families? Your input is critical to my work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62030233/402050053/1212879991?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230419_SV_priorites_0_200DO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_priorities.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA5YjQ1Ni1mOWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwEGSYmbm4wK5nJdUSxXDj0gGgJ0il8bE6XxaEFQ11A=&emci=7d68f79a-f5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4809b456-f9de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

clean_body: Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, It’s Seth Magaziner. I’m a few months into my first term representing Rhode Island’s 2nd district in Congress and I wanted to check in and share some updates with you. I’ve been named to the House Natural Resources and Homeland Security Committees. On the Natural Resources Committee, my work will focus on how affordable clean energy will impact the economy in Rhode Island. I’m looking forward to working with my colleagues to invest in Rhode Island’s Blue Economy and the transition to affordable clean energy. And on the Homeland Security Committee, I will work tirelessly to defend our democracy and combat violent domestic extremism. Ensuring the safety and security of our nation and every American is central to my work, and I take the responsibility I’ve been given seriously as I begin my work on this critical committee, including in my role as Ranking Member on the Counterterrorism and Intelligence Subcommittee. I’m excited to bring the voices of Rhode Islanders to these two very important committees and will be sure to keep you updated on my work. Along with serving on these committees, my team and I have hit the ground running, focusing on strengthening our economy, lowering costs for working people, expanding access to healthcare, and making Rhode Island communities safer. I’ve already co-sponsored a national ban on assault weapons and bipartisan legislation that would ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. During my first remarks on the House floor, I made clear my commitment to delivering for Rhode Island’s working people. I’m focused on fighting for all Rhode Islanders to have access to a middle-class life, the security of a dignified retirement plan, and the promise of a better future for the next generation. That’s what I want for my young son, Max, and what I’m fighting for every day in Congress. | Thank you so much for your continued support, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

President Trump just spoke to Breitbart news and **endorsed my plan to use the full resources of the American Military against deadly drug cartels in Mexico.**

I’m so grateful that President Trump took the time to endorse my plan.

_But now, I need to make sure my grassroots patriots force is on board._

[**I need you to officially endorse my plan to authorize military force against the deadly Mexican drug cartels today to bring law and order back to our border!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b7bd3ab011734ef0849375c567106d4f&_e=DNiSTiqHc0F1tigieKH8MjW7R4oEJ_wrZH3CksgOy_AcbhubOM50o8HpCgcfj6Mgdl4rrAj3isS15X6mr0K_iiOjMNrOiVmiD6sxHTjJGii32mE6v70YsPRABm_dHSbS7yBSvg2-FhZSox5fDYmVChjq4-0Gide7yDH22kJEAtmSn9WyV0997qfsQs_f683Mw8Bo9yxB8BBQis3X_KqqlZVNGcIS6aqEiuxZOVG6lcYkT4_hkDGzIuxXLyhzNvROkLhmNFRC5UDf0S_An0pdGr9fM5kGhNE6UPcYYfp0EwL5wmaWn4V0LAQfUb0ZDffGioe6_IgRdEFIqRWSODpz3KH4-GcMIKZQA_vQ6swVQS7Mm9FFcV6RX28lz-6oYZ1a)
---
[**ENDORSE THE PLAN**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b7bd3ab011734ef0849375c567106d4f&_e=DNiSTiqHc0F1tigieKH8MjW7R4oEJ_wrZH3CksgOy_AcbhubOM50o8HpCgcfj6Mgdl4rrAj3isS15X6mr0K_iiOjMNrOiVmiD6sxHTjJGii32mE6v70YsPRABm_dHSbS7yBSvg2-FhZSox5fDYmVChjq4-0Gide7yDH22kJEAtmSn9WyV0997qfsQs_f683Mw8Bo9yxB8BBQis3X_Kqqle3Roh9RF_0zWjdqBr1pGgXxE_x4AdTfdXJWNtlwlaL-etTGqgPPJ6dcYhYTEPgfb1pAHsE22nBNh-p4y6qMWaPWs3mBZq2qdEN7X22DJDELDEbm2ZDR1Ge7y4g6dZ6MgJ04MwEdWuTxFajfCOpvbuW2KwD_pdKXZx7i4y47u3Hx)

Let me break down why this is so important.

In order for the President to use military force, there must first be an Authorization of Military Force (AUMF) passed by Congress.

My plan would use an AUMF to give the President legal authority to use our military resources against the Mexican cartel.

Let me be clear: we’re not going to war with Mexico.

Instead, we’re using resources such as intelligence, surveillance, and state-of-the-art technology to better combat the effects of these lethal cartels here in the states.

Too many lives have been lost, from fentanyl overdoses to gang violence.

With my plan, that ends TODAY.

[**Endorse my plan to go after the cartels today and help us TAKE ON these violent criminals once and for all.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b7bd3ab011734ef0849375c567106d4f&_e=DNiSTiqHc0F1tigieKH8MjW7R4oEJ_wrZH3CksgOy_AcbhubOM50o8HpCgcfj6Mgdl4rrAj3isS15X6mr0K_iiOjMNrOiVmiD6sxHTjJGii32mE6v70YsPRABm_dHSbS7yBSvg2-FhZSox5fDYmVChjq4-0Gide7yDH22kJEAtmSn9WyV0997qfsQs_f683Mw8Bo9yxB8BBQis3X_KqqlYCdFeueZ1bmDYVMWJejX8sjyXQbdysVxs67UYiY4G6yYHx_Hq7ZY9FS0xs1YZiThvqcS9j1NWtmcQBOtY1eC4AZVxyK00n0_6YqyLR1nQEiXjsd3Dvbgk23TuVxYEUuplnItwkUUwnrtfN84vWD5iSj6Hm8vAIqwI7z0KPsIiVt)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: a red wave in New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

Friend, if you care about any of the issues that Democrats are fighting for, then you need to care about New York.
The truth is, my state was just hit by a red wave – one strong enough to help hand control of the House to Kevin McCarthy. Last year, Republicans here had their best election in _decades_ , flipping four congressional seats red and coming within striking distance of the governor's mansion.
**Now, they're targeting my seat for defeat and gearing up to expand on their gains last year. Rep. Elise Stefanik, one of Trump's most loyal supporters, just announced a brand-new battleground fund dedicated to reelecting New York Republicans like George Santos and flipping even more seats red.**
If Democrats want to defend our Senate majority or retake the House, we _must_ win in New York. And as the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket next year, I'm working overtime to make sure that happens. **But with GOP money pouring in already, I need your help.[Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to invest in this must-win state? clean_body: | | | Friend, if you care about any of the issues that Democrats are fighting for, then you need to care about New York. The truth is, my state was just hit by a red wave – one strong enough to help hand control of the House to Kevin McCarthy. Last year, Republicans here had their best election in decades , flipping four congressional seats red and coming within striking distance of the governor's mansion. Now, they're targeting my seat for defeat and gearing up to expand on their gains last year. Rep. Elise Stefanik, one of Trump's most loyal supporters, just announced a brand-new battleground fund dedicated to reelecting New York Republicans like George Santos and flipping even more seats red. If Democrats want to defend our Senate majority or retake the House, we must win in New York. And as the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket next year, I'm working overtime to make sure that happens. But with GOP money pouring in already, I need your help.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With immense gratitude, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Our children deserve a break from the Left’s woke propaganda. We need to stand up for them. Joe Biden and his liberal administration have been advocating for the few at the expense of our children’s future. I won't stand for it. I intend to fight for women and girls every day. Help me protect the next generation! God Bless, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Hunters are BRUTALLY KILLING wolf pups WITHOUT MERCY
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729193?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, imagine you are a newborn wolf pup. You are blissfully unaware of the dangers that the outside world holds. Inside the warmth and safety of your den, you enjoy playing with your siblings because you are a social animal who is part of a tight-knit family called a pack. Your mother provides all of the nurturing and nourishment that you and your fellow pups need before you’re strong enough to fend for yourselves. _**Life is good.**_ But one day, while you eagerly await for your mama wolf to return with food, you start to notice how cold and hungry you are becoming. _(Does she usually take this long?)_ _***BOOM!***_ You suddenly hear a LOUD, scary noise followed by a familiar voice. But this time, the voice isn’t the usual pleasant howling tone that you’re used to hearing when the adult wolves communicate. No, this sound is more like a sharp, uncontrollable shriek blended with yelping. As you rush to investigate, you are met with the horrifying sight of your mother __**crying in pain, helpless on the forest floor, covered in blood.**__ She has been viciously shot by **MERCILESS TROPHY HUNTERS,** and in just a few moments, she will take her very last breath, leaving you and your defenseless siblings orphaned -- likely to _**DIE OF STARVATION OR HYPOTHERMIA.**_ _As you’re reading this sad story,**defenseless pups** are living this tragic reality as harmless wolves are being _**SAVAGELY MASSACRED**_ in droves by cruel trophy hunters. _[**We MUST do something immediately to SAVE innocent wolves from being viciously murdered by brutal hunters. Please take action now, Friend >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729194?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729195?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Despite the _**declining wolf populations**_ prompting federal courts to re-list gray wolves under the Endangered Species Act in most of the lower 48 states, there are still some states with _**ZERO protections**_ for these treasured animals.
But that doesn’t seem to be enough for corrupt politicians and hunting lobbyists who are in the NRA’s pocket. GOP lawmakers like **Rep. Lauren Boebert** are currently proposing legislation that would _**REMOVE existing wolf protections**_ \-- leaving these vulnerable animals to be _**SLAUGHTERED**_ at the hands of ruthless hunters.
Unless the Biden Administration steps up and ensures the safety of these precious animals, trophy hunters could **__VIOLENTLY wipe them out forever.__ These beloved canines cannot speak for themselves, so they’re desperately counting on us to be their voice, Friend. [Will you DEMAND stronger protections for defenseless gray wolves before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729196?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729195?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for defending wolves,
Friends of the Earth**
|

These beloved canines cannot speak for themselves, so they’re desperately counting on us to be their voice, Friend. == == Thanks for defending wolves, Friends of the Earth** | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We will always advocate for human rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
major news:

Last week Jamaal Bowman and Bernie Sanders sent a letter to President
Biden, calling on his administration to ensure US military funding to
Israel doesn't support human rights violations.

Justice Democrats like Jamaal are speaking out for Palestinian human
rights. We will always advocate and push for Palestinian human rights.

But we know that AIPAC will be coming after us because they will attack
any group or candidate who stands up for freedom and equality for the
Palestinian people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133721?refcode=em20230419-28560&t=1001&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc ]Please, rush a $3 contribution right now to help us
recruit and support even more fighters who will speak out for Palestinian
human rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133721?refcode=em20230419-28560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc ]Contribute $3

The escalating violence in Israel-Palestine and actions of the new extreme
right-wing Israeli government are alarming, and unfortunately, instead of
condemning Israel’s human rights abuses, many Democrats and Republicans in
Congress are staying silent.

Justice Democrats have been outspoken about Palestinian human rights and
calling out abuses wherever they occur, and in response, far-right groups
like AIPAC have spent millions against our movement.

We know that AIPAC will spend millions of dollars against us and our
candidates for speaking out against human rights violations and we
urgently need your support to fight back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133721?refcode=em20230419-28560&t=1021&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help
ensure we have the resources to fight back against AIPAC and elect more
leaders like Jamaal Bowman and Bernie Sanders?

Thank you so much for your solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230419-28560-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28560_1203867_mKjIwc&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28560%2E1203867%2EmKjIwc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Why Are They Catering to the Radical Minority?
body:
Mickey's Big House No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qutirky-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday! There was a[ _breach at the White House_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-y/) yesterday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-t/) **Catering to a Radical Minority** Biden has [**promised to veto the bill that would prevent biological males from participating in women's sports** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-i/)and All-American swimmer Riley Gaines has something to say about that. **Chinese Secret Police** The FBI and federal prosecutors announced the**[arrests of two New York residents who allegedly ran an undisclosed Chinese government police station](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-d/)** in Manhattan's Chinatown neighborhood. **IRS Reports $20B Less in Refunds** With the 2023 tax season officially ending, the Internal Revenue Service is reminding last-minute filers to brace for a smaller tax refund this year.**[Did you get a refund this year?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-h/)** **Unbothered** **[Rep George Santos of New York has announced he is filing for reelection](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-k/)** even though he is under investigation by the ethics committee, and democrats want him to resign. **Chicago Teenage Mob** _Chicago is a lost cause._ The incoming mayor has been **[downplaying the violence](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-u/)** , and the outgoing mayor has a**[ridiculous reason for the mayhem](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-o/)**.

**Biden Crime Family** House Oversight Committee Republicans reviewed documents **[suggesting that six more members of Biden's family may have benefitted](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-x/)** from business deals related to the president's influence peddling. **So Shady!** Why is the Biden Administration so shady? Just in the last week, we've learned they were **[hiding communications](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-m/)** and **[paying an employee charged with a felony. ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-c/)** **Mickey's Big House** Disney will soon learn [**you don't want to mess with Ron DeSantis in this ongoing feud**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-q/) _You won't believe what he's thinking of doing now!_ **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-a/)!**
* **[Transitioning](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-f/).**
* Suspicious **[package](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-z/).**
* AM**[Radio](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-v/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-e/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutirky-trhiujldw-yh/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Peter,

I am proud to be a member of Congress who always puts the needs of my constituents first, and the proof is in my work over the past four years: I’ve fought to bring down health care costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend your freedom to control your body. And working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve passed bills to invest in manufacturing in our community, ensure veterans get the health care they deserve, and strengthen our infrastructure.

I want to make sure I’m staying up-to-date on the issues that matter most to you. And while I would love to sit down for coffee with each and every one of you, unfortunately my schedule won’t allow it – so instead, I’m hoping you can take two minutes to complete my Spring Issues Survey. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’ve made it official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
I’ve made it official, Peter: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**

Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from the start:
[**Peter, can you split a donation right now to support my re-election campaign and Letitia James'? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight alongside other Democrats like her.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62031249/402054129/-348967756?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1054-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2VjMmIzOC1mZWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xFLd6WqC4UtPenrG0KH5Ls3lOAqALMnrig3nl9gXSw=)
I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.

I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.

**We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.**
[**Please make a contribution to support Letitia James and, my re-election campaign today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62031250/402054130/-348967756?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1054-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2VjMmIzOC1mZWRlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xFLd6WqC4UtPenrG0KH5Ls3lOAqALMnrig3nl9gXSw=)
Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: | | | I’ve made it official, Peter: I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year. Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from the start: = I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including: Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits Lowering the cost of hearing aids Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal Even making billionaires cry on national TV Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.** = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

clean_body: | | | Friend, this is urgent. A self-funding millionaire just entered this race to defeat me – and with Politico saying Ohio could decide Senate control, I need your grassroots support to fight back right now. I'm falling short of my $50,000 rapid-response goal – so I had to reach out one last time:= I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support during critical moments like this. Thank you. – Sherrod \--------------Forwarded Message-------------- Sender: Sherrod Brown Date: April 18, 2023 Subject: a self-funding GOP millionaire just announced he's running against me | | | | | I needed to share this update with you directly, friend: A self-funding GOP millionaire – and one of Donald Trump's yes-men – just announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat. With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. = Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to defending this seat. Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for rushing your support to show the strength of this grassroots movement, friend. With you by my side, I know that we'll be able to take on whatever the GOP throws our way – and win. – Sherrod Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. = Thank you! = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, **Ronald Reagan said it best: “The purpose of America is to unleash the full talent and genius of every individual.”**

Nowhere else in the world can people arrive in a country with little besides the clothes on their backs and make a successful life for themselves.

_But that’s exactly what I did, and it’s what millions of Americans do every single day._

**America is the land of opportunity - but right now, we have a Democrat party that wants to shoot that potential down for power and control.**

Individual freedom, economic opportunity, and safe communities are what make America strong, but those are the very values the Left is desperately trying to attack.

_But as someone who’s lived the American dream, I’m not about to let them get away with it._

[**Join me today in the fight to UNLEASH American potential and DEFEAT _anyone_ who stands in its way!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=4949211e2afd4093836b3fe39893154a&_e=U6deNY0kefMoK6_orRixqxUbuYVcmP_TOb1IcPobpVFmXOwHMVwgtsNalXLFlmOvwOLwAQ-VfUW5PT6-qdIa-eKAgM-r8irAIA1kgjopTWLgts8vOefKpdAi_qzem40C-DKXkXzzEUUA6IzXkGXMOxpxy_dSGYU2Js0mKOZ-6cf08JoKV6AkMy_nIMn24lA1ZYKJ0QPjspG5Bo73MCBGVXOSHlCIJXHZXO0u-2PHw20d5vBQ8DXB48wySnt3HOqgC9ryMM2bSmOZBe2d6eKBknpFtMwL9u8Ml4vaU1wMm3uLho4XIhX_l8O8y3Dlki6tUCAGA880zBpT3gIVs3yUtmzv-zJCazn-T8KnMmWdXnI%3D)

Peter, I came to America after my father was put on a kill list in communist Vietnam.

This country quite literally saved my life - so I dedicated my life to protecting it as a U.S. Naval Captain.

I pushed my body to its limit and sacrificed precious time away from my family, but I knew it was all worth it because I was fighting for my children to have the same opportunities that I did.

And after all my fellow service members and I have done, I’m not about to let the Democrats let our sacrifices be in vain.

[**It’s up to us to save the American dream, and I need every member of our team to step up. Please, join us today and UNLEASH American potential for EVERY citizen in our great country!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=4949211e2afd4093836b3fe39893154a&_e=U6deNY0kefMoK6_orRixqxUbuYVcmP_TOb1IcPobpVFmXOwHMVwgtsNalXLFlmOvwOLwAQ-VfUW5PT6-qdIa-eKAgM-r8irAIA1kgjopTWLgts8vOefKpdAi_qzem40C-DKXkXzzEUUA6IzXkGXMOxpxy_dSGYU2Js0mKOZ-6cf08JoKV6AkMy_nIMn24lA1ZYKJ0QPjspG5Bo73MCBGVVjLvSzRDsso43I2849p2HJrFDWdU2m-NVPCIlPNWk7zArFmUIPZ7byhtO6euMicB43B-LTkDvGlyjHAmMXXss0q9cHVAwqH5-Zy2g8cFo9nmogOuTOo8wDtPDykbleM7QvEwY3xUJK6p5X_aCRM7j8%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I am excited to tell you that I have officially launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio!

My name is Bernie Moreno, _and I am NOT a politician._ I’m a political outsider and proud American, entrepreneur and business owner, husband and father, **and I’m running to protect the American Dream for the next generation.[Will you join me?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0cfd1f14227040dfa636dd7897437164&_e=8Toib9E24a9cU4zjBladE8KaNFM-INTEWgtafLauc-lBlrBjGpSlaaHMg2mdD2xdjzDVMBNvDwAb_O1pGjAZta7NxDi2zihwdOe2PnjqSctTC7ojDi1qSsIhQtC7Nv8vr3PkMOIUM3d8FoVtWTojqFeZ5gUipxAswOkM9UUE_6PjasdG33Coa79yqEWfG6KtKODJ1I1tnn_yFDzNQTivgknSSLEbyv5vXS4I9yJGbtniDXlZPYr8MtXXNUZfNI-s7MF1WZ1J73MVpcOdFYd9vKHS0RFG2GsFNoRIjVo0mJgkR8BvF-EaJ1ZBFDLtzg-JU8jKywKfTTTRfYpb06YwfzVjz9IR35W2D9orcOUqlBTTRVjua1ZyxltFolYGAKVQjjQWXJR8ZGYl43rKQxttDgMjuFmtYJ1WW3blrsEVLUs%3D)**

My Democrat opponent – left-wing career politician Sherrod Brown – has not only failed to give Ohio the leadership we need, but has supported Joe Biden’s catastrophic agenda that has left America at the mercy of the Chinese Communist Party, Mexican drug cartels, and radical woke idealogues.

**It’s time for new leadership in Ohio, and it’s time to restore a conservative majority in the Senate that can restore American strength, security, freedom, and values.**

This will be one of the nation’s toughest races in 2024, which is why **Pres. Donald J. Trump himself encouraged me to jump in the race.** He believes I have what it takes to win:

I’m grateful and humbled to have this high praise from Pres. Trump, but I’m also going to need you on my team if we’re going to succeed.

At age 5, I came to America with my family from Colombia. I didn’t speak a word of English.
At age 10, I got my first job as a newspaper delivery boy and began learning about the value of hard work.
At age 18, I became an American citizen – one of the proudest moments of my life.

Eventually, I was able to purchase my first car dealership and built it into one of the largest and most successful luxury dealers in the nation. This success also led to me launching another auto-related business from an idea to a $100M+ company.

As an outsider who took advantage of the opportunities and freedoms this country provides and worked hard to start and grow a successful business that could provide for me and my family, **I can truly say I have lived the America Dream!**

Now, the American Dream is on life support and the America I discovered growing up is nearly unrecognizable.

**I can’t stand by while failed politicians like Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden actively weaken our nation and trample on our values.**

America gave me everything I needed to get to where I am today, and I believe the most important by product of success is to give back to the country that has offered me so much.

I’m not a politician – _I’m an outsider._ This means I’m not counting on support from lobbyists and special interests to fund my campaign like Sherrod Brown is. I’m counting on everyday Americans like you to help me build a grassroots movement.

Ohioans and all Americans need a leader who will put them first and prioritize making our nation safer and more prosperous.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0cfd1f14227040dfa636dd7897437164&_e=8Toib9E24a9cU4zjBladE8KaNFM-INTEWgtafLauc-lBlrBjGpSlaaHMg2mdD2xdjzDVMBNvDwAb_O1pGjAZta7NxDi2zihwdOe2PnjqSctTC7ojDi1qSsIhQtC7Nv8vr3PkMOIUM3d8FoVtWTojqFeZ5gUipxAswOkM9UUE_6PjasdG33Coa79yqEWfG6KtKODJ1I1tnn_yFDzNQTivgknSSLEbyv5vXS4I9yJGbtniDXlZPYr8MtXXNUZfNI-s7MF1WZ1J73MVpcOdFYd9vLuIRr-tYIeHnwnWX7DRRtOgu9mUX-sEC0PsfaZT3t41CU8kjOqxDMlcpSv6awsRb6ChS0epxUlJUxN-jiN5EhV_dVbCWxOtre3B1ZL8m-glTQ0iNlMl3MmCNtRk6ILPXeX82Gpb1MRKjl6awGlhE4c%3D)

body:
|
#
---

Right before our very eyes, the America we know and love is being transformed into a tin pot dictatorship that criminalizes descent and imprisons its opposition. But during these dark times, our resolve to SAVE our county has never been stronger! Rest assured, Friend, with our movement growing stronger by the day,the energy at our FIRST rally since my arrest will be unlike anything you’ve EVERwitnessed. And I’d like YOU to experience it first-hand... Which is why I’m flying out one lucky patriot plus a guest to the rally for FREE . Your hotel will be covered, you’ll get to meet yours truly, and we’ll even take a commemorative photo together so that you’ll ALWAYS remember this special day. | America has never been more at risk than it is today under Biden and the radical Democrats’ tyrannical government. And never have we faced such grave threats from WITHIN our own country...** ...The weaponization of our legal system to imprison opposition. ...Censorship of our free speech. ...Perverted lunatics encouraging children to get surgery to switch genders. ...Marxists teaching the next generation to HATE America’s core values. ...Releasing murderers, rapists, and thieves from prison. ...Letting our border become the world’s dumping ground. ...Attacking our basic constitutional rights. ...Jeopardizing the currency standard of the U.S. Dollar. But with all that being said, never has our country seen a movement with the sheer will and dedication to SAVE AMERICA like our beautiful MAGA movement. Which is why I know the energy at our next rally will be unlike anything you’ve ever experienced! It has to be, Friend. Together, we will WIN BACK the White House and bring our country back from the brink. But first, I need YOU right by my side at the rally to share that energy with thousands of your fellow America First patriots. Thank you, Donald J. Susie Lee being named as one of the DCCC’s frontline candidates is a big deal because it confirms what we’ve known to be true.
Winning this seat could very well be the difference between Democrats taking back the House majority, or giving Kevin McCarthy the chance to build up his red firewall in Congress.
Susie won her race by just 3.96 points in the last election, one of the smallest margins of victory of any Democrat in the country. By naming her one of the frontline Democrats we have to defend in 2024, the DCCC is showing that they’re all-in to win this race.
Here’s what this news makes clear: The stakes are high in this race and we need to do everything we can to keep Susie Lee in Congress.
[**Whether it’s $10 or $25, we’re asking for your support to help re-elect Susie Lee and stop the House GOP from expanding their majority. Peter – This month I launched my very first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate in Nevada. Can I take just a minute to explain why this race is so important?

Right now, analysts at FiveThirtyEight say that the GOP has “a clear path” to retaking the Senate majority – and it could all come down to what happens in Nevada.
In the last Senate race here, the GOP spent over $55 MILLION to turn Nevada red – and they nearly succeeded. Democrats won by less than a percentage point. Just 7,928 votes.

This means we have zero room for error. With The Washington Post calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – already launching misleading attack ads against me.

I’m going to need grassroots supporters like you by my side to win. But with just hours left to reach our Reelection Founding Donor goal, my team says we’re still falling short. We need 1,456 more donations before our critical midnight deadline – and I’m counting on you to help us get back on track.
**[So please, Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you split $5 between my campaign and Patty Murray now to become a Founding Donor of our very first reelection campaign in Nevada? Every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62032138/402057790/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk11-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTRhZDY2OC0wMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5330VTCDggy1s8HIVX9asVS73xLUvcqBqpfdK6yaluQ=)**

Our members are the core of this movement and the driving force behind our fight to elect state Democrats. But this team is only as strong as our grassroots support – that’s why we need committed local Democrats like _you_ standing behind us as we face off against Republican extremists in elections across the country. **We need you on this team.**
State Democrats are facing _eight_ crucial special elections next month in key states like New Hampshire and in Pennsylvania, where Democrats hold a narrow, one-seat majority over Republicans in the House. name: Working Families Party
subject: Eyes on Philadelphia now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Helen Gym has a real shot at being Philadelphia's next mayor, but Republicans and corporate Democrats will make every effort to crush the progressive insurgency we’re seeing in city after city. | | | Big cities are electing progressive mayors, Peter. From Boston’s **Michelle Wu** to Los Angeles’ **Karen Bass** to Chicago’s newly-elected **Brandon Johnson** — the ranks of big city progressive mayors are growing as more and more voters rethink what a city can do for its people. **And next in line could be Philadelphia, where former elementary school teacher, education-organizer, and city councilmember Helen Gym is on the ballot for mayor.** With her momentum building by the day, we know that Helen has a real shot at winning, but we also know that Republicans and corporate Democrats will make every effort to crush the progressive insurgency we’re seeing in city after city. From Boston’s Michelle Wu to Los Angeles’ Karen Bass to Chicago’s newly-elected Brandon Johnson — the ranks of big city progressive mayors are growing as more and more voters rethink what a city can do for its people. And next in line could be Philadelphia, where former elementary school teacher, education-organizer, and city councilmember Helen Gym is on the ballot for mayor. With her momentum building by the day, we know that Helen has a real shot at winning, but we also know that Republicans and corporate Democrats will make every effort to crush the progressive insurgency we’re seeing in city after city. Already, Republicans are coalescing behind Helen’s top opponent — multimillionaire ShopRite magnate Jeff Brown — and reportedly even switching parties just to vote for him, and against Helen, in the upcoming Democratic primary.1 We can’t let them win. ** It’s no surprise that dark money is also already showing up in this race too, with the super PAC For a Better Philadelphia raising over $3.08 million from undisclosed donors for Brown’s campaign. But while Helen’s opponents have deep-pocketed donors and outside groups spending a fortune trying to buy this election and derail the momentum arriving in Philadelphia after the victories in some of the biggest city halls in the country — Helen has an unstoppable grassroots force on her side that believes in her vision for a government that has working people’s backs. Her record of leadership, movement-building, and service to her community is resonating more and more with voters across Philadelphia every day, and we know that victory is within reach — but only if we continue getting her message in front of undecided voters. Your support will help us build the large-scale grassroots movement needed to overcome the dark money already being funneled into this race, and cover the costs of canvassing, texting, phonebanking, and all of the organizing that’s needed to reach voters across Philadelphia and win this election. | | We'll be with her every step of the way [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62032388/402059103/541775293?sourceid=1048941&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2MwYmQ0Ni0wNWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjAk9jdGe2Er0KK9ZNS0fQ6p_y86-8DW6PuGremeFA8=&emci=16c0bd46-05df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=17c0bd46-05df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

In 2012, when Sen. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** first ran for Senate in deep purple Wisconsin as the race's clear underdog, EMILYs List was with her all the way.

She won, becoming the first openly gay person ever elected to the U.S. Senate. Then she was reelected with EMILYs List's support in 2018. She's back on the ballot this cycle — and we're so proud to _still_ be fighting by her side.

**[**Are you with us? Donate now to help elect and reelect pro-choice champions like Tammy Baldwin who can help protect our razor-thin Senate majority.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62032395/402059110/541775293?sourceid=1048941&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2MwYmQ0Ni0wNWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjAk9jdGe2Er0KK9ZNS0fQ6p_y86-8DW6PuGremeFA8=&emci=16c0bd46-05df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=17c0bd46-05df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Here's why this fight is so important, Peter: Tammy's seat is a _top priority_ for Republicans hoping for a Senate takeover, and her race is sure to be a magnet for hostile attacks and special interest spending by anti-choice extremists.

But Tammy has shown us time and time again that she has what it takes to run strong grassroots campaigns. And just this month, we saw a BIG win for pro-choice candidates in Wisconsin, when Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** won her statewide race for Wisconsin Supreme Court. This was just further proof of what we already knew: _**Wisconsinites want pro-choice leadership.**_

Now more than ever, Tammy's ability to bring people together and build a positive movement for change — even in the midst of deep partisan divides and ugly political fights — is invaluable. The EMILYs List community is proud to stand with this exceptional public servant _every step of the way_ on her path to reelection. ****This is a critical seat, Peter. Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Tammy Baldwin in 2024:**

clean_body: | | | We'll be with her every step of the way Peter, In 2012, when Sen. Tammy Baldwin (WI) first ran for Senate in deep purple Wisconsin as the race's clear underdog, EMILYs List was with her all the way. She won, becoming the first openly gay person ever elected to the U.S. Senate. Then she was reelected with EMILYs List's support in 2018. She's back on the ballot this cycle — and we're so proud to still be fighting by her side. Here's why this fight is so important, Peter: Tammy's seat is a top priority for Republicans hoping for a Senate takeover, and her race is sure to be a magnet for hostile attacks and special interest spending by anti-choice extremists. But Tammy has shown us time and time again that she has what it takes to run strong grassroots campaigns. And just this month, we saw a BIG win for pro-choice candidates in Wisconsin, when Judge Janet Protasiewicz won her statewide race for Wisconsin Supreme Court. This was just further proof of what we already knew: Wisconsinites want pro-choice leadership. Now more than ever, Tammy's ability to bring people together and build a positive movement for change — even in the midst of deep partisan divides and ugly political fights — is invaluable. The EMILYs List community is proud to stand with this exceptional public servant every step of the way on her path to reelection. This is a critical seat, Peter. Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Tammy Baldwin in 2024: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the First Presidential Debate in August.

But, Fellow American, I need your help to get there. I need your help to secure unique, grassroots donations, which will be one of the main requirements to be included in August's debate to discuss how to actually *FIX* our country.

Watch my reaction to the announcement of the first debate here ⬇️⬇️

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8801602797d4a82a32e7d3f7b4ea42b&_e=VV0WQYT_i1JGKcQaYO9_NomzNmkob3dY-fA8LbUcIbOITz6c_DjHqJ4lGgZoV4M2co5l7UMS20Kz-Ve_aVvTwrM2H0DayhYLQwTXAuASANPfsbb9bhWKrBz7MgNkmjdm9tsXzoKc_bfiHVcNVrpyFqt0eT1jntQtCi-Nt1VEwfywoG-qXjqd2G1XyyCGZmOYCSk9v4O1DNm7FuDcsrtH9MEYYwdZBbTW8Qqram6gFxddIuZIci6NC_ihBhwQ-Jhi3BbjN-vXcrU_c5_kyH5gbuWwjuJMyZzgb2iyEy7B_fcGs--0PO7fUbZWMv9qQnzkcZVMi68ZklDB4xMJTjKeRzrNRVbX8ntRnA3FfTRVEUHynfx0k7pjH-obO7hIPlb_AykBO_Z8LFIH_BK0wwyrXtnKu-XQfPGPne9ac44nUrE%3D)
It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776.

**[Just one dollar (or more) will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8801602797d4a82a32e7d3f7b4ea42b&_e=VV0WQYT_i1JGKcQaYO9_NomzNmkob3dY-fA8LbUcIbOITz6c_DjHqJ4lGgZoV4M2co5l7UMS20Kz-Ve_aVvTwrM2H0DayhYLQwTXAuASANPfsbb9bhWKrBz7MgNkmjdm9tsXzoKc_bfiHVcNVrpyFqt0eT1jntQtCi-Nt1VEwfywoG-qXjqd2G1XyyCGZmOYCSk9v4O1DNm7FuDcsrtH9MEYYwdZBbTW8Qqram6gFxddIuZIci6NC_ihBhwQ-Jhi3BbjN-vXcrU_c5_kyH5gbqUho0-HpPr-szGvk3_XMNgP2xlUIDHQ6lanb28UxupoboDHX0dKQ8uJ2hEo--gkkehWCEUzrbd-B7fO1Pw00Svn9Cvd-KQP5LaYoA8iR7re4nDNCoEcZmwJf_ynLEPuWYZCwiA3G-CYGnNOHT7mbgM%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8801602797d4a82a32e7d3f7b4ea42b&_e=VV0WQYT_i1JGKcQaYO9_NomzNmkob3dY-fA8LbUcIbOITz6c_DjHqJ4lGgZoV4M2co5l7UMS20Kz-Ve_aVvTwrM2H0DayhYLQwTXAuASANPfsbb9bhWKrBz7MgNkmjdm9tsXzoKc_bfiHVcNVrpyFqt0eT1jntQtCi-Nt1VEwfywoG-qXjqd2G1XyyCGZmOYCSk9v4O1DNm7FuDcsrtH9MEYYwdZBbTW8Qqram6gFxddIuZIci6NC_ihBhwQ-Jhi3BbjN-vXcrU_c5_kyH5gbidwYcb43-ghm1XY6RTANY3V4Xo7348akw1IT6Jdai-CCt1bk3GEPnAxLBMLd8VFUp6MZGfN1rLUqnPfUs7TJTnKOAezkjikVGG4LcLYv17jU-uZs_xnkA9Qw2chKvnnx7Z9-ek6qUxmGJymfiel3wY%3D)

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62032482/402059593/225909813?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230419_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMmQ4NGU3LTA1ZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4FR-Wa9_ePIvYU4Ky4z97PDjU9vklzAMnABcYJCxwaY=) **WE TOLD YOU:** Our Senate majority depends on winning in Texas, Peter

**_WE EVEN TOLD YOU:_** MAGA Republicans will DESTROY all of our progress if they take control of the Senate... Yet donations to Texas Democrats stalled...

subject: Yadira is helping families in Colorado
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
She just introduced the Keeping Families Fed Act

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62033177/402061997/533250332?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODIwNDBiMy0wOGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJgtT-eDSccAPiKD29nbm9seO80ZybQyib6YKmB_PPU=)
Hi Peter — This week, Yadira introduced the _Keeping Families Fed Act_. This bill will make sure that over half a million Coloradans don’t have to choose between keeping the lights on, or putting food on the table.

**Here’s what you need to know:** In early March, Coloradans faced significant cuts in their SNAP benefits, and __hardworking families who were already struggling with rising costs were suddenly left with a substantial gap – overwhelming food banks across the state.__

**That’s why Yadira introduced the _Keeping Families Fed Act_ , which will close the gap,** extend the benefits for one year, and require every state SNAP agency to share resources and guidance so families are prepared when the extension does end.

**Peter, Yadira is fighting to make sure every Colorado family has the resources they need to succeed, but she is facing an uphill battle and needs the strength of this grassroots team behind her.[So please, will you chip in any amount to keep Yadira in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62033178/402061998/533250332?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.19_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODIwNDBiMy0wOGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJgtT-eDSccAPiKD29nbm9seO80ZybQyib6YKmB_PPU=)**

body:
There isn't much time left...
| | | **ALERT: These 5 Democrats are officially running for re-election -- _but we don't have your support on file!_**

**YOUR OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS ENDORSEMENT IS MISSING >>****Add your name now to _officially_ endorse these battleground Democrats:**
| | [Click to Endorse](https://go.dscc.org/go/12814?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230419-ImportantMessage-BattlegroundEndorsementSlate-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230419-ImportantMessage-BattlegroundEndorsementSlate-ETG-sl1&akid=10506%2E9716520%2E8GUCni)
---

**This is _critical_ , team:** Five battleground Democrats just announced they're running for re-election, and they NEED our support to protect our majority!

These incredible senators are on the FRONT LINES of the fight to defend our Democratic Senate -- and if even _two_ lose their races, we'll hand power right back to Mitch McConnell. **Republicans will spare no expense to CRUSH our battleground senators, so Democrats across the country must stand with them RIGHT NOW!**

We need to collect 50,000 endorsements before MIDNIGHT -- and as a top Democrat, we selected YOU to make an Official Grassroots Endorsement! **But there isn’t much time left, so please:**

**[Add your name now to officially endorse these incredible Democrats on the front lines of the fight to defend our Senate majority!](https://go.dscc.org/go/12814?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230419-ImportantMessage-BattlegroundEndorsementSlate-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230419-ImportantMessage-BattlegroundEndorsementSlate-ETG-sl1&akid=10506%2E9716520%2E8GUCni)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Heyyy, Derek. 😊
Big news: I wanted to share with you that I just chaired my first subcommittee hearing as a U.S. Senator!!!
The topic? **Protecting SNAP + Americans’ access to food.**
This isn’t a Republican or Democratic issue. We need to help families get food on the table. It’s as simple as that.
Today’s hearing is just one of the ways I’m fighting like h*ll for yinz guys’ families in the Senate, but the honest truth is that I can’t do it alone.
**[You’ve had my back from the start, so I’m respectfully asking: can you chip in any amount right now? Your support will fuel our work in the Senate, and I’m just so deeply grateful for this team.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230419-1?refcode=em20230419-1-8341&refcode2=8341_434096_CAkvk_&akid=8341%2E434096%2ECAkvk_)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230419-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230419-8341&refcode2=8341_434096_CAkvk_&akid=8341%2E434096%2ECAkvk_)**
I’d be grateful if you can kick in even a few bucks to give us a boost. Either way, thanks for being here, Derek.
More soon,
💛 John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230419-8341-footer&t=1&refcode2=8341_434096_CAkvk_&akid=8341%2E434096%2ECAkvk_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8341%2E434096%2ECAkvk_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8341%2E434096%2ECAkvk_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
